Using linear mixed effects models, we confirmed that shorter, more variable step lengths and longer sit-to-stand durations were predicted by higher self-rated fall risk and fear of falling. These findings demonstrate that our pipeline can enable accessible and ecologically valid gait analysis in community settings.

</details>


### [183] [EigenCoin: sassanid coins classification based on Bhattacharyya distance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11932)
*Rahele Allahverdi,Mohammad Mahdi Dehshibi,Azam Bastanfard,Daryoosh Akbarzadeh*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出EigenCoin方法用于不平衡数据集下的萨珊王朝硬币分类，结合流形构建与Bhattacharyya距离，在准确率上提升9.45%-21.75%并解决过拟合问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决不平衡数据库中的模式识别问题，特别是在萨珊王朝硬币分类这一具体应用场景中，同时探索整体方法和基于特征方法的影响

Method: 提出EigenCoin方法，包含三个主要步骤：流形构建、测试数据映射和分类，使用Bhattacharyya距离进行分类任务

Result: EigenCoin方法优于其他观察算法，准确率提升9.45%至21.75%，并具备处理过拟合问题的能力

Conclusion: EigenCoin方法在不平衡数据库的萨珊王朝硬币分类任务中表现优异，验证了流形构建与Bhattacharyya距离的有效性

Abstract: Solving pattern recognition problems using imbalanced databases is a hot topic, which entices researchers to bring it into focus. Therefore, we consider this problem in the application of Sassanid coins classification. Our focus is not only on proposing EigenCoin manifold with Bhattacharyya distance for the classification task, but also on testing the influence of the holistic and feature-based approaches. EigenCoin consists of three main steps namely manifold construction, mapping test data, and classification. Conducted experiments show EigenCoin outperformed other observed algorithms and achieved the accuracy from 9.45% up to 21.75%, while it has the capability of handling the over-fitting problem.

</details>


### [184] [Who Handles Orientation? Investigating Invariance in Feature Matching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11809)
*David Nordström,Johan Edstedt,Fredrik Kahl,Georg Bökman*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 研究发现，在描述符阶段学习旋转不变性可获得与匹配器阶段处理相似性能，但能实现更快的旋转不变匹配器，且大规模训练不会损害直立图像性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代匹配器在处理大平面内旋转时表现不佳，虽然数据增强可以学习旋转不变性，但旋转不变性应在哪个阶段（描述符或匹配器）引入尚不明确。

Method: 在稀疏匹配流水线背景下，通过在大规模3D视觉数据集上进行训练，并在流行图像匹配基准上评估，系统研究旋转不变性的引入阶段。

Result: 1) 在描述符阶段引入旋转不变性可获得与匹配器阶段相似的性能；2) 描述符阶段学习能实现更快的旋转不变匹配器；3) 大规模训练下，强制旋转不变性不会损害直立图像性能；4) 增加训练数据量显著改善对旋转图像的泛化能力。

Conclusion: 提出了两种对平面内旋转鲁棒的匹配器，在WxBS、HardMatch、SatAst等基准上达到最先进性能，表明在描述符阶段学习旋转不变性是有效且高效的策略。

Abstract: Finding matching keypoints between images is a core problem in 3D computer vision. However, modern matchers struggle with large in-plane rotations. A straightforward mitigation is to learn rotation invariance via data augmentation. However, it remains unclear at which stage rotation invariance should be incorporated. In this paper, we study this in the context of a modern sparse matching pipeline. We perform extensive experiments by training on a large collection of 3D vision datasets and evaluating on popular image matching benchmarks. Surprisingly, we find that incorporating rotation invariance already in the descriptor yields similar performance to handling it in the matcher. However, rotation invariance is achieved earlier in the matcher when it is learned in the descriptor, allowing for a faster rotation-invariant matcher. Further, we find that enforcing rotation invariance does not hurt upright performance when trained at scale. Finally, we study the emergence of rotation invariance through scale and find that increasing the training data size substantially improves generalization to rotated images. We release two matchers robust to in-plane rotations that achieve state-of-the-art performance on e.g. multi-modal (WxBS), extreme (HardMatch), and satellite image matching (SatAst). Code is available at https://github.com/davnords/loma.

</details>


### [185] [OmniShow: Unifying Multimodal Conditions for Human-Object Interaction Video Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11804)
*Donghao Zhou,Guisheng Liu,Hao Yang,Jiatong Li,Jingyu Lin,Xiaohu Huang,Yichen Liu,Xin Gao,Cunjian Chen,Shilei Wen,Chi-Wing Fu,Pheng-Ann Heng*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: OmniShow是一个端到端的人-物交互视频生成框架，能够根据文本、参考图像、音频和姿态等多模态条件合成高质量视频，解决了现有方法无法同时处理所有必需条件的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人-物交互视频生成在电子商务演示、短视频制作和互动娱乐等实际应用中具有重要价值，但现有方法无法同时处理文本、参考图像、音频和姿态等所有必需条件，存在可控性与质量之间的权衡问题，且该领域缺乏专门的数据集和评估基准。

Method: 提出OmniShow框架，包含：1）统一通道级条件注入机制，用于高效注入图像和姿态条件；2）门控局部上下文注意力机制，确保精确的视听同步；3）解耦-联合训练策略，通过多阶段训练和模型合并有效利用异构子任务数据集；4）建立HOIVG-Bench评估基准。

Result: 实验表明OmniShow在各种多模态条件设置下均实现了最先进的性能，为人-物交互视频生成任务设定了坚实的标准。

Conclusion: OmniShow成功解决了人-物交互视频生成中可控性与质量的权衡问题，通过创新的多模态条件协调机制和有效的训练策略，为这一新兴任务提供了行业级的解决方案，并建立了专门的评估基准推动该领域发展。

Abstract: In this work, we study Human-Object Interaction Video Generation (HOIVG), which aims to synthesize high-quality human-object interaction videos conditioned on text, reference images, audio, and pose. This task holds significant practical value for automating content creation in real-world applications, such as e-commerce demonstrations, short video production, and interactive entertainment. However, existing approaches fail to accommodate all these requisite conditions. We present OmniShow, an end-to-end framework tailored for this practical yet challenging task, capable of harmonizing multimodal conditions and delivering industry-grade performance. To overcome the trade-off between controllability and quality, we introduce Unified Channel-wise Conditioning for efficient image and pose injection, and Gated Local-Context Attention to ensure precise audio-visual synchronization. To effectively address data scarcity, we develop a Decoupled-Then-Joint Training strategy that leverages a multi-stage training process with model merging to efficiently harness heterogeneous sub-task datasets. Furthermore, to fill the evaluation gap in this field, we establish HOIVG-Bench, a dedicated and comprehensive benchmark for HOIVG. Extensive experiments demonstrate that OmniShow achieves overall state-of-the-art performance across various multimodal conditioning settings, setting a solid standard for the emerging HOIVG task.

</details>


### [186] [ParkSense: Where Should a Delivery Driver Park? Leveraging Idle AV Compute and Vision-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07912)
*Die Hu,Henan Li*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: ParkSense框架利用自动驾驶车辆空闲计算资源，通过视觉语言模型分析卫星和街景图像，为外卖配送精准选择靠近商户入口的停车位，解决配送停车时间过长问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 外卖配送中寻找停车位占据了不成比例的时间，目前没有系统能够根据商户入口位置进行精确的停车位选择，这影响了配送效率和司机收入。

Method: 提出ParkSense框架，在自动驾驶车辆低风险状态（如等红灯、交通拥堵、停车场慢行）时，利用空闲计算资源运行量化7B参数的视觉语言模型，分析预缓存的卫星和街景图像，识别商户入口和合法停车区域，解决配送感知精准停车问题。

Result: 量化7B视觉语言模型在HW4级硬件上4-8秒内完成推理，估计美国每位司机年收入可增加3000-8000美元，并提出了五个自动驾驶、计算机视觉和最后一公里物流交叉领域的研究方向。

Conclusion: ParkSense展示了利用自动驾驶车辆空闲计算资源解决外卖配送停车问题的可行性，为自动驾驶、计算机视觉和最后一公里物流的交叉研究开辟了新方向。

Abstract: Finding parking consumes a disproportionate share of food delivery time, yet no system addresses precise parking-spot selection relative to merchant entrances. We propose ParkSense, a framework that repurposes idle compute during low-risk AV states -- queuing at red lights, traffic congestion, parking-lot crawl -- to run a Vision-Language Model (VLM) on pre-cached satellite and street view imagery, identifying entrances and legal parking zones. We formalize the Delivery-Aware Precision Parking (DAPP) problem, show that a quantized 7B VLM completes inference in 4-8 seconds on HW4-class hardware, and estimate annual per-driver income gains of 3,000-8,000 USD in the U.S. Five open research directions are identified at this unexplored intersection of autonomous driving, computer vision, and last-mile logistics.

</details>


### [187] [Budget-Aware Uncertainty for Radiotherapy Segmentation QA Using nnU-Net](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11798)
*Ricardo Coimbra Brioso,Lorenzo Mondo,Damiano Dei,Nicola Lambri,Pietro Mancosu,Marta Scorsetti,Daniele Loiacono*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出基于nnU-Net的预算感知不确定性驱动质量保证框架，结合不确定性量化和后校准生成体素级不确定性图，指导放疗靶区勾画的手动审核


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 放疗计划中临床靶区勾画耗时且难以评估，深度学习自动分割可减轻工作量，但临床安全部署需要可靠指标来识别模型可能出错的位置

Method: 基于nnU-Net构建预算感知QA框架，结合不确定性量化和后校准技术（温度缩放、深度集成、检查点集成、测试时增强），生成基于预测熵的体素级不确定性图

Result: 分割精度保持稳定，温度缩放显著改善校准；校准检查点集成最能提升不确定性-误差对齐，产生更一致突出需要手动编辑区域的不确定性图

Conclusion: 校准与高效集成相结合是实现放疗分割预算感知QA工作流程的有前景策略，能可靠指导靶向手动审核

Abstract: Accurate delineation of the Clinical Target Volume (CTV) is essential for radiotherapy planning, yet remains time-consuming and difficult to assess, especially for complex treatments such as Total Marrow and Lymph Node Irradiation (TMLI). While deep learning-based auto-segmentation can reduce workload, safe clinical deployment requires reliable cues indicating where models may be wrong. In this work, we propose a budget-aware uncertainty-driven quality assurance (QA) framework built on nnU-Net, combining uncertainty quantification and post-hoc calibration to produce voxel-wise uncertainty maps (based on predictive entropy) that can guide targeted manual review. We compare temperature scaling (TS), deep ensembles (DE), checkpoint ensembles (CE), and test-time augmentation (TTA), evaluated both individually and in combination on TMLI as a representative use case. Reliability is assessed through ROI-masked calibration metrics and uncertainty--error alignment under realistic revision constraints, summarized as AUC over the top 0-5% most uncertain voxels. Across configurations, segmentation accuracy remains stable, whereas TS substantially improves calibration. Uncertainty-error alignment improves most with calibrated checkpoint-based inference, leading to uncertainty maps that highlight more consistently regions requiring manual edits. Overall, integrating calibration with efficient ensembling seems a promising strategy to implement a budget-aware QA workflow for radiotherapy segmentation.

</details>


### [188] [SyncFix: Fixing 3D Reconstructions via Multi-View Synchronization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11797)
*Deming Li,Abhay Yadav,Cheng Peng,Rama Chellappa,Anand Bhattad*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: SyncFix是一个通过扩散模型进行多视角一致性优化的场景重建框架，通过联合潜在桥匹配同步多视角表示，无需干净参考图像即可生成高质量重建结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决基于扩散模型的场景重建中存在的跨视角语义和几何不一致问题，传统方法在缺乏干净参考图像时重建质量受限。

Method: 将精化过程建模为联合潜在桥匹配问题，同步多视角的扭曲和干净表示；学习多视角联合条件分布，在整个去噪轨迹中强制执行一致性；仅使用图像对进行训练，推理时可泛化到任意数量的视角。

Result: 定性和定量结果均显示SyncFix能持续生成高质量重建，超越当前最先进的基线方法；在缺乏干净参考图像时表现优异，有稀疏参考时能达到更高保真度；重建质量随视角数量增加而提升，但高视角数时收益递减。

Conclusion: SyncFix通过跨视角一致性约束有效解决了扩散基场景重建中的不一致问题，无需干净参考即可实现高质量重建，且具有良好的泛化能力和可扩展性。

Abstract: We present SyncFix, a framework that enforces cross-view consistency during the diffusion-based refinement of reconstructed scenes. SyncFix formulates refinement as a joint latent bridge matching problem, synchronizing distorted and clean representations across multiple views to fix the semantic and geometric inconsistencies. This means SyncFix learns a joint conditional over multiple views to enforce consistency throughout the denoising trajectory. Our training is done only on image pairs, but it generalizes naturally to an arbitrary number of views during inference. Moreover, reconstruction quality improves with additional views, with diminishing returns at higher view counts. Qualitative and quantitative results demonstrate that SyncFix consistently generates high-quality reconstructions and surpasses current state-of-the-art baselines, even in the absence of clean reference images. SyncFix achieves even higher fidelity when sparse references are available.

</details>


### [189] [LMMs Meet Object-Centric Vision: Understanding, Segmentation, Editing and Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11789)
*Yuqian Yuan,Wenqiao Zhang,Juekai Lin,Yu Zhong,Mingjian Gao,Binhe Yu,Yunqi Cao,Wentong Li,Yueting Zhuang,Beng Chin Ooi*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文综述了大型多模态模型与物体中心视觉的交叉领域，探讨了如何通过物体中心表示提升多模态系统在物体级理解、分割、编辑和生成方面的精确性和可控性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管大型多模态模型在通用视觉-语言理解方面取得了显著进展，但在需要精确物体级定位、细粒度空间推理和可控视觉操作的任务中仍存在局限。现有系统难以准确识别实例、在交互中保持物体身份、或精确定位和修改指定区域。物体中心视觉通过明确的视觉实体表示和操作，为解决这些挑战提供了原则性框架。

Method: 本文采用系统性文献综述方法，将相关研究组织为四个主要主题：物体中心视觉理解、物体中心参考分割、物体中心视觉编辑和物体中心视觉生成。总结了支持这些能力的关键建模范式、学习策略和评估协议。

Result: 通过结构化分析，本文提供了该领域发展的全面视角，识别了当前研究的主要进展和模式，为构建可扩展、精确且可信赖的物体中心多模态系统奠定了基础。

Conclusion: 物体中心视觉为提升大型多模态模型的精确性和可控性提供了有前景的框架。未来研究方向包括：鲁棒的实例持久性、细粒度空间控制、一致的多步交互、统一的跨任务建模，以及分布偏移下的可靠基准测试。该综述为开发更精确、可信赖的物体中心多模态系统提供了结构化视角。

Abstract: Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) have achieved remarkable progress in general-purpose vision--language understanding, yet they remain limited in tasks requiring precise object-level grounding, fine-grained spatial reasoning, and controllable visual manipulation. In particular, existing systems often struggle to identify the correct instance, preserve object identity across interactions, and localize or modify designated regions with high precision. Object-centric vision provides a principled framework for addressing these challenges by promoting explicit representations and operations over visual entities, thereby extending multimodal systems from global scene understanding to object-level understanding, segmentation, editing, and generation. This paper presents a comprehensive review of recent advances at the convergence of LMMs and object-centric vision. We organize the literature into four major themes: object-centric visual understanding, object-centric referring segmentation, object-centric visual editing, and object-centric visual generation. We further summarize the key modeling paradigms, learning strategies, and evaluation protocols that support these capabilities. Finally, we discuss open challenges and future directions, including robust instance permanence, fine-grained spatial control, consistent multi-step interaction, unified cross-task modeling, and reliable benchmarking under distribution shift. We hope this paper provides a structured perspective on the development of scalable, precise, and trustworthy object-centric multimodal systems.

</details>


### [190] [GEAR: GEometry-motion Alternating Refinement for Articulated Object Modeling with Gaussian Splatting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07728)
*Jialin Li,Bin Fu,Ruiping Wang,Xilin Chen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: GEAR提出了一种基于高斯溅射表示的EM风格交替优化框架，用于联合建模复杂铰接物体的几何和运动，通过交替优化潜在分割变量和显式运动参数，结合2D分割先验和弱监督约束，显著提升了重建质量和运动参数估计精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高保真交互数字资产对具身智能和机器人交互至关重要，但铰接物体的重建面临挑战：复杂结构、几何-运动耦合关系导致现有方法在联合优化中不稳定，且在复杂多关节或分布外物体上泛化能力有限。

Method: GEAR采用EM风格交替优化框架，将几何和运动作为高斯溅射表示中的相互依赖组件联合建模。将部件分割视为潜在变量，关节运动参数作为显式变量，交替优化以改善收敛性和几何-运动一致性。利用普通2D分割模型提供多视角部件先验，并采用弱监督约束正则化潜在变量。

Result: 在多个基准测试和新构建的GEAR-Multi数据集上，GEAR在几何重建和运动参数估计方面达到最先进水平，特别是在具有多个可动部件的复杂铰接物体上表现优异。

Conclusion: GEAR通过交替优化框架有效解决了铰接物体重建中几何-运动联合优化的不稳定性问题，结合2D分割先验和弱监督约束，在保持泛化能力的同时提升了分割质量，为复杂铰接物体的高质量重建提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: High-fidelity interactive digital assets are essential for embodied intelligence and robotic interaction, yet articulated objects remain challenging to reconstruct due to their complex structures and coupled geometry-motion relationships. Existing methods suffer from instability in geometry-motion joint optimization, while their generalization remains limited on complex multi-joint or out-of-distribution objects. To address these challenges, we propose GEAR, an EM-style alternating optimization framework that jointly models geometry and motion as interdependent components within a Gaussian Splatting representation. GEAR treats part segmentation as a latent variable and joint motion parameters as explicit variables, alternately refining them for improved convergence and geometric-motion consistency. To enhance part segmentation quality without sacrificing generalization, we leverage a vanilla 2D segmentation model to provide multi-view part priors, and employ a weakly supervised constraint to regularize the latent variable. Experiments on multiple benchmarks and our newly constructed dataset GEAR-Multi demonstrate that GEAR achieves state-of-the-art results in geometric reconstruction and motion parameters estimation, particularly on complex articulated objects with multiple movable parts.

</details>


### [191] [HDR Video Generation via Latent Alignment with Logarithmic Encoding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11788)
*Naomi Ken Korem,Mohamed Oumoumad,Harel Cain,Matan Ben Yosef,Urska Jelercic,Ofir Bibi,Yaron Inger,Or Patashnik,Daniel Cohen-Or*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种利用预训练生成模型的视觉先验进行HDR图像生成的方法，通过对数编码将HDR数据映射到与模型潜在空间对齐的分布，并使用相机模拟退化策略来恢复缺失的高动态范围细节。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: HDR图像提供了丰富的场景辐射表示，但与生成模型训练所用的有界感知压缩数据不匹配。传统方法需要学习新的HDR表示，增加了复杂性和数据需求。本文旨在探索更简单的方法，利用预训练生成模型已有的强大视觉先验来实现HDR生成。

Method: 1. 使用电影管线中广泛采用的对数编码将HDR图像映射到与预训练模型潜在空间自然对齐的分布；2. 通过轻量级微调直接适配，无需重新训练编码器；3. 引入基于相机模拟退化的训练策略，鼓励模型从其学习到的先验中推断缺失的高动态范围内容；4. 在预训练视频模型基础上进行最小化适配，实现高质量的HDR视频生成。

Result: 该方法在预训练视频模型上进行最小化适配后，实现了高质量的HDR视频生成，在多样化场景和具有挑战性的光照条件下均取得了强劲结果。实验表明，通过选择合适的表示方式与模型学习到的先验对齐，可以有效处理HDR这一本质上不同的图像形成机制。

Conclusion: HDR生成可以通过利用预训练生成模型的现有视觉先验以更简单的方式实现，无需重新设计生成模型。关键在于选择与模型学习先验对齐的表示方式（如对数编码），并通过相机模拟退化策略恢复缺失的HDR内容。这种方法为HDR生成提供了一种高效且有效的解决方案。

Abstract: High dynamic range (HDR) imagery offers a rich and faithful representation of scene radiance, but remains challenging for generative models due to its mismatch with the bounded, perceptually compressed data on which these models are trained. A natural solution is to learn new representations for HDR, which introduces additional complexity and data requirements. In this work, we show that HDR generation can be achieved in a much simpler way by leveraging the strong visual priors already captured by pretrained generative models. We observe that a logarithmic encoding widely used in cinematic pipelines maps HDR imagery into a distribution that is naturally aligned with the latent space of these models, enabling direct adaptation via lightweight fine-tuning without retraining an encoder. To recover details that are not directly observable in the input, we further introduce a training strategy based on camera-mimicking degradations that encourages the model to infer missing high dynamic range content from its learned priors. Combining these insights, we demonstrate high-quality HDR video generation using a pretrained video model with minimal adaptation, achieving strong results across diverse scenes and challenging lighting conditions. Our results indicate that HDR, despite representing a fundamentally different image formation regime, can be handled effectively without redesigning generative models, provided that the representation is chosen to align with their learned priors.

</details>


### [192] [MedConcept: Unsupervised Concept Discovery for Interpretability in Medical VLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11868)
*Md Rakibul Haque,KM Arefeen Sultan,Tushar Kataria,Shireen Elhabian*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: MedConcept：一种无监督框架，用于发现医学视觉语言模型中的潜在医学概念，并将其与临床可验证的文本语义关联，通过伪报告式总结实现模型内部推理的可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前医学视觉语言模型（VLMs）的潜在表示不透明，限制了临床信任和预测解释能力。现有可解释性方法（如基于梯度或注意力的可视化）通常局限于特定任务（如分类），且无法提供从共享预训练表示中衍生的、可在下游任务中复用的概念级解释。

Method: MedConcept框架以完全无监督的方式发现预训练VLM表示中的潜在医学概念：1）从预训练VLM表示中识别稀疏神经元级概念激活；2）将其转化为伪报告式总结，实现医生级模型内部推理检查；3）引入定量语义验证协议，利用独立预训练医学LLM作为冻结外部评估器，评估概念与放射学报告的对齐程度；4）定义三个概念分数（对齐、未对齐、不确定）量化语义支持、矛盾或模糊性。

Result: 提出了MedConcept框架，能够无监督地发现医学概念并将其与临床语义关联；引入了定量语义验证协议和三个概念分数，为医学VLM的可解释性评估提供了定量基线；所有代码、提示和数据将在接受后发布。

Conclusion: MedConcept通过无监督概念发现和定量语义验证，解决了医学VLM可解释性的关键挑战，为临床可信部署提供了概念级解释框架，并建立了可解释性评估的定量基准。

Abstract: While medical Vision-Language models (VLMs) achieve strong performance on tasks such as tumor or organ segmentation and diagnosis prediction, their opaque latent representations limit clinical trust and the ability to explain predictions. Interpretability of these multimodal representations are therefore essential for the trustworthy clinical deployment of pretrained medical VLMs. However, current interpretability methods, such as gradient- or attention-based visualizations, are often limited to specific tasks such as classification. Moreover, they do not provide concept-level explanations derived from shared pretrained representations that can be reused across downstream tasks. We introduce MedConcept, a framework that uncovers latent medical concepts in a fully unsupervised manner and grounds them in clinically verifiable textual semantics. MedConcept identifies sparse neuron-level concept activations from pretrained VLM representations and translates them into pseudo-report-style summaries, enabling physician-level inspection of internal model reasoning. To address the lack of quantitative evaluation in concept-based interpretability, we introduce a quantitative semantic verification protocol that leverages an independent pretrained medical LLM as a frozen external evaluator to assess concept alignment with radiology reports. We define three concept scores, Aligned, Unaligned, and Uncertain, to quantify semantic support, contradiction, or ambiguity relative to radiology reports and use them exclusively for post hoc evaluation. These scores provide a quantitative baseline for assessing interpretability in medical VLMs. All codes, prompt and data to be released on acceptance. Ke

</details>


### [193] [Efficient KernelSHAP Explanations for Patch-based 3D Medical Image Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11775)
*Ricardo Coimbra Brioso,Giulio Sichili,Damiano Dei,Nicola Lambri,Pietro Mancosu,Marta Scorsetti,Daniele Loiacono*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出用于3D CT分割的高效KernelSHAP框架，通过感兴趣区域限制、补丁logit缓存和特征抽象实现快速且临床可解释的归因分析


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基于扰动的可解释性方法（如KernelSHAP）在基于补丁的3D医学图像分割中计算成本过高，需要大量联盟评估和滑动窗口推理，难以实际应用

Method: 1) 将计算限制在用户定义的感兴趣区域及其感受野支持区域；2) 通过补丁logit缓存加速推理，重用未受影响补丁的基线预测，同时保留nnU-Net的融合方案；3) 比较三种自动生成的特征抽象：整个器官单元、规则FCC超体素和混合器官感知超体素；4) 研究多种聚合/价值函数，针对稳定证据（TP/Dice/Soft Dice）或假阳性行为

Result: 缓存显著减少了冗余计算（计算节省15%-30%）；忠实性和可解释性存在明显权衡：规则超体素通常在基于扰动的指标上表现最佳但缺乏解剖对齐，而器官感知单元产生更具临床可解释性的解释，在归一化指标下特别有效于突出假阳性驱动因素

Conclusion: 提出的高效KernelSHAP框架使3D CT分割的可解释性分析变得实用，通过计算优化和特征抽象策略平衡了计算效率与临床相关性，为医学图像分析提供了更实用的可解释性工具

Abstract: Perturbation-based explainability methods such as KernelSHAP provide model-agnostic attributions but are typically impractical for patch-based 3D medical image segmentation due to the large number of coalition evaluations and the high cost of sliding-window inference. We present an efficient KernelSHAP framework for volumetric CT segmentation that restricts computation to a user-defined region of interest and its receptive-field support, and accelerates inference via patch logit caching, reusing baseline predictions for unaffected patches while preserving nnU-Net's fusion scheme. To enable clinically meaningful attributions, we compare three automatically generated feature abstractions within the receptive-field crop: whole-organ units, regular FCC supervoxels, and hybrid organ-aware supervoxels, and we study multiple aggregation/value functions targeting stabilizing evidence (TP/Dice/Soft Dice) or false-positive behavior. Experiments on whole-body CT segmentations show that caching substantially reduces redundant computation (with computational savings ranging from 15% to 30%) and that faithfulness and interpretability exhibit clear trade-offs: regular supervoxels often maximize perturbation-based metrics but lack anatomical alignment, whereas organ-aware units yield more clinically interpretable explanations and are particularly effective for highlighting false-positive drivers under normalized metrics.

</details>


### [194] [MosaicMRI: A Diverse Dataset and Benchmark for Raw Musculoskeletal MRI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11762)
*Paula Arguello,Berk Tinaz,Mohammad Shahab Sepehri,Maryam Soltanolkotabi,Mahdi Soltanolkotabi*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: MosaicMRI是一个大规模、多样化的开源原始肌肉骨骼MRI数据集，包含2,671个体积和80,156个切片，用于训练和评估基于机器学习的MRI方法，研究模型在不同解剖结构间的可靠性和泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前深度学习在MRI应用中的进展主要受限于以脑部和膝盖为主的公共数据集，导致对这些模型在不同解剖结构下可靠性的研究不足。需要大规模、多样化的肌肉骨骼MRI数据集来推动更全面的模型评估和发展。

Method: 引入MosaicMRI数据集，包含2,671个体积和80,156个切片，涵盖多种解剖结构（脊柱、膝盖、髋部、踝关节等）、成像对比度（PD、T1、T2）、体积方向和采集线圈数量。使用VarNet作为加速重建任务的基线模型，进行模型容量和数据集规模的扩展性实验，并评估跨解剖结构的泛化能力。

Result: 在低样本情况下，组合解剖结构训练的模型显著优于特定解剖结构训练的模型，表明解剖多样性和跨解剖相关性具有可利用价值。研究发现某些身体部位组（如足部和肘部）之间具有良好的泛化能力，性能受训练集大小、解剖结构和协议特定因素共同影响。

Conclusion: MosaicMRI为肌肉骨骼MRI的机器学习研究提供了重要的多样化数据集资源。解剖多样性对模型性能有积极影响，特别是在数据有限的情况下。跨解剖结构的泛化能力存在特定模式，这为未来模型设计和评估提供了重要见解。

Abstract: Deep learning underpins a wide range of applications in MRI, including reconstruction, artifact removal, and segmentation. However, progress has been driven largely by public datasets focused on brain and knee imaging, shaping how models are trained and evaluated. As a result, careful studies of the reliability of these models across diverse anatomical settings remain limited. In this work, we introduce MosaicMRI, a large and diverse collection of fully sampled raw musculoskeletal (MSK) MR measurements designed for training and evaluating machine-learning-based methods. MosaicMRI is the largest open-source raw MSK MRI dataset to date, comprising 2,671 volumes and 80,156 slices. The dataset offers substantial diversity in volume orientation (e.g., axial, sagittal), imaging contrasts (e.g., PD, T1, T2), anatomies (e.g., spine, knee, hip, ankle, and others), and numbers of acquisition coils. Using VarNet as a baseline for accelerated reconstruction task, we perform a comprehensive set of experiments to study scaling behavior with respect to both model capacity and dataset size. Interestingly, models trained on the combined anatomies significantly outperform anatomy-specific models in low-sample regimes, highlighting the benefits of anatomical diversity and the presence of exploitable cross-anatomical correlations. We further evaluate robustness and cross-anatomy generalization by training models on one anatomy (e.g., spine) and testing them on another (e.g., knee). Notably, we identify groups of body parts (e.g., foot and elbow) that generalize well with each other, and highlight that performance under domain shifts depends on both training set size, anatomy, and protocol-specific factors.

</details>


### [195] [Learning Long-term Motion Embeddings for Efficient Kinematics Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11737)
*Nick Stracke,Kolja Bauer,Stefan Andreas Baumann,Miguel Angel Bautista,Josh Susskind,Björn Ommer*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出一种高效的运动建模方法，通过从跟踪器模型获取的大规模轨迹学习长期运动嵌入，实现比视频合成更高效的多未来运动生成


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然现代视频模型对场景动态有很强的理解能力，但通过完整视频合成探索多种可能未来仍然效率低下。需要一种更高效的方式来建模场景动态并生成符合文本提示或空间交互目标的运动

Method: 首先从跟踪器模型获取的大规模轨迹中学习高度压缩的运动嵌入（时间压缩因子64倍），然后在该空间训练条件流匹配模型，根据任务描述生成运动潜在表示

Result: 该方法生成的运动分布优于最先进的视频模型和专门的任务特定方法，能够高效生成长且真实的运动，满足文本提示或空间交互指定的目标

Conclusion: 通过直接操作从大规模轨迹学习的长期运动嵌入，实现了比视频合成更高效的运动建模，为视觉智能中的运动理解和预测提供了新的高效解决方案

Abstract: Understanding and predicting motion is a fundamental component of visual intelligence. Although modern video models exhibit strong comprehension of scene dynamics, exploring multiple possible futures through full video synthesis remains prohibitively inefficient. We model scene dynamics orders of magnitude more efficiently by directly operating on a long-term motion embedding that is learned from large-scale trajectories obtained from tracker models. This enables efficient generation of long, realistic motions that fulfill goals specified via text prompts or spatial pokes. To achieve this, we first learn a highly compressed motion embedding with a temporal compression factor of 64x. In this space, we train a conditional flow-matching model to generate motion latents conditioned on task descriptions. The resulting motion distributions outperform those of both state-of-the-art video models and specialized task-specific approaches.

</details>


### [196] [Ambivalence/Hesitancy Recognition in Videos for Personalized Digital Health Interventions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11730)
*Manuela González-González,Soufiane Belharbi,Muhammad Osama Zeeshan,Masoumeh Sharafi,Muhammad Haseeb Aslam,Lorenzo Sia,Nicolas Richet,Marco Pedersoli,Alessandro Lameiras Koerich,Simon L Bacon,Eric Granger*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文探索了使用深度学习模型识别视频中的矛盾犹豫情绪，以提升数字健康干预的个性化和成本效益。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 矛盾犹豫情绪在健康干预中起关键作用，但专家识别成本高且难以规模化。自动识别对于数字健康干预的个性化和成本效益至关重要。

Method: 使用深度学习模型进行视频中的矛盾犹豫识别，涵盖三种学习设置：监督学习、无监督域适应用于个性化、以及通过大语言模型进行零样本推理。

Result: 在BAH视频数据集上的实验结果显示性能有限，表明需要更适配的多模态模型来准确识别矛盾犹豫情绪。

Conclusion: 需要更好的时空建模和多模态融合方法来利用模态内/跨模态的冲突，以实现准确的矛盾犹豫识别。

Abstract: Using behavioural science, health interventions focus on behaviour change by providing a framework to help patients acquire and maintain healthy habits that improve medical outcomes. In-person interventions are costly and difficult to scale, especially in resource-limited regions. Digital health interventions offer a cost-effective approach, potentially supporting independent living and self-management. Automating such interventions, especially through machine learning, has gained considerable attention recently. Ambivalence and hesitancy (A/H) play a primary role for individuals to delay, avoid, or abandon health interventions. A/H are subtle and conflicting emotions that place a person in a state between positive and negative evaluations of a behaviour, or between acceptance and refusal to engage in it. They manifest as affective inconsistency across modalities or within a modality, such as language, facial, vocal expressions, and body language. While experts can be trained to recognize A/H, integrating them into digital health interventions is costly and less effective. Automatic A/H recognition is therefore critical for the personalization and cost-effectiveness of digital health interventions. Here, we explore the application of deep learning models for A/H recognition in videos, a multi-modal task by nature. In particular, this paper covers three learning setups: supervised learning, unsupervised domain adaptation for personalization, and zero-shot inference via large language models (LLMs). Our experiments are conducted on the unique and recently published BAH video dataset for A/H recognition. Our results show limited performance, suggesting that more adapted multi-modal models are required for accurate A/H recognition. Better methods for modeling spatio-temporal and multimodal fusion are necessary to leverage conflicts within/across modalities.

</details>


### [197] [BEM: Training-Free Background Embedding Memory for False-Positive Suppression in Real-Time Fixed-Background Camera](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11714)
*Junwoo Park,Jangho Lee,Sunho Lim*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为背景嵌入记忆（BEM）的训练无关模块，可附加到预训练检测器上，利用固定摄像头环境的准静态背景先验来抑制误检，在保持实时性能的同时减少假阳性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 预训练检测器在基准测试上表现良好，但在实际部署中由于训练数据与目标环境之间的分布差异而性能下降。COCO类基准强调类别多样性而非实例密度，导致在密集单类或少类场景（如监控和交通监测）中表现不佳。固定摄像头环境中的准静态背景提供了稳定的无标签先验，可在推理时利用来抑制虚假检测。

Method: 提出背景嵌入记忆（BEM）模块：1）估计干净背景嵌入；2）维护原型记忆；3）使用逆相似度、秩加权惩罚重新评分检测logits。该模块轻量、训练无关、权重冻结，可在推理时附加到预训练检测器上。

Result: 在YOLO和RT-DETR系列模型上，在LLVIP和模拟监控流数据集上，BEM一致减少假阳性同时保持召回率和实时性能。背景帧余弦相似度与物体数量负相关，与精确度-置信度AUC正相关，验证了其作为训练无关控制信号的有效性。

Conclusion: BEM是一种有效的训练无关解决方案，利用固定摄像头环境的背景先验来提升预训练检测器在密集单类/少类场景中的性能，减少假阳性同时保持实时推理能力。

Abstract: Pretrained detectors perform well on benchmarks but often suffer performance degradation in real-world deployments due to distribution gaps between training data and target environments. COCO-like benchmarks emphasize category diversity rather than instance density, causing detectors trained under per-class sparsity to struggle in dense, single- or few-class scenes such as surveillance and traffic monitoring. In fixed-camera environments, the quasi-static background provides a stable, label-free prior that can be exploited at inference to suppress spurious detections. To address the issue, we propose Background Embedding Memory (BEM), a lightweight, training-free, weight-frozen module that can be attached to pretrained detectors during inference. BEM estimates clean background embeddings, maintains a prototype memory, and re-scores detection logits with an inverse-similarity, rank-weighted penalty, effectively reducing false positives while maintaining recall. Empirically, background-frame cosine similarity correlates negatively with object count and positively with Precision-Confidence AUC (P-AUC), motivating its use as a training-free control signal. Across YOLO and RT-DETR families on LLVIP and simulated surveillance streams, BEM consistently reduces false positives while preserving real-time performance. Our code is available at https://github.com/Leo-Park1214/Background-Embedding-Memory.git

</details>


### [198] [MoRight: Motion Control Done Right](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07348)
*Shaowei Liu,Xuanchi Ren,Tianchang Shen,Huan Ling,Saurabh Gupta,Shenlong Wang,Sanja Fidler,Jun Gao*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: MoRight：通过解耦运动建模实现运动控制视频生成的统一框架，支持分离控制物体运动和相机视角，并学习主动-被动运动因果关系


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法存在两个主要问题：1）将相机运动和物体运动纠缠在单一跟踪信号中，无法分离控制；2）将运动视为运动学位移，未建模物体间的因果关系。需要同时解决解耦运动控制和运动因果关系的挑战。

Method: 提出MoRight统一框架：1）在静态规范视图中指定物体运动，通过时序跨视图注意力转移到任意目标相机视角，实现相机和物体运动的解耦控制；2）将运动分解为主动（用户驱动）和被动（后果）组件，从数据中学习运动因果关系；3）支持前向推理（给定主动运动预测后果）和逆向推理（指定被动结果恢复驱动动作）。

Result: 在三个基准测试上展示了最先进的性能，包括生成质量、运动可控性和交互感知能力。

Conclusion: MoRight通过解耦运动建模解决了现有方法的局限性，实现了分离的相机-物体控制和物理合理的运动因果关系，为用户提供了灵活的运动控制视频生成能力。

Abstract: Generating motion-controlled videos--where user-specified actions drive physically plausible scene dynamics under freely chosen viewpoints--demands two capabilities: (1) disentangled motion control, allowing users to separately control the object motion and adjust camera viewpoint; and (2) motion causality, ensuring that user-driven actions trigger coherent reactions from other objects rather than merely displacing pixels. Existing methods fall short on both fronts: they entangle camera and object motion into a single tracking signal and treat motion as kinematic displacement without modeling causal relationships between object motion. We introduce MoRight, a unified framework that addresses both limitations through disentangled motion modeling. Object motion is specified in a canonical static-view and transferred to an arbitrary target camera viewpoint via temporal cross-view attention, enabling disentangled camera and object control. We further decompose motion into active (user-driven) and passive (consequence) components, training the model to learn motion causality from data. At inference, users can either supply active motion and MoRight predicts consequences (forward reasoning), or specify desired passive outcomes and MoRight recovers plausible driving actions (inverse reasoning), all while freely adjusting the camera viewpoint. Experiments on three benchmarks demonstrate state-of-the-art performance in generation quality, motion controllability, and interaction awareness.

</details>


### [199] [Seeing Through the Tool: A Controlled Benchmark for Occlusion Robustness in Foundation Segmentation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11711)
*Nhan Ho,Luu Le,Thanh-Huy Nguyen,Thien Nguyen,Xiaofeng Liu,Ulas Bagci*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了OccSAM-Bench基准测试，用于系统评估SAM系列模型在手术内窥镜遮挡场景下的分割性能，揭示了两种不同的模型类型及其临床意义。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 遮挡（手术器械或重叠组织部分遮挡目标结构）是临床内窥镜中基础分割模型面临的关键但未充分探索的挑战，需要系统评估模型在遮挡条件下的性能。

Method: 引入OccSAM-Bench基准测试，模拟两种遮挡类型（手术工具覆盖和切除）在三个校准严重程度级别上，应用于三个公共息肉数据集；提出新颖的三区域评估协议，将分割性能分解为完整目标、仅可见目标和不可见目标。

Result: 揭示了两种不同的模型原型：遮挡感知模型（SAM、SAM 2、SAM 3、MedSAM3）优先考虑可见组织划分并拒绝器械；遮挡不可知模型（MedSAM、MedSAM2）自信地预测到遮挡区域；SAM-Med2D与两者都不符且在所有条件下表现不佳。

Conclusion: 遮挡鲁棒性在不同架构中并不统一，模型选择必须由特定临床意图驱动——无论是优先考虑保守的可见组织分割，还是隐藏解剖结构的模态推断。

Abstract: Occlusion, where target structures are partially hidden by surgical instruments or overlapping tissues, remains a critical yet underexplored challenge for foundation segmentation models in clinical endoscopy. We introduce OccSAM-Bench, a benchmark designed to systematically evaluate SAM-family models under controlled, synthesized surgical occlusion. Our framework simulates two occlusion types (i.e., surgical tool overlay and cutout) across three calibrated severity levels on three public polyp datasets. We propose a novel three-region evaluation protocol that decomposes segmentation performance into full, visible-only, and invisible targets. This metric exposes behaviors that standard amodal evaluation obscures, revealing two distinct model archetypes: Occluder-Aware models (SAM, SAM 2, SAM 3, MedSAM3), which prioritize visible tissue delineation and reject instruments, and Occluder-Agnostic models (MedSAM, MedSAM2), which confidently predict into occluded regions. SAM-Med2D aligns with neither and underperforms across all conditions. Ultimately, our results demonstrate that occlusion robustness is not uniform across architectures, and model selection must be driven by specific clinical intent-whether prioritizing conservative visible-tissue segmentation or the amodal inference of hidden anatomy.

</details>


### [200] [Representations Before Pixels: Semantics-Guided Hierarchical Video Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11707)
*Efstathios Karypidis,Spyros Gidaris,Nikos Komodakis*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Re2Pix：一种分层视频预测框架，通过先预测语义表示再指导视觉合成来提升自动驾驶等复杂动态环境中的视频预测质量


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 准确的未来视频预测需要高视觉保真度和一致的场景语义，特别是在自动驾驶等复杂动态环境中。现有方法难以同时保证这两方面，因此需要一种能有效分解预测任务的方法。

Method: 提出Re2Pix分层框架：1）第一阶段在冻结视觉基础模型的特征空间中预测未来场景结构（语义表示）；2）第二阶段以预测的表示为条件，使用潜在扩散模型渲染逼真帧。采用嵌套dropout和混合监督策略解决训练-测试不匹配问题。

Result: 在具有挑战性的驾驶基准测试中，Re2Pix相比强扩散基线显著提升了时间语义一致性、感知质量和训练效率。

Conclusion: 语义优先的设计通过将预测分解为语义表示预测和表示引导的视觉合成两个阶段，有效提升了复杂动态环境中视频预测的质量和一致性。

Abstract: Accurate future video prediction requires both high visual fidelity and consistent scene semantics, particularly in complex dynamic environments such as autonomous driving. We present Re2Pix, a hierarchical video prediction framework that decomposes forecasting into two stages: semantic representation prediction and representation-guided visual synthesis. Instead of directly predicting future RGB frames, our approach first forecasts future scene structure in the feature space of a frozen vision foundation model, and then conditions a latent diffusion model on these predicted representations to render photorealistic frames. This decomposition enables the model to focus first on scene dynamics and then on appearance generation. A key challenge arises from the train-test mismatch between ground-truth representations available during training and predicted ones used at inference. To address this, we introduce two conditioning strategies, nested dropout and mixed supervision, that improve robustness to imperfect autoregressive predictions. Experiments on challenging driving benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed semantics-first design significantly improves temporal semantic consistency, perceptual quality, and training efficiency compared to strong diffusion baselines. We provide the implementation code at https://github.com/Sta8is/Re2Pix

</details>


### [201] [Unfolding 3D Gaussian Splatting via Iterative Gaussian Synopsis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11685)
*Yuqin Lu,Yang Zhou,Yihua Dai,Guiqing Li,Shengfeng He*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出Iterative Gaussian Synopsis框架，通过自上而下的"展开"方案实现紧凑渐进式渲染，解决3DGS存储需求大和无结构表示的问题，在保持视觉质量的同时显著减少存储。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 3D高斯泼溅(3DGS)已成为实时高保真新视角合成的先进框架，但其巨大的存储需求和固有的非结构化表示给流媒体和资源受限环境中的部署带来了挑战。现有的细节层次(LOD)策略，特别是基于自底向上构建的方法，经常引入冗余或导致保真度下降。

Method: 提出Iterative Gaussian Synopsis框架，采用自上而下的"展开"方案。从全分辨率3DGS模型开始，使用自适应、可学习的基于掩码的剪枝机制迭代推导出更粗糙的LOD。构建多级层次结构，集成层次空间网格（捕获全局场景结构）和共享锚点码本（建模局部细节），生成紧凑而富有表现力的特征表示。

Result: 实验表明，该方法在所有LOD级别上保持高渲染质量，同时实现显著的存储减少。展开机制促进层间可重用性，仅需最小数据开销即可实现渐进式细化。

Conclusion: 该方法展示了在带宽和内存受限场景中实现实时3DGS渲染的实用性和可扩展性，为资源受限环境中的高效3D表示提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has become a state-of-the-art framework for real-time, high-fidelity novel view synthesis. However, its substantial storage requirements and inherently unstructured representation pose challenges for deployment in streaming and resource-constrained environments. Existing Level-of-Detail (LOD) strategies, particularly those based on bottom-up construction, often introduce redundancy or lead to fidelity degradation. To overcome these limitations, we propose Iterative Gaussian Synopsis, a novel framework for compact and progressive rendering through a top-down "unfolding" scheme. Our approach begins with a full-resolution 3DGS model and iteratively derives coarser LODs using an adaptive, learnable mask-based pruning mechanism. This process constructs a multi-level hierarchy that preserves visual quality while improving efficiency. We integrate hierarchical spatial grids, which capture the global scene structure, with a shared Anchor Codebook that models localized details. This combination produces a compact yet expressive feature representation, designed to minimize redundancy and support efficient, level-specific adaptation. The unfolding mechanism promotes inter-layer reusability and requires only minimal data overhead for progressive refinement. Experiments show that our method maintains high rendering quality across all LODs while achieving substantial storage reduction. These results demonstrate the practicality and scalability of our approach for real-time 3DGS rendering in bandwidth- and memory-constrained scenarios.

</details>


### [202] [Towards Brain MRI Foundation Models for the Clinic: Findings from the FOMO25 Challenge](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11679)
*Asbjørn Munk,Stefano Cerri,Vardan Nersesjan,Christian Hedeager Krag,Jakob Ambsdorf,Pablo Rocamora García,Julia Machnio,Peirong Liu,Suhyun Ahn,Nasrin Akbari,Yasmina Al Khalil,Kimberly Amador,Sina Amirrajab,Tal Arbel,Meritxell Bach Cuadra,Ujjwal Baid,Bhakti Baheti,Jaume Banus,Kamil Barbierik,Christoph Brune,Yansong Bu,Baptiste Callard,Yuhan Chen,Cornelius Crijnen,Corentin Dancette,Peter Drotar,Prasad Dutande,Nils D. Forkert,Saurabh Garg,Jakub Gazda,Matej Gazda,Benoît Gérin,Partha Ghosh,Weikang Gong,Pedro M. Gordaliza,Sam Hashemi,Tobias Heimann,Fucang Jia,Jiexin Jiang,Emily Kaczmarek,Chris Kang,Seung Kwan Kang,Mohammad Khazaei,Julien Khlaut,Petros Koutsouvelis,Jae Sung Lee,Yuchong Li,Mengye Lyu,Mingchen Ma,Anant Madabhushi,Klaus H. Maier-Hein,Pierre Manceron,Andrés Martínez Mora,Moona Mazher,Felix Meister,Nataliia Molchanova,Steven A. Niederer,Leonard Nürnberg,Jinah Park,Abdul Qayyum,Jonas Richiardi,Antoine Saporta,Branislav Setlak,Ning Shen,Justin Szeto,Constantin Ulrich,Puru Vaish,Vibujithan Vigneshwaran,Leroy Volmer,Zihao Wang,Siqi Wei,Anthony Winder,Jelmer M. Wolterink,Maxence Wynen,Chang Yang,Si Young Yie,Mostafa Mehdipour Ghazi,Akshay Pai,Espen Jimenez Solem,Sebastian Nørgaard Llambias,Mikael Boesen,Michael Eriksen Benros,Juan Eugenio Iglesias,Mads Nielsen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: FOMO25挑战赛评估了脑MRI基础模型在临床数据上的泛化能力，发现自监督预训练能提升域外泛化性能，不同预训练目标适用于不同任务，而模型规模和训练时长的扩展并未带来可靠收益。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 临床脑MRI分析面临数据异质性和标注成本高的挑战。自监督学习可利用大量无标签临床数据训练基础模型，但现有脑MRI基础模型受限于小规模预训练数据集和高质量研究数据的评估，缺乏在临床工作流数据上的系统性评估。

Method: 组织FOMO25挑战赛，提供大规模预训练数据集FOMO60K，在少样本和域外设置下评估模型。任务包括梗死分类、脑膜瘤分割和脑年龄回归，设置方法赛道（仅使用FOMO60K）和开放赛道（可使用任意数据）。使用标准化容器化流水线评估19个基础模型。

Result: 自监督预训练能提升临床数据在域偏移下的泛化能力，最强模型在域外训练的表现超过域内训练的监督基线；不同预训练目标适用于不同任务：MAE适合分割，混合重建-对比目标适合分类；小型预训练模型表现优异，扩大模型规模和训练时长未带来可靠收益。

Conclusion: 自监督预训练是构建临床脑MRI分析基础模型的有效方法，但需要根据具体任务选择合适的预训练目标，且模型效率比单纯扩大规模更重要。挑战赛为脑MRI基础模型的临床部署提供了重要基准。

Abstract: Clinical deployment of automated brain MRI analysis faces a fundamental challenge: clinical data is heterogeneous and noisy, and high-quality labels are prohibitively costly to obtain. Self-supervised learning (SSL) can address this by leveraging the vast amounts of unlabeled data produced in clinical workflows to train robust \textit{foundation models} that adapt out-of-domain with minimal supervision. However, the development of foundation models for brain MRI has been limited by small pretraining datasets and in-domain benchmarking focused on high-quality, research-grade data. To address this gap, we organized the FOMO25 challenge as a satellite event at MICCAI 2025. FOMO25 provided participants with a large pretraining dataset, FOMO60K, and evaluated models on data sourced directly from clinical workflows in few-shot and out-of-domain settings. Tasks covered infarct classification, meningioma segmentation, and brain age regression, and considered both models trained on FOMO60K (method track) and any data (open track). Nineteen foundation models from sixteen teams were evaluated using a standardized containerized pipeline. Results show that (a) self-supervised pretraining improves generalization on clinical data under domain shift, with the strongest models trained \textit{out-of-domain} surpassing supervised baselines trained \textit{in-domain}. (b) No single pretraining objective benefits all tasks: MAE favors segmentation, hybrid reconstruction-contrastive objectives favor classification, and (c) strong performance was achieved by small pretrained models, and improvements from scaling model size and training duration did not yield reliable benefits.

</details>


### [203] [UNIGEOCLIP: Unified Geospatial Contrastive Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11668)
*Guillaume Astruc,Eduard Trulls,Jan Hosang,Loic Landrieu,Paul-Edouard Sarlin*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: UNIGEOCLIP是一个大规模多模态对比学习框架，将五种地理空间模态（航空影像、街景、高程模型、文本和地理坐标）对齐到统一的嵌入空间中，通过全对全对比对齐实现跨模态检索和推理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着共址地理空间数据的日益丰富（包括航空影像、街景、高程模型、文本和地理坐标），这些多模态数据为表示学习提供了独特机会。现有方法要么融合模态，要么依赖中心枢纽表示，缺乏对所有模态的直接对齐能力。

Method: 提出UNIGEOCLIP框架，采用全对全对比对齐方法，将五种地理空间模态直接对齐到统一嵌入空间。同时引入缩放经纬度编码器，通过捕获多尺度地理结构来改进空间表示。

Result: 在多个下游地理空间任务上的广泛实验表明，UNIGEOCLIP持续优于单模态对比模型和仅坐标基线，证明了整体多模态地理空间对齐的优势。

Conclusion: UNIGEOCLIP通过大规模多模态对比学习成功实现了五种地理空间模态的统一对齐，为跨模态检索和推理提供了有效框架，其参考实现已开源。

Abstract: The growing availability of co-located geospatial data spanning aerial imagery, street-level views, elevation models, text, and geographic coordinates offers a unique opportunity for multimodal representation learning. We introduce UNIGEOCLIP, a massively multimodal contrastive framework to jointly align five complementary geospatial modalities in a single unified embedding space. Unlike prior approaches that fuse modalities or rely on a central pivot representation, our method performs all-to-all contrastive alignment, enabling seamless comparison, retrieval, and reasoning across arbitrary combinations of modalities. We further propose a scaled latitude-longitude encoder that improves spatial representation by capturing multi-scale geographic structure. Extensive experiments across downstream geospatial tasks demonstrate that UNIGEOCLIP consistently outperforms single-modality contrastive models and coordinate-only baselines, highlighting the benefits of holistic multimodal geospatial alignment. A reference implementation is available at https://gastruc.github.io/unigeoclip.

</details>


### [204] [GazeVaLM: A Multi-Observer Eye-Tracking Benchmark for Evaluating Clinical Realism in AI-Generated X-Rays](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11653)
*David Wong,Zeynep Isik,Bin Wang,Marouane Tliba,Gorkem Durak,Elif Keles,Halil Ertugrul Aktas,Aladine Chetouani,Cagdas Topel,Nicolo Gennaro,Camila Lopes Vendrami,Tugce Agirlar Trabzonlu,Amir Ali Rahsepar,Laetitia Perronne,Matthew Antalek,Onural Ozturk,Gokcan Okur,Andrew C. Gordon,Ayis Pyrros,Frank H. Miller,Amir Borhani,Hatice Savas,Eric Hart,Elizabeth Krupinski,Ulas Bagci*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: GazeVaLM是一个公开的眼动追踪数据集，包含16位放射科专家解读30张真实和30张AI生成胸片时的960条眼动记录，支持诊断评估和真伪分类任务，并提供多模态LLM的预测结果用于人机对比。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 创建首个结合眼动追踪数据、临床标签和AI模型预测的公开数据集，用于研究临床感知、人机对比、生成图像真实性评估和不确定性量化，促进放射科专家与AI系统在医学图像解读方面的比较研究。

Method: 收集16位放射科专家对30张真实和30张AI生成胸片的眼动数据，包括原始注视样本、注视点图、扫描路径、显著性密度图等；扩展实验到6个先进多模态LLM，获取其诊断预测、真实性判断和置信度分数；提供结构化诊断标签和真实性判断。

Result: 发布包含960条眼动记录的综合数据集，提供专家与AI在诊断准确性和真实性检测方面的基准比较，支持注视一致性、观察者间一致性等分析，数据集已在HuggingFace平台公开可用。

Conclusion: GazeVaLM数据集为注视建模、临床决策、人机对比、生成图像真实性评估和不确定性量化研究提供了重要资源，通过联合发布视觉注意数据、临床标签和模型预测，促进了专家与AI系统在医学图像感知、解释和评估方面的可重复研究。

Abstract: We introduce GazeVaLM, a public eye-tracking dataset for studying clinical perception during chest radiograph authenticity assessment. The dataset comprises 960 gaze recordings from 16 expert radiologists interpreting 30 real and 30 synthetic chest X-rays (generated by diffusion based generative AI) under two conditions: diagnostic assessment and real-fake classification (Visual Turing test). For each image-observer pair, we provide raw gaze samples, fixation maps, scanpaths, saliency density maps, structured diagnostic labels, and authenticity judgments. We extend the protocol to 6 state-of-the-art multimodal LLMs, releasing their predicted diagnoses, authenticity labels, and confidence scores under matched conditions - enabling direct human-AI comparison at both decision and uncertainty levels. We further provide analyses of gaze agreement, inter-observer consistency, and benchmarking of radiologists versus LLMs in diagnostic accuracy and authenticity detection. GazeVaLM supports research in gaze modeling, clinical decision-making, human-AI comparison, generative image realism assessment, and uncertainty quantification. By jointly releasing visual attention data, clinical labels, and model predictions, we aim to facilitate reproducible research on how experts and AI systems perceive, interpret, and evaluate medical images. The dataset is available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/davidcwong/GazeVaLM.

</details>


### [205] [STS-Mixer: Spatio-Temporal-Spectral Mixer for 4D Point Cloud Video Understanding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11637)
*Wenhao Li,Xueying Jiang,Gongjie Zhang,Xiaoqin Zhang,Ling Shao,Shijian Lu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: STS-Mixer：一种从谱域视角处理4D点云视频的统一框架，通过混合空间、时间和谱表示来捕捉丰富的几何结构和时间动态


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法主要在时空域处理4D点云视频，难以捕捉底层几何特征，导致表示学习和理解能力下降。需要从互补的谱域视角解决这一挑战。

Method: 将4D点云视频转换为图谱信号，分解为多个频带（低频捕捉粗粒度形状，高频编码细粒度几何细节）。设计Spatio-Temporal-Spectral Mixer (STS-Mixer)框架，混合空间、时间和谱表示，集成多频带谱信号与时空信息。

Result: 在多个广泛采用的基准测试中，STS-Mixer在3D动作识别和4D语义分割任务上均取得优越性能。

Conclusion: 从谱域视角分析4D点云视频能有效捕捉几何特征，STS-Mixer通过混合空间、时间和谱表示实现了对4D点云视频的细粒度和整体理解。

Abstract: 4D point cloud videos capture rich spatial and temporal dynamics of scenes which possess unique values in various 4D understanding tasks. However, most existing methods work in the spatiotemporal domain where the underlying geometric characteristics of 4D point cloud videos are hard to capture, leading to degraded representation learning and understanding of 4D point cloud videos. We address the above challenge from a complementary spectral perspective. By transforming 4D point cloud videos into graph spectral signals, we can decompose them into multiple frequency bands each of which captures distinct geometric structures of point cloud videos. Our spectral analysis reveals that the decomposed low-frequency signals capture more coarse shapes while high-frequency signals encode more fine-grained geometry details. Building on these observations, we design Spatio-Temporal-Spectral Mixer (STS-Mixer), a unified framework that mixes spatial, temporal, and spectral representations of point cloud videos. STS-Mixer integrates multi-band delineated spectral signals with spatiotemporal information to capture rich geometries and temporal dynamics, while enabling fine-grained and holistic understanding of 4D point cloud videos. Extensive experiments show that STS-Mixer achieves superior performance consistently across multiple widely adopted benchmarks on both 3D action recognition and 4D semantic segmentation tasks. Code and models are available at https://github.com/Vegetebird/STS-Mixer.

</details>


### [206] [POINTS-Long: Adaptive Dual-Mode Visual Reasoning in MLLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11627)
*Haicheng Wang,Yuan Liu,Yikun Liu,Zhemeng Yu,Zhongyin Zhao,Yangxiu You,Zilin Yu,Le Tian,Xiao Zhou,Jie Zhou,Weidi Xie,Yanfeng Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: POINTS-Long是一种原生双模态多模态大语言模型，采用动态视觉令牌缩放机制，支持焦点模式和待机模式，在长视频和流式场景中显著减少视觉令牌数量同时保持高精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多模态大语言模型在跨模态理解和生成方面表现出色，但视觉令牌序列的快速增长（特别是在长视频和流式场景中）对其可扩展性和实际部署构成了重大挑战。

Method: 提出POINTS-Long模型，受人类视觉系统启发，采用动态视觉令牌缩放机制。模型支持两种互补的感知模式：焦点模式（保持最佳性能）和待机模式（大幅减少令牌）。通过动态可分离的KV缓存设计原生支持流式视觉理解。

Result: 在细粒度视觉任务上，焦点模式保持最佳性能；在长形式通用视觉理解任务上，待机模式仅使用1/40-1/10的视觉令牌即可保持97.7-99.7%的原始准确率。模型能够高效维护超长视觉记忆。

Conclusion: 该工作为未来多模态大语言模型的设计提供了新见解，为自适应和高效的长形式视觉理解奠定了基础。

Abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have recently demonstrated remarkable capabilities in cross-modal understanding and generation. However, the rapid growth of visual token sequences--especially in long-video and streaming scenarios--poses a major challenge to their scalability and real-world deployment. Thus, we introduce POINTS-Long, a native dual-mode MLLM featuring dynamic visual token scaling inspired by the human visual system. The model supports two complementary perception modes: focus mode and standby mode, enabling users to dynamically trade off efficiency and accuracy during inference. On fine-grained visual tasks, the focus mode retains the optimal performance, while on long-form general visual understanding, the standby mode retains 97.7-99.7% of the original accuracy using only 1/40-1/10th of the visual tokens. Moreover, POINTS-Long natively supports streaming visual understanding via a dynamically detachable KV-cache design, allowing efficient maintenance of ultra-long visual memory. Our work provides new insights into the design of future MLLMs and lays the foundation for adaptive and efficient long-form visual understanding.

</details>


### [207] [Geoparsing: Diagram Parsing for Plane and Solid Geometry with a Unified Formal Language](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11600)
*Peijie Wang,Ming-Liang Zhang,Jun Cao,Chao Deng,Dekang Ran,Hongda Sun,Pi Bu,Xuan Zhang,Yingyao Wang,Jun Song,Bo Zheng,Fei Yin,Cheng-Lin Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出统一形式语言处理平面和立体几何，构建GDP-29K数据集，结合监督微调和强化学习实现几何解析，提升MLLMs几何推理能力


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多模态大语言模型在几何推理方面仍有困难，特别是对细粒度视觉元素的感知瓶颈。虽然形式语言已帮助平面几何理解，但需要空间理解的立体几何仍未被充分探索

Method: 设计统一形式语言覆盖平面和立体几何结构与语义关系；构建GDP-29K大规模数据集（2万平面+9千立体几何样本）；提出结合监督微调和基于可验证奖励的强化学习的训练范式

Result: 方法实现了最先进的解析性能；解析出的形式描述作为关键认知支架，显著提升了MLLMs在下游几何推理任务中的能力

Conclusion: 统一形式语言和提出的训练范式有效解决了MLLMs在几何推理中的感知瓶颈，为几何理解提供了系统化解决方案，数据与代码已开源

Abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable progress but continue to struggle with geometric reasoning, primarily due to the perception bottleneck regarding fine-grained visual elements. While formal languages have aided plane geometry understanding, solid geometry which requires spatial understanding remains largely unexplored. In this paper, we address this challenge by designing a unified formal language that integrates plane and solid geometry, comprehensively covering geometric structures and semantic relations. We construct GDP-29K, a large-scale dataset comprising 20k plane and 9k solid geometry samples collected from diverse real-world sources, each paired with its ground-truth formal description. To ensure syntactic correctness and geometric consistency, we propose a training paradigm that combines Supervised Fine-Tuning with Reinforcement Learning via Verifiable Rewards. Experiments show that our approach achieves state-of-the-art parsing performance. Furthermore, we demonstrate that our parsed formal descriptions serve as a critical cognitive scaffold, significantly boosting MLLMs' capabilities for downstream geometry reasoning tasks. Our data and code are available at Geoparsing.

</details>


### [208] [MLLM-as-a-Judge Exhibits Model Preference Bias](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11589)
*Shuitsu Koyama,Yuiga Wada,Daichi Yashima,Komei Sugiura*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Philautia-Eval方法量化了MLLM-as-a-Judge评估中的模型特定偏好偏差，发现代表性MLLMs存在自偏好偏差和模型家族间的相互偏好偏差，并提出Pomms集成方法有效缓解了这种偏差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: MLLM-as-a-Judge评估方法如果存在偏差，会扭曲模型比较和基准驱动的科学进展，但目前尚不清楚这些方法在多大程度上偏向或歧视特定MLLM生成的文本。

Method: 提出Philautia-Eval方法，通过解耦偏好倾向与生成质量差异来量化模型特定偏好偏差。收集了12个MLLM的129万条字幕-评分对进行分析，并引入简单的MLLM集成方法Pomms。

Result: 发现代表性MLLMs倾向于表现出自偏好偏差；实验结果表明特定模型家族间存在相互偏好偏差，这可能由重用连接器和重叠的指令调优资源驱动；Pomms集成方法有效缓解了模型特定偏好偏差，同时保持了性能。

Conclusion: MLLM-as-a-Judge评估存在显著的模型特定偏好偏差，这种偏差会扭曲模型比较结果。提出的Philautia-Eval方法能够量化这种偏差，而Pomms集成方法提供了一种有效的缓解策略，有助于更公平的模型评估。

Abstract: Automatic evaluation using multimodal large language models (MLLMs), commonly referred to as MLLM-as-a-Judge, has been widely used to measure model performance. If such MLLM-as-a-Judge methods were biased, they could distort model comparisons and benchmark-driven scientific progress. However, it remains unclear to what extent MLLM-as-a-Judge methods favor or disfavor text generated by specific MLLMs. In this study, we propose Philautia-Eval to investigate such model-specific preference bias. Philautia-Eval quantifies the degree of the bias by disentangling preference tendencies from differences in generation quality. Using 1.29M caption-score pairs collected from 12 MLLMs, we found that representative MLLMs tend to exhibit self-preference bias. Moreover, experimental results indicate mutual preference bias within particular model families, which is potentially driven by reused connectors and overlapping instruction-tuning resources. Finally, we introduce a simple ensemble of MLLMs, Pomms. Our results demonstrated that Pomms effectively mitigated the model-specific preference bias while maintaining performance.

</details>


### [209] [Seeing Through Touch: Tactile-Driven Visual Localization of Material Regions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11579)
*Seongyu Kim,Seungwoo Lee,Hyeonggon Ryu,Joon Son Chung,Arda Senocak*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出一种通过密集跨模态特征交互学习局部视觉-触觉对齐的模型，用于触觉条件材料分割，并引入野外多材料场景图像和材料多样性配对策略来克服数据集限制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉-触觉方法依赖全局对齐，无法捕捉触觉定位所需的细粒度局部对应关系；现有数据集主要为特写、低多样性图像，限制了模型性能。

Method: 提出学习局部视觉-触觉对齐的模型，通过密集跨模态特征交互生成触觉显著性图；引入野外多材料场景图像扩展视觉多样性；采用材料多样性配对策略，将每个触觉样本与视觉多样但触觉一致的图像对齐。

Result: 构建了两个新的触觉基础材料分割数据集用于定量评估；在新基准和现有基准上的实验表明，该方法在触觉定位方面显著优于先前的视觉-触觉方法。

Conclusion: 通过局部对齐和增强数据集多样性，提出的方法在触觉定位任务中取得了显著改进，克服了现有方法的局限性。

Abstract: We address the problem of tactile localization, where the goal is to identify image regions that share the same material properties as a tactile input. Existing visuo-tactile methods rely on global alignment and thus fail to capture the fine-grained local correspondences required for this task. The challenge is amplified by existing datasets, which predominantly contain close-up, low-diversity images. We propose a model that learns local visuo-tactile alignment via dense cross-modal feature interactions, producing tactile saliency maps for touch-conditioned material segmentation. To overcome dataset constraints, we introduce: (i) in-the-wild multi-material scene images that expand visual diversity, and (ii) a material-diversity pairing strategy that aligns each tactile sample with visually varied yet tactilely consistent images, improving contextual localization and robustness to weak signals. We also construct two new tactile-grounded material segmentation datasets for quantitative evaluation. Experiments on both new and existing benchmarks show that our approach substantially outperforms prior visuo-tactile methods in tactile localization.

</details>


### [210] [The Impact of Federated Learning on Distributed Remote Sensing Archives](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11562)
*Anand Umashankar,Karam Tomotaki-Dawoud,Nicolai Schneider*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 系统评估三种联邦学习策略（FedAvg、FedProx、BSP）在非独立同分布遥感图像多标签分类中的性能，分析算法选择、模型容量、客户端参数等对收敛和通信成本的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 遥感数据具有分布式、海量、受主权约束和地理分布的特点，集中式机器学习训练不切实际。联邦学习虽能保持数据本地化，但遥感数据的非独立同分布特性（标签分布随地理区域变化）会降低标准FL算法的收敛性能。

Method: 在UC Merced多标签数据集上，通过控制非独立同分布标签偏斜条件，系统实证研究三种FL策略：FedAvg、FedProx和批量同步并行（BSP）。评估三种深度递增的CNN架构（LeNet、AlexNet、ResNet-34），分析算法选择、模型容量、客户端比例、客户端数量、批次大小和通信成本的联合影响。

Result: 实验表明：1) 在数据异构性下，FedProx在深层架构中优于FedAvg；2) BSP能以高顺序通信成本达到集中式准确率；3) 对于所考虑的数据集规模，LeNet提供了最佳的准确率-通信权衡。

Conclusion: 针对非独立同分布遥感数据，FedProx在深层模型上表现更优，BSP适合对准确率要求高的场景但通信成本高，而浅层模型（如LeNet）在小规模数据集上具有更好的准确率-通信效率平衡，为遥感联邦学习提供了实用指导。

Abstract: Remote sensing archives are inherently distributed: Earth observation missions such as Sentinel-1, Sentinel-2, and Sentinel-3 have collectively accumulated more than 5 petabytes of imagery, stored and processed across many geographically dispersed platforms. Training machine learning models on such data in a centralized fashion is impractical due to data volume, sovereignty constraints, and geographic distribution. Federated learning (FL) addresses this by keeping data local and exchanging only model updates. A central challenge for remote sensing is the non-IID nature of Earth observation data: label distributions vary strongly by geographic region, degrading the convergence of standard FL algorithms. In this paper, we conduct a systematic empirical study of three FL strategies -- FedAvg, FedProx, and bulk synchronous parallel (BSP) -- applied to multi-label remote sensing image classification under controlled non-IID label-skew conditions. We evaluate three convolutional neural network (CNN) architectures of increasing depth (LeNet, AlexNet, and ResNet-34) and analyze the joint effect of algorithm choice, model capacity, client fraction, client count, batch size, and communication cost. Experiments on the UC Merced multi-label dataset show that FedProx outperforms FedAvg for deeper architectures under data heterogeneity, that BSP approaches centralized accuracy at the cost of high sequential communication, and that LeNet provides the best accuracy-communication trade-off for the dataset scale considered.

</details>


### [211] [Progressively Texture-Aware Diffusion for Contrast-Enhanced Sparse-View CT](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11559)
*Tianqi Wang,Wenchao Du,Hongyu Yang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了一种渐进式纹理感知扩散模型（PTD），用于稀疏视图CT重建，通过粗到细的学习框架结合确定性重建模块和条件扩散模块，在保证保真度的同时生成可靠且视觉一致的纹理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管基于扩散的稀疏视图CT成像取得了显著进展，但恢复可靠的图像内容和视觉一致的纹理仍然是一个关键挑战。现有方法在生成稳定性和纹理一致性方面存在不足。

Method: 提出PTD模型，包含两个模块：1）PTD_rec重建模块：学习确定性映射以恢复低频信号（粗内容和平滑纹理），提供初始估计保证保真度；2）PTD_diff条件扩散模块：通过双域引导的条件扩散为粗预测重建高保真细节，生成可靠且一致的纹理。

Result: 在稀疏视图CT重建的广泛实验中，PTD在结构相似性和视觉吸引力方面表现出优越性能，仅需少量采样步骤即可实现，缓解了一般扩散模型固有的随机性，在视觉质量和高频细节保真度之间取得了更好的平衡。

Conclusion: PTD模型通过粗到细的学习框架有效解决了稀疏视图CT重建中纹理恢复的挑战，在保证保真度的同时生成视觉一致的高质量图像，为扩散模型在医学成像中的应用提供了新思路。

Abstract: Diffusion-based sparse-view CT (SVCT) imaging has achieved remarkable advancements in recent years, thanks to its more stable generative capability. However, recovering reliable image content and visually consistent textures is still a crucial challenge. In this paper, we present a Progressively Texture-aware Diffusion (PTD) model, a coarse-to-fine learning framework tailored for SVCT. Specifically, PTD comprises a basic reconstructive module PTD$_{\textit{rec}}$ and a conditional diffusion module PTD$_{\textit{diff}}$. PTD$_{\textit{rec}}$ first learns a deterministic mapping to recover the majority of the underlying low-frequency signals (i.e., coarse content with smoothed textures), which serves as the initial estimation to enable fidelity. Moreover, PTD$_{\textit{diff}}$ aims to reconstruct high-fidelity details for coarse prediction, which explores a dual-domain guided conditional diffusion to generate reliable and consistent textures. Extensive experiments on sparse-view CT reconstruction demonstrate that our PTD achieves superior performance in terms of structure similarity and visual appeal with only a few sampling steps, which mitigates the randomness inherent in general diffusion models and enables a better trade-off between visual quality and fidelity of high-frequency details.

</details>


### [212] [CLAY: Conditional Visual Similarity Modulation in Vision-Language Embedding Space](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11539)
*Sohwi Lim,Lee Hyoseok,Jungjoon Park,Tae-Hyun Oh*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: CLAY是一种无需额外训练的自适应图像相似度计算方法，将预训练视觉语言模型的嵌入空间重构为文本条件相似度空间，实现高效多条件检索。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人类视觉相似性感知具有适应性和主观性，取决于用户兴趣和关注点，但现有图像检索系统使用固定的单一度量标准，无法同时纳入多个条件。

Method: 将预训练视觉语言模型的嵌入空间重构为文本条件相似度空间，分离文本条件处理和视觉特征提取过程，使用固定的视觉嵌入实现高效多条件检索。

Result: 在标准数据集和自建的CLAY-EVAL评估数据集上，CLAY在多种条件检索设置下实现了高检索精度和显著的计算效率提升。

Conclusion: CLAY提供了一种无需额外训练的自适应相似度计算方法，能够有效处理多条件图像检索任务，在精度和效率方面优于先前方法。

Abstract: Human perception of visual similarity is inherently adaptive and subjective, depending on the users' interests and focus. However, most image retrieval systems fail to reflect this flexibility, relying on a fixed, monolithic metric that cannot incorporate multiple conditions simultaneously. To address this, we propose CLAY, an adaptive similarity computation method that reframes the embedding space of pretrained Vision-Language Models (VLMs) as a text-conditional similarity space without additional training. This design separates the textual conditioning process and visual feature extraction, allowing highly efficient and multi-conditioned retrieval with fixed visual embeddings. We also construct a synthetic evaluation dataset CLAY-EVAL, for comprehensive assessment under diverse conditioned retrieval settings. Experiments on standard datasets and our proposed dataset show that CLAY achieves high retrieval accuracy and notable computational efficiency compared to previous works.

</details>


### [213] [SVD-Prune: Training-Free Token Pruning For Efficient Vision-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11530)
*Yvon Apedo,Martyna Poreba,Michal Szczepanski,Samia Bouchafa*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: SVD-Prune是一种基于奇异值分解的无训练、即插即用视觉令牌剪枝方法，通过统计杠杆分数选择对全局方差贡献最大的令牌，在极端令牌预算下优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视觉语言模型在处理长序列视觉令牌时面临高计算和内存需求。现有基于注意力分数或令牌范数等局部启发式方法存在位置偏差和信息分散问题，在高剪枝率下难以保留关键内容，导致在视觉细节丰富图像上性能下降。

Method: 提出SVD-Prune方法：基于奇异值分解对视觉令牌特征矩阵进行分解，使用统计杠杆分数选择对主导全局方差贡献最大的前K个令牌，实现无训练、即插即用的令牌剪枝。

Result: 实验表明SVD-Prune在极端视觉令牌预算下（32和16个令牌）持续优于现有剪枝方法，即使在极低令牌数下仍能保持强性能。

Conclusion: SVD-Prune通过全局方差分析有效解决了现有令牌剪枝方法的位置偏差和信息分散问题，为视觉语言模型的高效处理提供了有效的训练无关解决方案。

Abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLM) have revolutionized multimodal learning by jointly processing visual and textual information. Yet, they face significant challenges due to the high computational and memory demands of processing long sequences of vision tokens. Many existing methods rely on local heuristics, such as attention scores or token norms. However, these criteria suffer from positional bias and information dispersion, limiting their ability to preserve essential content at high pruning ratios and leading to performance degradation on visually detailed images. To address these issues, we propose SVD-Prune, a trainingfree, plug-and-play token pruning method based on Singular Value Decomposition. It decomposes the vision token feature matrix and selects the top-K tokens using statistical leverage scores, ensuring only tokens contributing most to the dominant global variance are preserved. Experiments show that SVD-Prune consistently outperforms prior pruning methods under extreme vision token budgets, maintaining strong performance even with 32 and 16 vision tokens.

</details>


### [214] [VGGT-SLAM++](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06830)
*Avilasha Mandal,Rajesh Kumar,Sudarshan Sunil Harithas,Chetan Arora*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: VGGT-SLAM++是一个完整的视觉SLAM系统，利用VGGT的几何丰富输出，通过融合前端视觉里程计、DEM图构建模块和空间校正后端，实现高精度大规模建图，显著减少短期漂移并保持全局一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 先前基于Transformer的SLAM流水线（如VGGT-SLAM）主要依赖稀疏回环检测或全局Sim(3)流形约束，这会导致短期位姿漂移。需要恢复高频局部束调整来稳定轨迹，同时保持大规模建图的内存效率。

Method: 系统包含三个核心模块：1）前端视觉里程计融合VGGT前馈Transformer和Sim(3)解算；2）基于数字高程图（DEM）的图构建模块，将VGGT子图构建为密集平面规范DEM，分区计算DINOv2嵌入并集成到共视图；3）空间校正后端，在共视图窗口内使用视觉位置识别模块检索空间邻居，触发频繁的局部优化。

Result: 在标准SLAM基准测试中，VGGT-SLAM++实现了最先进的精度，显著减少了短期漂移，加速了图收敛，并通过紧凑的DEM瓦片和次线性检索保持了全局一致性。

Conclusion: VGGT-SLAM++通过恢复高频局部束调整和空间校正后端，有效解决了先前Transformer-based SLAM系统的短期漂移问题，同时通过DEM瓦片和次线性检索实现了大规模建图的内存效率，为视觉SLAM提供了新的解决方案。

Abstract: We introduce VGGT-SLAM++, a complete visual SLAM system that leverages the geometry-rich outputs of the Visual Geometry Grounded Transformer (VGGT). The system comprises a visual odometry (front-end) fusing the VGGT feed-forward transformer and a Sim(3) solution, a Digital Elevation Map (DEM)-based graph construction module, and a back-end that jointly enable accurate large-scale mapping with bounded memory. While prior transformer-based SLAM pipelines such as VGGT-SLAM rely primarily on sparse loop closures or global Sim(3) manifold constraints - allowing short-horizon pose drift - VGGT-SLAM++ restores high-cadence local bundle adjustment (LBA) through a spatially corrective back-end. For each VGGT submap, we construct a dense planar-canonical DEM, partition it into patches, and compute their DINOv2 embeddings to integrate the submap into a covisibility graph. Spatial neighbors are retrieved using a Visual Place Recognition (VPR) module within the covisibility window, triggering frequent local optimization that stabilizes trajectories. Across standard SLAM benchmarks, VGGT-SLAM++ achieves state-of-the-art accuracy, substantially reducing short-term drift, accelerating graph convergence, and maintaining global consistency with compact DEM tiles and sublinear retrieval.

</details>


### [215] [Revisiting Compositionality in Dual-Encoder Vision-Language Models: The Role of Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11496)
*Imanol Miranda,Ander Salaberria,Eneko Agirre,Gorka Azkune*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 论文提出双编码器视觉语言模型（如CLIP）在组合推理上的性能瓶颈主要源于基于全局余弦相似度的标准推理协议，而非表征缺陷。通过引入轻量级Transformer学习冻结表征的局部对齐，显著提升了组合泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 双编码器视觉语言模型（如CLIP）在组合基准测试中表现不佳，常被描述为"词袋系统"。作者认为这种限制可能更多源于基于全局余弦相似度的标准推理协议，而非表征本身的缺陷。需要探索更有效的推理机制来提升组合泛化能力。

Method: 1. 通过诊断实验证明在推理时显式执行细粒度区域-片段对齐能显著提升组合性能；2. 引入轻量级Transformer，直接从冻结的补丁和词元嵌入中学习这种对齐关系；3. 与全微调和先前的端到端组合训练方法进行比较。

Result: 学习局部对齐的方法在域内检索上匹配全微调性能，同时在受控的域外组合基准测试中带来显著改进。相比之下，全微调和先前的端到端方法虽然提升域内检索，但在分布偏移下的增益并不一致。

Conclusion: 全局嵌入匹配是双编码器视觉语言模型的关键瓶颈，对齐机制对于鲁棒组合泛化至关重要。学习冻结表征的局部对齐是一种有效方法，既能保持域内性能，又能显著提升组合泛化能力。

Abstract: Dual-encoder Vision-Language Models (VLMs) such as CLIP are often characterized as bag-of-words systems due to their poor performance on compositional benchmarks. We argue that this limitation may stem less from deficient representations than from the standard inference protocol based on global cosine similarity. First, through controlled diagnostic experiments, we show that explicitly enforcing fine-grained region-segment alignment at inference dramatically improves compositional performance without updating pretrained encoders. We then introduce a lightweight transformer that learns such alignments directly from frozen patch and token embeddings. Comparing against full fine-tuning and prior end-to-end compositional training methods, we find that although these approaches improve in-domain retrieval, their gains do not consistently transfer under distribution shift. In contrast, learning localized alignment over frozen representations matches full fine-tuning on in-domain retrieval while yielding substantial improvements on controlled out-of-domain compositional benchmarks. These results identify global embedding matching as a key bottleneck in dual-encoder VLMs and highlight the importance of alignment mechanisms for robust compositional generalization.

</details>


<div id='cs.CL'></div>

# cs.CL [[Back]](#toc)

### [216] [From Feelings to Metrics: Understanding and Formalizing How Users Vibe-Test LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14137)
*Itay Itzhak,Eliya Habba,Gabriel Stanovsky,Yonatan Belinkov*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该论文研究如何将非正式的"氛围测试"（vibe-testing）——用户基于个人经验评估LLM的实践——形式化，以支持系统性分析，并提出了结合个性化提示和用户感知评估的验证性评估流程。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM评估存在挑战：基准测试分数无法准确反映模型在实际应用中的实用性，而用户普遍采用的"氛围测试"（非正式、经验性的评估方法）过于临时性和非结构化，难以进行规模化分析和复现。

Method: 1. 分析两个实证资源：用户评估实践调查，以及来自博客和社交媒体的真实模型比较报告；2. 将氛围测试形式化为两个部分：用户个性化测试内容和个性化评判标准；3. 提出验证性评估流程，通过生成个性化提示并使用用户感知的主观标准比较模型输出。

Result: 在编码基准测试实验中，结合个性化提示和用户感知评估可以改变模型的偏好排序，这反映了氛围测试在实际应用中的作用。形式化的氛围测试能够作为连接基准分数和实际体验的有用方法。

Conclusion: 形式化的氛围测试能够有效弥合基准测试分数与实际用户体验之间的差距，为LLM评估提供更贴近实际应用场景的系统性方法。

Abstract: Evaluating LLMs is challenging, as benchmark scores often fail to capture models' real-world usefulness. Instead, users often rely on ``vibe-testing'': informal experience-based evaluation, such as comparing models on coding tasks related to their own workflow. While prevalent, vibe-testing is often too ad hoc and unstructured to analyze or reproduce at scale. In this work, we study how vibe-testing works in practice and then formalize it to support systematic analysis. We first analyze two empirical resources: (1) a survey of user evaluation practices, and (2) a collection of in-the-wild model comparison reports from blogs and social media. Based on these resources, we formalize vibe-testing as a two-part process: users personalize both what they test and how they judge responses. We then introduce a proof-of-concept evaluation pipeline that follows this formulation by generating personalized prompts and comparing model outputs using user-aware subjective criteria. In experiments on coding benchmarks, we find that combining personalized prompts and user-aware evaluation can change which model is preferred, reflecting the role of vibe-testing in practice. These findings suggest that formalized vibe-testing can serve as a useful approach for bridging benchmark scores and real-world experience.

</details>


### [217] [Rhetorical Questions in LLM Representations: A Linear Probing Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14128)
*Louie Hong Yao,Vishesh Anand,Yuan Zhuang,Tianyu Jiang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: LLM对修辞问句的表示不是单一的共享方向，而是多个线性方向，分别捕捉不同层面的修辞现象


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 修辞问句不是寻求信息而是为了说服或表达立场，但大型语言模型如何内部表示这类问句尚不清楚，需要探究其表征机制

Method: 在两个不同话语背景的社交媒体数据集上使用线性探针分析LLM表示，考察修辞信号的出现时机、稳定性和跨数据集可迁移性

Result: 修辞信号在早期层出现，最后标记表示最稳定；修辞问句在数据集内线性可分，跨数据集检测AUROC约0.7-0.8；但可迁移性不代表共享表示，不同数据集训练的探针对同一目标语料产生不同排名，前排名实例重叠度常低于0.2

Conclusion: LLM中的修辞问句表示由多个强调不同线索的线性方向编码，而非单一共享方向，反映了话语层面修辞立场和局部语法驱动问句行为的不同现象

Abstract: Rhetorical questions are asked not to seek information but to persuade or signal stance. How large language models internally represent them remains unclear. We analyze rhetorical questions in LLM representations using linear probes on two social-media datasets with different discourse contexts, and find that rhetorical signals emerge early and are most stably captured by last-token representations. Rhetorical questions are linearly separable from information-seeking questions within datasets, and remain detectable under cross-dataset transfer, reaching AUROC around 0.7-0.8. However, we demonstrate that transferability does not simply imply a shared representation. Probes trained on different datasets produce different rankings when applied to the same target corpus, with overlap among the top-ranked instances often below 0.2. Qualitative analysis shows that these divergences correspond to distinct rhetorical phenomena: some probes capture discourse-level rhetorical stance embedded in extended argumentation, while others emphasize localized, syntax-driven interrogative acts. Together, these findings suggest that rhetorical questions in LLM representations are encoded by multiple linear directions emphasizing different cues, rather than a single shared direction.

</details>


### [218] [Diffusion Language Models for Speech Recognition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14001)
*Davyd Naveriani,Albert Zeyer,Ralf Schlüter,Hermann Ney*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该论文探索了扩散语言模型在语音识别中的应用，提出了基于掩码扩散语言模型和均匀状态扩散模型的ASR假设重评分方法，并设计了一种结合CTC和USDM的联合解码新方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散语言模型因其双向注意力和并行文本生成能力而成为标准语言模型的有力替代品，但它们在语音识别中的应用尚未充分探索。本研究旨在探索如何将扩散语言模型有效应用于ASR系统，以提高识别准确性。

Method: 1. 提出了将掩码扩散语言模型和均匀状态扩散模型用于ASR假设重评分的综合指南；2. 设计了一种新的联合解码方法，将CTC的帧级概率分布与USDM的标签级概率分布在每个解码步骤中结合，生成结合USDM语言知识和CTC声学信息的新候选结果。

Result: 研究发现USDM和MDLM都能显著提高识别文本的准确性。USDM和MDLM在ASR重评分任务中表现出色，证明了扩散语言模型在语音识别领域的有效性。

Conclusion: 扩散语言模型（特别是USDM和MDLM）可以显著提升ASR系统的性能。提出的联合解码方法有效结合了CTC的声学信息和USDM的语言知识。作者公开了所有代码和配方，促进了该领域的研究发展。

Abstract: Diffusion language models have recently emerged as a leading alternative to standard language models, due to their ability for bidirectional attention and parallel text generation. In this work, we explore variants for their use in speech recognition. Specifically, we introduce a comprehensive guide to incorporating masked diffusion language models (MDLM) and uniform-state diffusion models (USDMs) for rescoring ASR hypotheses. Additionally, we design a new joint-decoding method that combines CTC and USDM by integrating the framewise probability distributions derived from CTC with the labelwise probability distributions computed by USDM at each decoding step, thereby generating new candidates that combine strong language knowledge from USDM and acoustic information from CTC. Our findings reveal that USDM, as well as MDLM, can significantly improve the accuracy of recognized text. We publish all our code and recipes.

</details>


### [219] [Adaptive Conformal Prediction for Improving Factuality of Generations by Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13991)
*Aleksandr Rubashevskii,Dzianis Piatrashyn,Preslav Nakov,Maxim Panov*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出一种自适应保形预测方法，用于大语言模型的事实性评估，通过提示自适应校准提高条件覆盖率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有保形预测方法通常不是提示自适应的，无法捕捉输入依赖性变化，导致在特定任务或提示下过滤过多或过少内容

Method: 将保形分数转换方法扩展到LLMs，实现提示依赖的校准，支持选择性预测以过滤不可靠的声明或答案选项

Result: 在多个白盒模型和不同领域评估中，该方法在条件覆盖率方面显著优于现有基线方法

Conclusion: 自适应保形预测方法能够为LLM生成提供更好的不确定性估计和统计保证，同时保持边际覆盖率保证并提高条件覆盖率

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are prone to generating factually incorrect outputs. Recent work has applied conformal prediction to provide uncertainty estimates and statistical guarantees for the factuality of LLM generations. However, existing approaches are typically not prompt-adaptive, limiting their ability to capture input-dependent variability. As a result, they may filter out too few items (leading to over-coverage) or too many (under-coverage) for a given task or prompt. We propose an adaptive conformal prediction approach that extends conformal score transformation methods to LLMs, with applications to long-form generation and multiple-choice question answering. This enables prompt-dependent calibration, retaining marginal coverage guarantees while improving conditional coverage. In addition, the approach naturally supports selective prediction, allowing unreliable claims or answer choices to be filtered out in downstream applications. We evaluate our approach on multiple white-box models across diverse domains and show that it significantly outperforms existing baselines in terms of conditional coverage.

</details>


### [220] [Leveraging LLM-GNN Integration for Open-World Question Answering over Knowledge Graphs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13979)
*Hussein Abdallah,Ibrahim Abdelaziz,Panos Kalnis,Essam Mansour*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: GLOW是一个结合预训练GNN和LLM的开放世界知识图谱问答系统，通过GNN从图结构预测候选答案，再通过结构化提示引导LLM进行推理，在不依赖检索或微调的情况下实现符号与语义信号的联合推理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统KGQA假设封闭世界，要求答案必须存在于知识图谱中，限制了实际应用。开放世界QA需要基于图结构和上下文推断缺失知识。现有系统要么依赖结构嵌入缺乏语义基础，要么假设完整图谱，在缺失链接或多跳推理下不可靠。

Method: 提出GLOW混合系统：1) 预训练GNN从图结构预测top-k候选答案；2) 将候选答案和相关KG事实序列化为结构化提示（如三元组和候选）；3) 使用结构化提示引导LLM进行推理，实现符号与语义信号的联合推理，不依赖检索或微调。

Result: 在标准基准测试和GLOW-BENCH（包含1000个问题的跨领域不完全知识图谱基准）上，GLOW优于现有LLM-GNN系统，实现了最高53.3%和平均38%的性能提升。

Conclusion: GLOW通过结合GNN的结构推理能力和LLM的语义理解能力，有效解决了开放世界知识图谱问答问题，在不完全知识图谱上表现出强大的泛化能力，为实际应用提供了可靠解决方案。

Abstract: Open-world Question Answering (OW-QA) over knowledge graphs (KGs) aims to answer questions over incomplete or evolving KGs. Traditional KGQA assumes a closed world where answers must exist in the KG, limiting real-world applicability.
