In contrast, open-world QA requires inferring missing knowledge based on graph structure and context. Large language models (LLMs) excel at language understanding but lack structured reasoning. Graph neural networks (GNNs) model graph topology but struggle with semantic interpretation. Existing systems integrate LLMs with GNNs or graph retrievers. Some support open-world QA but rely on structural embeddings without semantic grounding. Most assume observed paths or complete graphs, making them unreliable under missing links or multi-hop reasoning. We present GLOW, a hybrid system that combines a pre-trained GNN and an LLM for open-world KGQA. The GNN predicts top-k candidate answers from the graph structure. These, along with relevant KG facts, are serialized into a structured prompt (e.g., triples and candidates) to guide the LLM's reasoning. This enables joint reasoning over symbolic and semantic signals, without relying on retrieval or fine-tuning. To evaluate generalization, we introduce GLOW-BENCH, a 1,000-question benchmark over incomplete KGs across diverse domains. GLOW outperforms existing LLM-GNN systems on standard benchmarks and GLOW-BENCH, achieving up to 53.3% and an average 38% improvement. GitHub code and data are available.

</details>


### [221] [How Can We Synthesize High-Quality Pretraining Data? A Systematic Study of Prompt Design, Generator Model, and Source Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13977)
*Joel Niklaus,Atsuki Yamaguchi,Michal Štefánik,Guilherme Penedo,Hynek Kydlíček,Elie Bakouch,Lewis Tunstall,Edward Emanuel Beeching,Thibaud Frere,Colin Raffel,Leandro von Werra,Thomas Wolf*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: FinePhrase：通过结构化重述网页文本生成高质量合成预训练数据，在减少30倍生成成本的同时超越现有合成数据基准


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 合成数据是训练大语言模型的标准组件，但缺乏对重述策略、生成模型和源数据等设计维度的系统比较。需要识别将网页文本重述为合成预训练数据的关键因素。

Method: 进行大规模受控实验，生成超过一万亿token，比较不同设计维度。开发FinePhrase数据集，包含4860亿token的重述网页文本，采用结构化输出格式（如表格、数学问题、FAQ、教程）。

Result: 结构化输出格式（表格、数学问题、FAQ、教程）始终优于精选网页基准和先前合成方法。生成模型规模超过10亿参数后无额外收益。原始数据选择对性能有显著影响。FinePhrase超越所有现有合成数据基准，同时减少高达30倍的生成成本。

Conclusion: 结构化重述是生成高质量合成预训练数据的关键，FinePhrase数据集为研究社区提供了高效、低成本的合成数据解决方案，并公开了数据集、提示词和生成框架。

Abstract: Synthetic data is a standard component in training large language models, yet systematic comparisons across design dimensions, including rephrasing strategy, generator model, and source data, remain absent. We conduct extensive controlled experiments, generating over one trillion tokens, to identify critical factors in rephrasing web text into synthetic pretraining data. Our results reveal that structured output formats, such as tables, math problems, FAQs, and tutorials, consistently outperform both curated web baselines and prior synthetic methods. Notably, increasing the size of the generator model beyond 1B parameters provides no additional benefit. Our analysis also demonstrates that the selection of the original data used for mixing substantially influences performance. By applying our findings, we develop \textbf{\textsc{FinePhrase}}, a 486-billion-token open dataset of rephrased web text. We show that \textsc{FinePhrase} outperforms all existing synthetic data baselines while reducing generation costs by up to 30 times. We provide the dataset, all prompts, and the generation framework to the research community.

</details>


### [222] [MedRCube: A Multidimensional Framework for Fine-Grained and In-Depth Evaluation of MLLMs in Medical Imaging](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13756)
*Zhijie Bao,Fangke Chen,Licheng Bao,Chenhui Zhang,Wei Chen,Jiajie Peng,Zhongyu Wei*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出了MedRCube，一个用于医学影像多模态大语言模型的多维、细粒度评估框架，通过两阶段构建流程创建，评估了33个MLLMs并发现Lingshu-32B表现最佳，同时揭示了推理可信度问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有医学影像MLLMs评估方法存在局限性：仅报告单一或粗粒度指标，缺乏临床专业支持所需的细粒度评估，且无法评估推理机制的可信度，需要与真实世界医学影像实践对齐的系统性评估框架。

Method: 提出向多维、细粒度和深度评估的范式转变，设计了两阶段系统构建流程，并实例化为MedRCube评估框架。该框架包含专门设计的可信度评估子集，用于量化推理可信度。

Result: 评估了33个MLLMs，Lingshu-32B取得顶级性能。MedRCube揭示了先前评估设置无法获得的显著洞察，发现捷径行为与诊断任务性能之间存在高度显著的正相关关系，这对临床可信部署提出了担忧。

Conclusion: MedRCube为医学影像MLLMs提供了系统、细粒度的评估范式，暴露了现有评估方法的局限性，并揭示了推理可信度问题，对临床可信部署具有重要意义。资源已开源。

Abstract: The potential of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) in domain of medical imaging raise the demands of systematic and rigorous evaluation frameworks that are aligned with the real-world medical imaging practice. Existing practices that report single or coarse-grained metrics are lack the granularity required for specialized clinical support and fail to assess the reliability of reasoning mechanisms. To address this, we propose a paradigm shift toward multidimensional, fine-grained and in-depth evaluation. Based on a two-stage systematic construction pipeline designed for this paradigm, we instantiate it with MedRCube. We benchmark 33 MLLMs, \textit{Lingshu-32B} achieve top-tier performance. Crucially, MedRCube exposes a series of pronounced insights inaccessible under prior evaluation settings. Furthermore, we introduce a credibility evaluation subset to quantify reasoning credibility, uncover a highly significant positive association between shortcut behavior and diagnostic task performance, raising concerns for clinically trustworthy deployment. The resources of this work can be found at https://github.com/F1mc/MedRCube.

</details>


### [223] [Do We Still Need Humans in the Loop? Comparing Human and LLM Annotation in Active Learning for Hostility Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13899)
*Ahmad Dawar Hakimi,Lea Hirlimann,Isabelle Augenstein,Hinrich Schütze*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: LLM标注在成本效益上优于人工标注，但存在系统性误差；主动学习在预富集数据池中优势有限


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究指令调优LLM能否替代人工标注用于主动学习，以及在可批量标注整个语料库时主动学习是否仍有必要

Method: 在277,902条德国政治TikTok评论数据集上，比较7种标注策略和4种编码器，使用25,974条GPT-5.2标注和5,000条人工标注，检测反移民敌意

Result: 使用25,974条GPT-5.2标注（$43）训练的模型与使用3,800条人工标注（$316）的模型F1-Macro相当；主动学习在预富集池中相比随机采样优势有限，且同等成本下F1低于完整LLM标注；LLM训练的分类器存在系统性过预测正类的误差

Conclusion: 标注策略不应仅基于聚合F1，而应考虑目标应用可接受的误差分布；LLM标注成本效益高但存在系统性偏差，特别是在主题模糊的讨论中

Abstract: Instruction-tuned LLMs can annotate thousands of instances from a short prompt at negligible cost. This raises two questions for active learning (AL): can LLM labels replace human labels within the AL loop, and does AL remain necessary when entire corpora can be labelled at once? We investigate both questions on a new dataset of 277,902 German political TikTok comments (25,974 LLM-labelled, 5,000 human-annotated), comparing seven annotation strategies across four encoders to detect anti-immigrant hostility. A classifier trained on 25,974 GPT-5.2 labels (\$43) achieves comparable F1-Macro to one trained on 3,800 human annotations (\$316). Active learning offers little advantage over random sampling in our pre-enriched pool and delivers lower F1 than full LLM annotation at the same cost. However, comparable aggregate F1 masks a systematic difference in error structure: LLM-trained classifiers over-predict the positive class relative to the human gold standard. This divergence concentrates in topically ambiguous discussions where the distinction between anti-immigrant hostility and policy critique is most subtle, suggesting that annotation strategy should be guided not by aggregate F1 alone but by the error profile acceptable for the target application.

</details>


### [224] [From Anchors to Supervision: Memory-Graph Guided Corpus-Free Unlearning for Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13777)
*Wenxuan Li,Zhenfei Zhang,Mi Zhang,Geng Hong,Mi Wen,Xiaoyu You,Min Yang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: MAGE框架通过最小化用户输入实现免语料库的LLM遗忘学习，仅需轻量级实体锚点即可恢复目标记忆并引导遗忘


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有遗忘学习方法依赖用户提供的遗忘集，存在审计困难、二次泄露和恶意滥用的风险，需要更安全、可审计的遗忘机制

Method: 提出MAGE框架：1) 使用轻量级用户锚点识别目标实体；2) 探测目标LLM恢复相关记忆；3) 构建加权局部记忆图；4) 合成范围化监督信号用于遗忘学习

Result: 在TOFU和RWKU基准测试中，MAGE的自生成监督实现了与外部参考监督相当的遗忘效果，同时保持模型整体效用

Conclusion: MAGE支持基于最小锚点而非用户提供遗忘语料库的实用、可审计遗忘工作流程，是模型无关、免语料库的解决方案

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) may memorize sensitive or copyrighted content, raising significant privacy and legal concerns. While machine unlearning has emerged as a potential remedy, prevailing paradigms rely on user-provided forget sets, making unlearning requests difficult to audit and exposing systems to secondary leakage and malicious abuse. We propose MAGE, a Memory-grAph Guided Erasure framework for user-minimized, corpus-free unlearning. Given only a lightweight user anchor that identifies a target entity, MAGE probes the target LLM to recover target-related memorization, organizes it into a weighted local memory graph, and synthesizes scoped supervision for unlearning. MAGE is model-agnostic, can be plugged into standard unlearning methods, and requires no access to the original training corpus. Experiments on two benchmarks, TOFU and RWKU, demonstrate that MAGE's self-generated supervision achieves effective unlearning performance comparable to supervision generated with external reference, while preserving overall utility. These results support a practical and auditable unlearning workflow driven by minimal anchors rather than user-supplied forget corpora.

</details>


### [225] [Syn-TurnTurk: A Synthetic Dataset for Turn-Taking Prediction in Turkish Dialogues](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13620)
*Ahmet Tuğrul Bayrak,Mustafa Sertaç Türkel,Fatma Nur Korkmaz*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 开发了Syn-TurnTurk合成土耳其语对话数据集，用于改善语音聊天机器人的对话时机管理，通过多种模型评估显示BI-LSTM和集成方法在土耳其语对话轮次预测中表现最佳。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前语音聊天机器人主要依赖简单的静默检测来管理对话时机，但这种方法经常失败，因为人类语音模式包含不规则的停顿，导致机器人打断用户、破坏对话流程。对于土耳其语等缺乏高质量对话轮次预测数据集的语言，这个问题尤为严重。

Method: 使用多种Qwen大语言模型生成Syn-TurnTurk合成土耳其语对话数据集，模拟真实的口语交流，包括重叠和策略性停顿。使用多种传统和深度学习架构对数据集进行评估。

Result: 先进模型特别是BI-LSTM和集成方法（LR+RF）取得了高准确率（0.839）和AUC分数（0.910），表明合成数据集能有效帮助模型理解语言线索。

Conclusion: Syn-TurnTurk合成数据集能够有效改善土耳其语人机交互的自然性，使模型更好地理解对话轮次转换的语言线索，为缺乏高质量数据集的语言提供了可行的解决方案。

Abstract: Managing natural dialogue timing is a significant challenge for voice-based chatbots. Most current systems usually rely on simple silence detection, which often fails because human speech patterns involve irregular pauses. This causes bots to interrupt users, breaking the conversational flow. This problem is even more severe for languages like Turkish, which lack high-quality datasets for turn-taking prediction. This paper introduces Syn-TurnTurk, a synthetic Turkish dialogue dataset generated using various Qwen Large Language Models (LLMs) to mirror real-life verbal exchanges, including overlaps and strategic silences. We evaluated the dataset using several traditional and deep learning architectures. The results show that advanced models, particularly BI-LSTM and Ensemble (LR+RF) methods, achieve high accuracy (0.839) and AUC scores (0.910). These findings demonstrate that our synthetic dataset can have a positive affect for models understand linguistic cues, allowing for more natural human-machine interaction in Turkish.

</details>


### [226] [BenGER: A Collaborative Web Platform for End-to-End Benchmarking of German Legal Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13583)
*Sebastian Nagl,Matthias Grabmair*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: BenGER是一个开源Web平台，用于评估大型语言模型在法律推理任务中的表现，集成了任务设计、协作标注、可配置的LLM运行和多种评估指标。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前评估LLM法律推理能力的工作流程分散在不同平台和脚本中，限制了透明度、可重复性和非技术法律专家的参与。

Method: 开发BenGER框架，一个集成了任务创建、协作标注、可配置LLM运行和评估功能的开源Web平台，支持多组织项目、租户隔离和基于角色的访问控制。

Result: BenGER平台提供了端到端的基准创建和分析能力，支持词汇、语义、事实和基于法官的多种评估指标，并可向标注者提供基于参考的反馈。

Conclusion: BenGER框架解决了法律领域LLM评估中的碎片化问题，提高了透明度、可重复性和法律专家的参与度，为德国法律领域的基准测试提供了集成解决方案。

Abstract: Evaluating large language models (LLMs) for legal reasoning requires workflows that span task design, expert annotation, model execution, and metric-based evaluation. In practice, these steps are split across platforms and scripts, limiting transparency, reproducibility, and participation by non-technical legal experts. We present the BenGER (Benchmark for German Law) framework, an open-source web platform that integrates task creation, collaborative annotation, configurable LLM runs, and evaluation with lexical, semantic, factual, and judge-based metrics. BenGER supports multi-organization projects with tenant isolation and role-based access control, and can optionally provide formative, reference-grounded feedback to annotators. We will demonstrate a live deployment showing end-to-end benchmark creation and analysis.

</details>


### [227] [Training-Free Test-Time Contrastive Learning for Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13552)
*Kaiwen Zheng,Kai Zhou,Jinwu Hu,Te Gu,Mingkai Peng,Fei Liu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: TF-TTCL是一种无需训练、基于对比学习的测试时适应框架，通过"探索-反思-引导"循环，让冻结的大语言模型从自身推理经验中学习，提升分布偏移下的推理能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有测试时适应方法依赖梯度更新需要白盒访问且计算开销大，而无训练方法要么是静态的要么依赖外部指导。需要一种无需训练、能在线适应分布偏移的框架。

Method: 提出TF-TTCL框架，包含三个核心模块：1) 语义查询增强：通过多智能体角色扮演生成多样化推理轨迹；2) 对比经验蒸馏：捕捉优劣轨迹间的语义差距，提炼为显式文本规则；3) 上下文规则检索：在推理时激活存储的规则，动态引导冻结LLM。

Result: 在封闭式推理任务和开放式评估任务上的广泛实验表明，TF-TTCL在在线评估中持续优于强零样本基线和代表性TTA方法。

Conclusion: TF-TTCL提供了一种无需训练、计算高效的测试时适应方法，使冻结LLM能够从自身推理经验中学习，提升分布偏移下的鲁棒性。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) demonstrate strong reasoning capabilities, but their performance often degrades under distribution shift. Existing test-time adaptation (TTA) methods rely on gradient-based updates that require white-box access and need substantial overhead, while training-free alternatives are either static or depend on external guidance. In this paper, we propose Training-Free Test-Time Contrastive Learning TF-TTCL, a training-free adaptation framework that enables a frozen LLM to improve online by distilling supervision from its own inference experiences. Specifically, TF-TTCL implements a dynamic "Explore-Reflect-Steer" loop through three core modules: 1) Semantic Query Augmentation first diversifies problem views via multi-agent role-playing to generate different reasoning trajectories; 2) Contrastive Experience Distillation then captures the semantic gap between superior and inferior trajectories, distilling them into explicit textual rules; and 3) Contextual Rule Retrieval finally activates these stored rules during inference to dynamically steer the frozen LLM toward robust reasoning patterns while avoiding observed errors. Extensive experiments on closed-ended reasoning tasks and open-ended evaluation tasks demonstrate that TF-TTCL consistently outperforms strong zero-shot baselines and representative TTA methods under online evaluation. Code is available at https://github.com/KevinSCUTer/TF-TTCL.

</details>


### [228] [Calibrated Speculative Decoding: Frequency-Guided Candidate Selection for Efficient Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13634)
*Xuwen Zhou,Fangxin Liu,Chao Wang,Xiao Zheng,Hao Zheng,Min He,Li Jiang,Haibing Guan*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: CSD是一种无需训练的推测解码框架，通过恢复被标准验证丢弃的有效标记来提升解码效率，在保持模型准确性的同时实现最高2.33倍的吞吐量加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统推测解码框架存在频繁的虚假拒绝问题，特别是在草稿模型产生语义正确但词汇不同的输出时，导致有效标记被错误丢弃，限制了加速效果。

Method: CSD采用"频率引导候选选择与概率保护接受"原则，包含两个轻量模块：在线校正记忆（聚合历史拒绝模式作为救援候选）和语义一致性门控（使用概率比率而非精确标记匹配验证候选可接受性）。

Result: 在多样化大语言模型上的评估显示，CSD优于现有方法，实现峰值吞吐量加速2.33倍，在所有任务上保持模型准确性，并在复杂推理数据集上进一步提升性能。

Conclusion: CSD为实际LLM部署提供了一种高效、轻量级的解决方案，通过恢复被错误拒绝的有效标记，显著提升了推测解码的效率和实用性。

Abstract: Speculative decoding accelerates autoregressive generation by letting draft tokens bypass full verification, but conventional frameworks suffer from frequent false rejections, particularly when draft models produce semantically correct but lexically divergent outputs. In this paper, we present Calibrated Speculative Decoding (CSD), a training-free framework that recovers valid tokens discarded by standard verification. Guided by the principle of "Frequency-Guided Candidate Selection and Probability-Guarded Acceptance," CSD incorporates two lightweight modules: Online Correction Memory, which aggregates historical rejections to propose recurring divergence patterns as rescue candidates, and Semantic Consistency Gating, which verifies candidate admissibility using probability ratios instead of exact token matching. Our evaluation across diverse large language models demonstrates that CSD outperforms existing methods, achieving a peak throughput speedup of 2.33x. CSD preserves model accuracy across all tasks while further boosting performance on complex reasoning datasets. These results establish CSD as a highly effective, lightweight solution for practical LLM deployments.

</details>


### [229] [C2: Scalable Rubric-Augmented Reward Modeling from Binary Preferences](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13618)
*Akira Kawabata,Saku Sugawara*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: C2框架通过让奖励模型与仅从二元偏好训练的准则生成器进行批判性协作，无需外部准则标注即可提升奖励模型判断的可靠性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于准则增强的验证方法需要昂贵的准则标注，限制了可扩展性。同时发现准则生成存在协作失败问题：低质量准则会误导奖励模型而非帮助

Method: 提出C2框架：1)通过测量每个准则将奖励模型推向或偏离正确偏好的程度，合成有帮助和误导性的准则对；2)训练协作准则生成器提出有帮助的准则；3)训练批判性验证器评估准则有效性，在推理时仅遵循其认为有帮助的准则

Result: C2在相同二元偏好上训练时优于推理奖励模型：RM-Bench提升6.5分，AlpacaEval 2.0长度控制胜率提升6.0分。无需外部准则标注，8B奖励模型即可达到4倍大模型使用准则时的性能

Conclusion: 通过激发准则增强验证中的刻意协作，C2框架以可扩展的方式使奖励模型更加可信，解决了现有方法对昂贵标注的依赖和协作失败问题

Abstract: Rubric-augmented verification guides reward models with explicit evaluation criteria, yielding more reliable judgments than single-model verification. However, most existing methods require costly rubric annotations, limiting scalability. Moreover, we find that rubric generation is vulnerable to a failure of cooperation; low-quality rubrics actively mislead reward models rather than help. Inspired by the principle of cooperative communication, we propose Cooperative yet Critical reward modeling (C2), a framework that significantly improves reward model judgments by having the reward model critically collaborate with a rubric generator trained solely from binary preferences. In C2, we synthesize helpful and misleading rubric pairs by measuring how each rubric shifts the reward model toward or away from the correct preference. Using these contrastive pairs, we train a cooperative rubric generator to propose helpful rubrics, and a critical verifier to assess rubric validity before making its judgment, following only rubrics it deems helpful at inference time. C2 outperforms reasoning reward models trained on the same binary preferences, with gains of up to 6.5 points on RM-Bench and 6.0 points length-controlled win rate on AlpacaEval 2.0. Without external rubric annotations, C2 enables an 8B reward model to match performance achieved with rubrics from a 4$\times$ larger model. Overall, our work demonstrates that eliciting deliberate cooperation in rubric-augmented verification makes reward models more trustworthy in a scalable way.

</details>


### [230] [From Prediction to Justification: Aligning Sentiment Reasoning with Human Rationale via Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13398)
*Shihao Zhang,Ziwei Wang,Jie Zhou,Yulan Wu,Qin Chen,Zhikai Lei,Liyang Yu,Liang Dou,Liang He*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出ABSA-R1框架，通过强化学习让大语言模型模仿人类"先推理后预测"的认知过程，生成自然语言解释来支撑情感预测，提升可解释性和性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有ABSA系统虽然准确率高，但缺乏人类情感认知中的显式推理能力，无法提供因果解释。人类不仅分类情感，还会构建判断的因果解释。

Method: 提出ABSA-R1框架：1) 使用强化学习让模型生成自然语言解释；2) 引入认知对齐奖励模型确保推理路径与情感标签一致；3) 基于元认知监控实现性能驱动的拒绝采样策略，针对模型内部推理不确定或不一致的困难案例。

Result: 在四个基准测试上，配备显式推理能力的模型不仅增强了可解释性，而且在情感分类和三元组提取方面优于非推理基线模型。

Conclusion: 通过模仿人类"先推理后预测"的认知过程，ABSA-R1框架成功地将显式推理能力融入ABSA系统，既提高了可解释性又提升了性能，为构建更接近人类认知的AI系统提供了新思路。

Abstract: While Aspect-based Sentiment Analysis (ABSA) systems have achieved high accuracy in identifying sentiment polarities, they often operate as "black boxes," lacking the explicit reasoning capabilities characteristic of human affective cognition. Humans do not merely categorize sentiment; they construct causal explanations for their judgments. To bridge this gap, we propose ABSA-R1, a large language model framework designed to mimic this ``reason-before-predict" cognitive process. By leveraging reinforcement learning (RL), ABSA-R1 learns to articulate the why behind the what, generating natural language justifications that ground its sentiment predictions. We introduce a Cognition-Aligned Reward Model (formerly sentiment-aware reward model) that enforces consistency between the generated reasoning path and the final emotional label. Furthermore, inspired by metacognitive monitoring, we implement a performance-driven rejection sampling strategy that selectively targets hard cases where the model's internal reasoning is uncertain or inconsistent. Experimental results on four benchmarks demonstrate that equipping models with this explicit reasoning capability not only enhances interpretability but also yields superior performance in sentiment classification and triplet extraction compared to non-reasoning baselines.

</details>


### [231] [Peer-Predictive Self-Training for Language Model Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13356)
*Shi Feng,Hanlin Zhang,Fan Nie,Sham Kakade,Yiling Chen*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出Peer-Predictive Self-Training (PST)框架，通过多个语言模型协作生成聚合回答作为内部训练信号，无需外部监督即可实现模型自我改进


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 语言模型在没有外部监督的情况下持续自我改进的机制仍然是一个开放挑战。现有方法通常需要外部监督或教师-学生层次结构，限制了其可扩展性和实用性。

Method: 提出Peer-Predictive Self-Training (PST)框架：1) 多个语言模型对提示问题顺序生成响应；2) 聚合最终回答作为内部训练目标；3) 使用点互信息(PMI)衡量中间响应与聚合回答的信息量；4) 基于PMI信号缩放自训练更新权重，对齐度高的响应更新少，对齐度低的响应更新多。

Result: 在数学推理基准测试(SimulEq、Math500、MultiArith)上：1) 在Gemma-2-2B、LLaMA-3.2-1B、Qwen-2.5-1.5B模型上，准确率提升2.2-4.3个百分点；2) 生成器-验证器差距(GV-Gap)降低26-40%；3) 无需外部监督或教师-学生层次结构，仅依赖跨模型交互。

Conclusion: 跨模型生成和同伴预测反馈可以作为有效的自监督训练方法，为语言模型的自我改进提供了无需外部监督的新途径。

Abstract: Mechanisms for continued self-improvement of language models without external supervision remain an open challenge. We propose Peer-Predictive Self-Training (PST), a label-free fine-tuning framework in which multiple language models improve collaboratively by leveraging a cross-model aggregated response as an internal training signal. Given a prompt question, the models generate responses sequentially; the final aggregated answer, often more reliable than individual responses in practice, serves as an internal target for learning. We measure how informative each intermediate response is about the aggregate using pointwise mutual information (PMI), and use this signal to scale self-training updates. Responses already aligned with the aggregate are updated less, while less informative or misaligned responses are updated more. On mathematical reasoning benchmarks (SimulEq, Math500, and MultiArith), PST improves exact-match accuracy by 2.2 to 4.3 percentage points across Gemma-2-2B, LLaMA-3.2-1B, and Qwen-2.5-1.5B, and reduces the average generator-verifier gap (GV-Gap) by 26 to 40 percent, while requiring no external supervision or teacher-student hierarchy and relying solely on cross-model interactions. These results suggest that cross-model generations and peer-predictive feedback can serve as an effective approach for self-supervised training.

</details>


### [232] [Giving Voice to the Constitution: Low-Resource Text-to-Speech for Quechua and Spanish Using a Bilingual Legal Corpus](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13288)
*John E. Ortega,Rodolfo Zevallos,Fabricio Carraro*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出一个统一管道，使用XTTS v2、F5-TTS和DiFlow-TTS三种最先进的TTS架构，为秘鲁宪法合成高质量的克丘亚语和西班牙语语音。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决克丘亚语数据稀缺问题，同时保持西班牙语的自然度，为土著和多语言环境开发包容性语音合成系统，特别是在政治和法律内容领域。

Method: 使用三种先进TTS架构（XTTS v2、F5-TTS、DiFlow-TTS），在独立西班牙语和克丘亚语语音数据集上训练，利用双语和多语言TTS能力，通过跨语言迁移缓解数据稀缺问题。

Result: 训练了检查点，发布了推理代码和每个宪法条款的合成音频，为土著和多语言环境的语音技术提供了可重用资源，提高了两种语言的合成质量。

Conclusion: 这项工作为低资源环境下政治和法律内容的包容性TTS系统开发做出了贡献，通过跨语言迁移有效缓解了克丘亚语数据稀缺问题，同时保持了西班牙语的自然度。

Abstract: We present a unified pipeline for synthesizing high-quality Quechua and Spanish speech for the Peruvian Constitution using three state-of-the-art text-to-speech (TTS) architectures: XTTS v2, F5-TTS, and DiFlow-TTS. Our models are trained on independent Spanish and Quechua speech datasets with heterogeneous sizes and recording conditions, and leverage bilingual and multilingual TTS capabilities to improve synthesis quality in both languages. By exploiting cross-lingual transfer, our framework mitigates data scarcity in Quechua while preserving naturalness in Spanish. We release trained checkpoints, inference code, and synthesized audio for each constitutional article, providing a reusable resource for speech technologies in indigenous and multilingual contexts. This work contributes to the development of inclusive TTS systems for political and legal content in low-resource settings.

</details>


### [233] [English is Not All You Need: Systematically Exploring the Role of Multilinguality in LLM Post-Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13286)
*Mehak Dhaliwal,Shashwat Chaurasia,Yao Qin,Dezhi Hong,Thomas Butler*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 多语言后训练研究：增加语言覆盖度对模型性能有益，低资源语言受益最大，高资源语言性能稳定；即使加入单一非英语语言也能提升英语性能和跨语言泛化能力；足够语言多样性时零样本跨语言迁移可匹配低多样性直接包含语言的效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前大型语言模型的后训练流程主要围绕英语设计，导致不同语言间的性能差异。需要系统研究训练语言覆盖度、模型规模和任务领域之间的相互作用，以优化多语言模型性能。

Method: 基于220个监督微调实验，使用并行翻译的多语言数据混合，涵盖数学推理和API调用任务，模型参数规模达80亿。系统研究训练语言覆盖度、模型规模和任务领域的相互作用。

Result: 增加后训练语言覆盖度对任务和模型规模都有益，低资源语言受益最大，高资源语言性能趋于稳定而非下降；即使加入单一非英语语言也能提升英语性能和跨语言泛化；足够语言多样性时，零样本跨语言迁移可匹配低多样性直接包含语言的效果，但对类型学距离远、低资源语言增益有限。

Conclusion: 纯英语后训练策略是次优的，多语言训练能提升模型整体性能，特别是对低资源语言。语言多样性在跨语言迁移中起关键作用，但需要针对特定语言类型和资源水平进行优化。

Abstract: Despite the widespread multilingual deployment of large language models, post-training pipelines remain predominantly English-centric, contributing to performance disparities across languages. We present a systematic, controlled study of the interplay between training language coverage, model scale, and task domain, based on 220 supervised fine-tuning runs on parallel translated multilingual data mixtures spanning mathematical reasoning and API calling tasks, with models up to 8B parameters. We find that increasing language coverage during post-training is largely beneficial across tasks and model scales, with low-resource languages benefiting the most and high-resource languages plateauing rather than degrading. Even minimal multilinguality helps: incorporating a single non-English language improves both English performance and cross-lingual generalization, making English-only post-training largely suboptimal. Moreover, at sufficient language diversity, zero-shot cross-lingual transfer can match or exceed the effects of direct language inclusion in a low-diversity setting, although gains remain limited for typologically distant, low-resource languages.

</details>


### [234] [L2D-Clinical: Learning to Defer for Adaptive Model Selection in Clinical Text Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13285)
*Rishik Kondadadi,John E. Ortega*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出L2D-Clinical框架，通过学习BERT分类器何时应基于不确定性信号和文本特征将任务推迟给LLM，在临床文本分类中实现自适应推迟，提升准确性并控制API成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 临床文本分类需要在专用微调模型（BERT变体）和通用大语言模型（LLM）之间选择，但两者在不同实例中各有优劣。现有学习推迟（L2D）方法假设人类专家普遍更优，而本研究旨在开发能根据不确定性信号和文本特征自适应决定何时将BERT分类器的任务推迟给LLM的框架。

Method: 提出L2D-Clinical框架，通过学习基于不确定性信号和文本特征来决定BERT分类器何时应将任务推迟给LLM。框架利用LLM补充BERT的能力，而非假设LLM在所有情况下都更优。在两个英文临床任务上评估：1）ADE检测（ADE Corpus V2）；2）治疗结果分类（MIMIC-IV，使用多LLM共识作为真实标签）。

Result: 在ADE检测任务中，BioBERT（F1=0.911）优于LLM（F1=0.765），L2D-Clinical通过选择性推迟7%的实例达到F1=0.928（比BERT提升1.7分），利用LLM的高召回率补偿BERT的漏检。在MIMIC治疗结果分类中，GPT-5-nano（F1=0.967）优于ClinicalBERT（F1=0.887），L2D-Clinical通过仅推迟16.8%的案例给LLM达到F1=0.980（比BERT提升9.3分）。

Conclusion: L2D-Clinical框架能有效学习选择性利用LLM优势，同时最小化API成本。关键洞见是框架能自适应地决定何时推迟给LLM，在BERT和LLM各有优势的不同临床任务中均实现性能提升。

Abstract: Clinical text classification requires choosing between specialized fine-tuned models (BERT variants) and general-purpose large language models (LLMs), yet neither dominates across all instances. We introduce Learning to Defer for clinical text (L2D-Clinical), a framework that learns when a BERT classifier should defer to an LLM based on uncertainty signals and text characteristics. Unlike prior L2D work that defers to human experts assumed universally superior, our approach enables adaptive deferral-improving accuracy when the LLM complements BERT. We evaluate on two English clinical tasks: (1) ADE detection (ADE Corpus V2), where BioBERT (F1=0.911) outperforms the LLM (F1=0.765), and (2) treatment outcome classification (MIMIC-IV with multi-LLM consensus ground truth), where GPT-5-nano (F1=0.967) outperforms ClinicalBERT (F1=0.887). On ADE, L2D-Clinical achieves F1=0.928 (+1.7 points over BERT) by selectively deferring 7% of instances where the LLM's high recall compensates for BERT's misses. On MIMIC, L2D-Clinical achieves F1=0.980 (+9.3 points over BERT) by deferring only 16.8\% of cases to the LLM. The key insight is that L2D-Clinical learns to selectively leverage LLM strengths while minimizing API costs.

</details>


### [235] [GlotOCR Bench: OCR Models Still Struggle Beyond a Handful of Unicode Scripts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12978)
*Amir Hossein Kargaran,Nafiseh Nikeghbal,Jana Diesner,François Yvon,Hinrich Schütze*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: GlotOCR Bench是一个包含100多种Unicode文字的OCR泛化基准测试，评估发现现有模型仅能处理少数文字，最强模型也不超过30种文字，性能与文字级别的预训练覆盖度相关。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前OCR评估主要集中在少数高资源和中资源文字上，缺乏对多种文字泛化能力的全面评估。需要建立一个全面的基准来评估OCR模型在不同文字上的泛化性能。

Method: 创建包含100多种Unicode文字的基准测试，使用真实多语言文本生成干净和降质图像变体。使用Google Fonts字体库，通过HarfBuzz进行字形整形，FreeType进行光栅化，支持LTR和RTL文字。手动检查渲染图像以确保所有文字正确显示。

Result: 评估了多种开源和专有视觉语言模型，发现大多数模型只能在少于10种文字上表现良好，即使最强的前沿模型也无法泛化到超过30种文字。性能与文字级别的预训练覆盖度相关，表明当前OCR系统既依赖视觉识别也依赖语言模型预训练。面对不熟悉的文字时，模型要么产生随机噪声，要么从已知的相似文字中产生幻觉字符。

Conclusion: 当前OCR系统在多文字泛化方面存在显著局限性，主要受限于预训练数据的覆盖范围。需要更全面的多文字预训练数据来提升OCR的泛化能力。发布了基准测试和管道代码以促进可重复性研究。

Abstract: Optical character recognition (OCR) has advanced rapidly with the rise of vision-language models, yet evaluation has remained concentrated on a small cluster of high- and mid-resource scripts. We introduce GlotOCR Bench, a comprehensive benchmark evaluating OCR generalization across 100+ Unicode scripts. Our benchmark comprises clean and degraded image variants rendered from real multilingual texts. Images are rendered using fonts from the Google Fonts repository, shaped with HarfBuzz and rasterized with FreeType, supporting both LTR and RTL scripts. Samples of rendered images were manually reviewed to verify correct rendering across all scripts. We evaluate a broad suite of open-weight and proprietary vision-language models and find that most perform well on fewer than ten scripts, and even the strongest frontier models fail to generalize beyond thirty scripts. Performance broadly tracks script-level pretraining coverage, suggesting that current OCR systems rely on language model pretraining as much as on visual recognition. Models confronted with unfamiliar scripts either produce random noise or hallucinate characters from similar scripts they already know. We release the benchmark and pipeline for reproducibility. Pipeline Code: https://github.com/cisnlp/glotocr-bench, Benchmark: https://hf.co/datasets/cis-lmu/glotocr-bench.

</details>


### [236] [Hessian-Enhanced Token Attribution (HETA): Interpreting Autoregressive LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13258)
*Vishal Pramanik,Maisha Maliha,Nathaniel D. Bastian,Sumit Kumar Jha*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: HETA：针对仅解码器语言模型的新型归因框架，结合语义转换向量、Hessian敏感度评分和KL散度，提供因果忠实、语义基础的归因分析


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有归因方法主要针对编码器架构，依赖线性近似，无法捕捉仅解码器模型中自回归生成的因果和语义复杂性，需要专门针对此类模型的归因框架

Method: 提出Hessian增强令牌归因(HETA)框架，包含三个互补组件：1)捕捉层间令牌到令牌影响的语义转换向量；2)建模二阶效应的Hessian敏感度评分；3)测量令牌被掩码时信息损失的KL散度

Result: 在多个模型和数据集上的实证评估表明，HETA在归因忠实度和与人类标注对齐方面始终优于现有方法，为自回归语言模型的可解释性设立了新标准

Conclusion: HETA通过统一设计产生上下文感知、因果忠实和语义基础的归因，解决了仅解码器语言模型的归因挑战，并引入了用于生成场景下系统评估归因质量的基准数据集

Abstract: Attribution methods seek to explain language model predictions by quantifying the contribution of input tokens to generated outputs. However, most existing techniques are designed for encoder-based architectures and rely on linear approximations that fail to capture the causal and semantic complexities of autoregressive generation in decoder-only models. To address these limitations, we propose Hessian-Enhanced Token Attribution (HETA), a novel attribution framework tailored for decoder-only language models. HETA combines three complementary components: a semantic transition vector that captures token-to-token influence across layers, Hessian-based sensitivity scores that model second-order effects, and KL divergence to measure information loss when tokens are masked. This unified design produces context-aware, causally faithful, and semantically grounded attributions. Additionally, we introduce a curated benchmark dataset for systematically evaluating attribution quality in generative settings. Empirical evaluations across multiple models and datasets demonstrate that HETA consistently outperforms existing methods in attribution faithfulness and alignment with human annotations, establishing a new standard for interpretability in autoregressive language models.

</details>


### [237] [InfiniteScienceGym: An Unbounded, Procedurally-Generated Benchmark for Scientific Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13201)
*Oliver Bentham,Vivek Srikumar*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: InfiniteScienceGym是一个程序生成的科学基准测试平台，用于评估LLMs基于实证数据进行推理的能力，通过生成包含可验证问答任务的自包含科学仓库来克服传统基准的偏见和噪声问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于已发表研究和人工标注的基准测试存在多种问题：发表偏见、已知知识偏见、标签噪声以及大量存储需求。这些限制使得难以准确评估大语言模型从实证数据中进行推理的能力。

Method: 提出InfiniteScienceGym，一个程序生成的基准测试框架。从种子开始，模拟器确定性地生成具有现实目录结构、文件和表格数据的自包含科学仓库，特权问答生成器产生可回答和不可回答的问题并提供精确的真实答案。

Result: 评估专有和开源模型发现：所有模型总体准确率不超过45%；识别不可回答问题仍然是主要弱点；更强的模型倾向于更有效地使用工具，而不仅仅是消耗更多token。

Conclusion: InfiniteScienceGym通过针对难以用已发布数据集评估的盲点和失败模式，补充了真实的科学基准测试，为在受控环境中评估证据基础推理、弃权和工具介导分析提供了可能。

Abstract: Large language models are emerging as scientific assistants, but evaluating their ability to reason from empirical data remains challenging. Benchmarks derived from published studies and human annotations inherit publication bias, known-knowledge bias, label noise, and substantial storage requirements. We present InfiniteScienceGym, a procedurally generated benchmark of scientific repositories paired with a verifiable question-answering task. From a seed, the simulator deterministically generates a self-contained repository with realistic directory structure, files, and tabular data, and a privileged QA generator produces both answerable and unanswerable questions with exact ground truth. This makes it possible to evaluate evidence-grounded reasoning, abstention, and tool-mediated analysis in a controlled setting without distributing a large static corpus. InfiniteScienceGym complements real scientific benchmarks by targeting blind spots and failure modes that are hard to evaluate using published datasets alone. Evaluating both proprietary and open-weight models, we find that none achieve more than 45% accuracy overall, that recognizing unanswerable questions remains a major weakness, and that stronger models tend to use tools more effectively rather than simply consuming more tokens.

</details>


### [238] [One Token Away from Collapse: The Fragility of Instruction-Tuned Helpfulness](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13006)
*Erfan Baghaei Potraghloo,Seyedarmin Azizi,Souvik Kundu,Massoud Pedram*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 指令调优的大语言模型在简单词汇约束下（如禁止单个标点或常见词）会严重退化，导致响应全面性下降14-48%，而基础模型则不受此影响


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究指令调优LLM在简单词汇约束下的鲁棒性，探究其表面形式模板依赖导致的脆弱性，以及现有评估方法的局限性

Method: 通过词汇约束实验（禁止单个标点或常见词），使用成对评估和GPT-4o-mini/GPT-4o作为评判者，进行机制分析（两阶段生成、线性探针），并在MT-Bench上验证

Result: 指令调优LLM在简单约束下响应全面性下降14-48%，基线响应在77-100%的成对比较中更受偏好；GPT-4o-mini损失31%；基础模型无系统性退化；两阶段生成可恢复59-96%响应长度

Conclusion: 指令调优将任务能力与狭窄的表面形式模板耦合，导致模型在简单约束下脆弱；现有独立LLM评判方法严重低估质量下降，需要改进评估方法

Abstract: Instruction-tuned large language models produce helpful, structured responses, but how robust is this helpfulness when trivially constrained? We show that simple lexical constraints (banning a single punctuation character or common word) cause instruction-tuned LLMs to collapse their responses, losing 14--48% of comprehensiveness in pairwise evaluation across three open-weight model families and one closed-weight model (GPT-4o-mini). The baseline response is preferred in 77--100% of 1,920 pairwise comparisons judged by GPT-4o-mini and GPT-4o. Notably, GPT-4o-mini suffers 31% comprehensiveness loss (99% baseline win rate), demonstrating that the fragility extends to commercially deployed closed-weight models, contrary to prior findings on format-level constraints. Through mechanistic analysis, we identify this as a planning failure: two-pass generation (free generation followed by constrained rewriting) recovers 59--96% of response length, and linear probes on prompt representations predict response length with $R^2 = 0.51$--$0.93$ before generation begins, with $R^2$ tracking collapse severity across models. The same probes yield negative $R^2$ on base models, confirming that instruction tuning creates the representational structure encoding the collapse decision. Crucially, base models show no systematic collapse under identical constraints, with effects that are small, noisy, and bidirectional, demonstrating that instruction tuning creates this fragility by coupling task competence to narrow surface-form templates. The effect replicates on MT-Bench across all eight task categories. We further show that standard independent LLM-as-judge evaluation detects only a 3.5% average quality drop where pairwise evaluation reveals 23%, exposing a methodological blind spot in how constrained generation is assessed.

</details>


### [239] [Better and Worse with Scale: How Contextual Entrainment Diverges with Model Size](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13275)
*Dikshant Kukreja,Kshitij Sah,Gautam Gupta,Avinash Anand,Rajiv Ratn Shah,Zhengkui Wang,Aik Beng Ng,Erik Cambria*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 语言模型规模增大时，对上下文信息的处理呈现矛盾趋势：更能抵抗错误信息，却更易复制无关标记。作者通过上下文"牵引"（entrainment）的缩放定律揭示了这一现象。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究大型语言模型在处理上下文信息时出现的矛盾现象：模型规模增大时，一方面更能抵抗错误主张，另一方面却更易被无关标记干扰。需要理解这种看似矛盾的行为背后的机制。

Method: 提出首个上下文牵引的缩放定律，分析Cerebras-GPT（111M-13B）和Pythia（410M-12B）模型家族。研究两种上下文类型：语义上下文和非语义上下文，测量模型在不同规模下对上下文标记的倾向性。

Result: 发现牵引行为遵循可预测的幂律缩放，但趋势相反：语义上下文的牵引随规模增大而减小，非语义上下文的牵引随规模增大而增加。最大模型比最小模型抵抗错误信息的能力强4倍，但复制任意标记的倾向性高2倍。这些趋势在不同模型家族中都能复现。

Conclusion: 语义过滤和机械复制是功能上不同的行为，它们以相反的方式随规模缩放。单纯的规模扩大并不能解决上下文敏感性问题，而是重塑了这种敏感性。这表明模型规模增大时，对上下文信息的处理能力发生了质的变化而非简单的线性改进。

Abstract: Larger language models become simultaneously better and worse at handling contextual information -- better at ignoring false claims, worse at ignoring irrelevant tokens. We formalize this apparent paradox through the first scaling laws for contextual entrainment, the tendency of models to favor tokens that appeared in context regardless of relevance. Analyzing the Cerebras-GPT (111M-13B) and Pythia (410M-12B) model families, we find entrainment follows predictable power-law scaling, but with opposite trends depending on context type: semantic contexts show decreasing entrainment with scale, while non-semantic contexts show increasing entrainment. Concretely, the largest models are four times more resistant to counterfactual misinformation than the smallest, yet simultaneously twice as prone to copying arbitrary tokens. These diverging trends, which replicate across model families, suggest that semantic filtering and mechanical copying are functionally distinct behaviors that scale in opposition -- scaling alone does not resolve context sensitivity, it reshapes it.

</details>


### [240] [Round-Trip Translation Reveals What Frontier Multilingual Benchmarks Miss](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12911)
*Ronald Skorobogat,Ameya Prabhu,Matthias Bethge*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该论文指出当前多语言基准测试主要评估数学推理和事实回忆能力而非真正的多语言熟练度，提出使用往返翻译作为替代评估方法，并创建了LiT基准测试。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前前沿模型的多语言评估主要基于类似推理和知识基准的结构，但这些基准实际上测量的是数学推理和事实回忆能力，而非真正的多语言熟练度。这导致模型在这些基准上表现良好，但在真实世界多语言任务中表现不佳。

Method: 提出使用往返翻译作为多语言能力评估方法：将源语言文本翻译到目标语言再翻译回来，通过原始文本与结果之间的语义差距来暴露多语言生成能力的缺陷。该方法不需要人工参考翻译，也不需要比测试模型更强大的多语言评判者。

Result: 往返翻译方法与LMArena上的用户评分几乎完美相关（ρ = 0.94）。该方法能有效评估真实的多语言能力，避免了传统基准测试的偏差。此外，作者创建了Lost in Translation（LiT）基准测试，涵盖全球广泛使用的语言，用于现实评估多语言前沿模型。

Conclusion: 往返翻译是评估多语言能力的有效替代方法，能更准确地反映模型在真实世界多语言任务中的表现。LiT基准测试为多语言前沿模型提供了更现实的评估框架。

Abstract: Multilingual benchmarks guide the development of frontier models. Yet multilingual evaluations reported by frontier models are structured similar to popular reasoning and knowledge benchmarks, but across many languages. We show such benchmarks, and consequently multilingual evaluations, measure mathematical reasoning and factual recall, not multilingual proficiency. For example, thinking variants dramatically outperform instruct variants on these benchmarks, yet often perform worse on real-world multilingual tasks, such as LMArena. We propose a simple alternative: evaluate multilingual capability via round-trip translation. Given text in a source language, translate it to a target language and back; semantic gaps between the original and result expose failures in multilingual generation capabilities. Round-trip translation correlates almost perfectly (\r{ho} = 0.94) with user ratings on LMArena with our benchmark, requires no human reference translations, and does not require a more capable multilingual judge than tested models. Lastly, we introduce Lost in Translation (LiT), a challenging round-trip translation benchmark spanning widely spoken languages worldwide, for realistic evaluation of multilingual frontier models.

</details>


### [241] [Learning Chain Of Thoughts Prompts for Predicting Entities, Relations, and even Literals on Knowledge Graphs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12651)
*Alkid Baci,Luke Friedrichs,Caglar Demir,N'Dah Jean Kouagou,Axel-Cyrille Ngonga Ngomo*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: RALP将知识图谱链接预测重新定义为提示学习问题，通过贝叶斯优化学习字符串提示作为三元组评分函数，在少量训练样本下显著提升KGE模型性能并增强泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统知识图谱嵌入模型在处理未见实体、关系和字面值时表现不佳，限制了其在动态异构图中的应用。而预训练大语言模型通过提示具有更好的泛化能力，因此需要探索基于提示的LLM推理作为嵌入方法的灵活替代方案。

Method: RALP将链接预测重新定义为提示学习问题，学习基于字符串的思维链提示作为三元组评分函数。使用MIPRO算法进行贝叶斯优化，仅需少于30个训练样本即可识别有效提示，无需梯度访问。推理时预测缺失的实体、关系或完整三元组，并根据学习到的提示分配置信度分数。

Result: 在传导式、数值和OWL实例检索基准测试中，RALP将最先进KGE模型的MRR提升了超过5%。在具有复杂类表达式的OWL推理任务中，实现了超过88%的Jaccard相似度。通过高质量推断的三元组增强了泛化能力。

Conclusion: 基于提示的LLM推理是嵌入方法的灵活替代方案，RALP在少量训练样本下显著提升了链接预测性能，特别是在处理复杂推理任务时表现出色。研究提供了开源实现和评估流程。

Abstract: Knowledge graph embedding (KGE) models perform well on link prediction but struggle with unseen entities, relations, and especially literals, limiting their use in dynamic, heterogeneous graphs. In contrast, pretrained large language models (LLMs) generalize effectively through prompting. We reformulate link prediction as a prompt learning problem and introduce RALP, which learns string-based chain-of-thought (CoT) prompts as scoring functions for triples. Using Bayesian Optimization through MIPRO algorithm, RALP identifies effective prompts from fewer than 30 training examples without gradient access. At inference, RALP predicts missing entities, relations or whole triples and assigns confidence scores based on the learned prompt. We evaluate on transductive, numerical, and OWL instance retrieval benchmarks. RALP improves state-of-the-art KGE models by over 5% MRR across datasets and enhances generalization via high-quality inferred triples. On OWL reasoning tasks with complex class expressions (e.g., $\exists hasChild.Female$, $\geq 5 \; hasChild.Female$), it achieves over 88% Jaccard similarity. These results highlight prompt-based LLM reasoning as a flexible alternative to embedding-based methods. We release our implementation, training, and evaluation pipeline as open source: https://github.com/dice-group/RALP .

</details>


### [242] [Decoding by Perturbation: Mitigating MLLM Hallucinations via Dynamic Textual Perturbation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12424)
*Sihang Jia,Shuliang Liu,Songbo Yang,Yibo Yan,Xin Zou,Xuming Hu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出DeP框架，通过文本扰动缓解多模态大语言模型中的推理幻觉问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多模态大语言模型经常遭受推理幻觉，部分原因是语言先验主导了视觉证据。现有免训练缓解方法要么扰动视觉表示偏离自然图像分布，要么进行侵入性操作损害模型生成流畅性

Method: 提出解码时扰动(DeP)框架，通过受控文本干预缓解先验诱导的幻觉。使用动态探针应用多级文本扰动来引出潜在语言先验，利用注意力方差增强稳定证据区域并抑制特征空间中的可疑噪声，构建可解释的先验漂移方向来抵消文本共现的概率偏差

Result: 大量实验证实DeP有效减少幻觉，在多个基准测试中取得优越性能

Conclusion: 多模态幻觉表现为解码阶段视觉基础对文本措辞的过敏反应，DeP框架通过文本扰动有效缓解了这一问题

Abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models frequently suffer from inference hallucinations, partially stemming from language priors dominating visual evidence. Existing training-free mitigation methods either perturb the visual representation and deviate from the natural image distribution, or enforce intrusive manipulations that compromise the model's inherent generative fluency. We introduce a novel perspective that multimodal hallucination manifests as the hypersensitivity of visual grounding to textual phrasing during the decoding phase. Building on this insight, we propose Decoding by Perturbation (DeP), a training-free framework mitigating prior-induced hallucinations via controlled textual interventions. DeP employs a dynamic probe applying multi-level textual perturbations to elicit latent language priors. Leveraging attention variance, it enhances stable evidence regions while suppressing suspicious noise in the feature space. Furthermore, it constructs an interpretable prior drift direction using logits statistics to counteract probability biases from textual co-occurrences. Extensive experiments confirm DeP effectively reduces hallucinations and achieves superior performance across multiple benchmarks.

</details>


### [243] [When Does Data Augmentation Help? Evaluating LLM and Back-Translation Methods for Hausa and Fongbe NLP](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12540)
*Mahounan Pericles Adjovi,Roald Eiselen,Prasenjit Mitra*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 评估LLM生成和回译两种数据增强方法对豪萨语和丰语NER和词性标注任务的效果，发现增强效果取决于任务类型而非语言或LLM质量


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 非洲低资源语言面临数据稀缺问题，限制了NLP发展。需要评估不同数据增强方法在真实低资源语言场景下的有效性，特别是当LLM生成质量存在差异时

Method: 使用两种数据增强方法：1) LLM生成（Gemini 2.5 Flash）和2) 回译（NLLB-200）。在豪萨语和丰语两种西非语言上评估，这两种语言在LLM生成质量上存在显著差异。使用MasakhaNER 2.0和MasakhaPOS基准测试评估命名实体识别和词性标注任务

Result: 增强效果主要取决于任务类型而非语言或LLM质量。对于NER任务，两种方法均未改善基线性能：LLM增强使豪萨语NER降低0.24% F1，丰语NER降低1.81% F1。对于词性标注，LLM增强使丰语准确率提高0.33%，回译使豪萨语提高0.17%；回译使丰语词性标注降低0.35%，对豪萨语影响可忽略。同一LLM生成的合成数据在丰语的不同任务中产生相反效果：损害NER但帮助词性标注

Conclusion: 研究挑战了LLM生成质量预测增强成功的假设，表明数据增强应被视为任务特定的干预措施而非普遍有益的预处理步骤。任务结构比合成数据质量更能决定增强结果

Abstract: Data scarcity limits NLP development for low-resource African languages. We evaluate two data augmentation methods -- LLM-based generation (Gemini 2.5 Flash) and back-translation (NLLB-200) -- for Hausa and Fongbe, two West African languages that differ substantially in LLM generation quality. We assess augmentation on named entity recognition (NER) and part-of-speech (POS) tagging using MasakhaNER 2.0 and MasakhaPOS benchmarks. Our results reveal that augmentation effectiveness depends on task type rather than language or LLM quality alone. For NER, neither method improves over baseline for either language; LLM augmentation reduces Hausa NER by 0.24% F1 and Fongbe NER by 1.81% F1. For POS tagging, LLM augmentation improves Fongbe by 0.33% accuracy, while back-translation improves Hausa by 0.17%; back-translation reduces Fongbe POS by 0.35% and has negligible effect on Hausa POS. The same LLM-generated synthetic data produces opposite effects across tasks for Fongbe -- hurting NER while helping POS -- suggesting task structure governs augmentation outcomes more than synthetic data quality. These findings challenge the assumption that LLM generation quality predicts augmentation success, and provide actionable guidance: data augmentation should be treated as a task-specific intervention rather than a universally beneficial preprocessing step.

</details>


### [244] [Topology-Aware Reasoning over Incomplete Knowledge Graph with Graph-Based Soft Prompting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12503)
*Shuai Wang,Xixi Wang,Yinan Yu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出基于图的软提示框架，将多跳知识库问答从节点级路径遍历转向子图级推理，通过GNN编码结构子图生成软提示，降低对知识图谱不完整性的敏感度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型在知识密集型场景中容易产生幻觉，知识库问答通过知识图谱进行基础生成可以缓解此问题。然而，现有多跳KBQA方法依赖显式边遍历，对知识图谱不完整性敏感且脆弱。

Method: 提出图基软提示框架：1) 使用GNN编码提取的结构子图生成软提示，使LLM能在更丰富的结构上下文中推理；2) 引入两阶段范式：轻量级LLM利用软提示识别问题相关实体和关系，再由更强大的LLM进行证据感知的答案生成。

Result: 在四个多跳KBQA基准测试中，该方法在三个基准上实现了最先进的性能，证明了其有效性。

Conclusion: 该框架通过子图级推理而非节点级路径遍历，显著降低了对知识图谱不完整性的敏感度，同时通过两阶段设计平衡了计算成本与性能。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown remarkable capabilities across various tasks but remain prone to hallucinations in knowledge-intensive scenarios. Knowledge Base Question Answering (KBQA) mitigates this by grounding generation in Knowledge Graphs (KGs). However, most multi-hop KBQA methods rely on explicit edge traversal, making them fragile to KG incompleteness. In this paper, we proposed a novel graph-based soft prompting framework that shifts the reasoning paradigm from node-level path traversal to subgraph-level reasoning. Specifically, we employ a Graph Neural Network (GNN) to encode extracted structural subgraphs into soft prompts, enabling LLM to reason over richer structural context and identify relevant entities beyond immediate graph neighbors, thereby reducing sensitivity to missing edges. Furthermore, we introduce a two-stage paradigm that reduces computational cost while preserving good performance: a lightweight LLM first leverages the soft prompts to identify question-relevant entities and relations, followed by a more powerful LLM for evidence-aware answer generation. Experiments on four multi-hop KBQA benchmarks show that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on three of them, demonstrating its effectiveness. Code is available at the repository: https://github.com/Wangshuaiia/GraSP.

</details>


### [245] [Latent Planning Emerges with Scale](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12493)
*Michael Hanna,Emmanuel Ameisen*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该论文研究了LLMs中的潜在规划能力，发现规划能力随模型规模增长而增强，并提出了测量规划能力的框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究LLMs在执行看似需要规划的任务时，是否以及如何进行内部规划，以及这种规划能力如何随模型规模变化。

Method: 定义潜在规划的概念，在简单规划任务上测试Qwen-3系列模型(0.6B-14B)，分析模型特征表示，研究押韵对句完成等复杂任务。

Result: 发现潜在规划能力随模型规模增加而增强；模型具有代表计划词汇的特征，影响冠词选择；大型模型能提前识别押韵词但很少进行长远规划；通过引导可增强规划能力。

Conclusion: 提出了测量LLMs规划能力的框架，提供了规划能力随模型规模增长的机制证据，表明规划能力是模型规模的可扩展特性。

Abstract: LLMs can perform seemingly planning-intensive tasks, like writing coherent stories or functioning code, without explicitly verbalizing a plan; however, the extent to which they implicitly plan is unknown. In this paper, we define latent planning as occurring when LLMs possess internal planning representations that (1) cause the generation of a specific future token or concept, and (2) shape preceding context to license said future token or concept. We study the Qwen-3 family (0.6B-14B) on simple planning tasks, finding that latent planning ability increases with scale. Models that plan possess features that represent a planned-for word like "accountant", and cause them to output "an" rather than "a"; moreover, even the less-successful Qwen-3 4B-8B have nascent planning mechanisms. On the more complex task of completing rhyming couplets, we find that models often identify a rhyme ahead of time, but even large models seldom plan far ahead. However, we can elicit some planning that increases with scale when steering models towards planned words in prose. In sum, we offer a framework for measuring planning and mechanistic evidence of how models' planning abilities grow with scale.

</details>


### [246] [KG-Reasoner: A Reinforced Model for End-to-End Multi-Hop Knowledge Graph Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12487)
*Shuai Wang,Yinan Yu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: KG-Reasoner：一个通过强化学习训练LLM内部化知识图谱遍历过程，实现动态多跳推理的端到端框架


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法将多跳推理分解为固定流水线的孤立步骤，限制了推理灵活性，导致决策过程碎片化、中间信息丢失和推理不连贯

Method: 提出KG-Reasoner端到端框架，将多步推理整合到推理LLM的统一"思考"阶段，通过强化学习训练LLM内部化KG遍历过程，支持动态路径探索和必要时的回溯

Result: 在8个多跳和知识密集型推理基准测试中，KG-Reasoner达到或超越了最先进方法的性能

Conclusion: 通过将KG遍历过程内部化到LLM中，KG-Reasoner实现了更灵活、连贯的多跳推理，为知识密集型任务提供了有效解决方案

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) exhibit strong abilities in natural language understanding and generation, yet they struggle with knowledge-intensive reasoning. Structured Knowledge Graphs (KGs) provide an effective form of external knowledge representation and have been widely used to enhance performance in classical Knowledge Base Question Answering (KBQA) tasks. However, performing precise multi-hop reasoning over KGs for complex queries remains highly challenging. Most existing approaches decompose the reasoning process into a sequence of isolated steps executed through a fixed pipeline. While effective to some extent, such designs constrain reasoning flexibility and fragment the overall decision process, often leading to incoherence and the loss of critical intermediate information from earlier steps. In this paper, we introduce KG-Reasoner, an end-to-end framework that integrates multi-step reasoning into a unified "thinking" phase of a Reasoning LLM. Through Reinforcement Learning (RL), the LLM is trained to internalize the KG traversal process, enabling it to dynamically explore reasoning paths, and perform backtracking when necessary. Experiments on eight multi-hop and knowledge-intensive reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that KG-Reasoner achieves competitive or superior performance compared to the state-of-the-art methods. Codes are available at the repository: https://github.com/Wangshuaiia/KG-Reasoner.

</details>


### [247] [Mining Large Language Models for Low-Resource Language Data: Comparing Elicitation Strategies for Hausa and Fongbe](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12477)
*Mahounan Pericles Adjovi,Roald Eiselen,Prasenjit Mitra*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 通过策略性提示从商业LLM中提取西非语言（豪萨语和丰语）文本数据的研究，比较不同提示策略的效果


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM在低资源语言社区数据上训练，但其语言知识仅通过商业API访问，需要探索如何提取这些语言的可使用文本数据

Method: 系统比较六种提示任务类型，在两个商业LLM（GPT-4o Mini和Gemini 2.5 Flash）上测试，针对豪萨语和丰语进行策略性提示

Result: GPT-4o Mini每个API调用提取的目标语言可用词数是Gemini的6-41倍；豪萨语适合功能文本和对话提示，丰语需要约束生成提示

Conclusion: 策略性提示可有效从商业LLM提取低资源语言数据，不同语言需要不同的最优提示策略，研究公开了生成的语料库和代码

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are trained on data contributed by low-resource language communities, yet the linguistic knowledge encoded in these models remains accessible only through commercial APIs. This paper investigates whether strategic prompting can extract usable text data from LLMs for two West African languages: Hausa (Afroasiatic, approximately 80 million speakers) and Fongbe (Niger-Congo, approximately 2 million speakers). We systematically compare six elicitation task types across two commercial LLMs (GPT-4o Mini and Gemini 2.5 Flash). GPT-4o Mini extracts 6-41 times more usable target-language words per API call than Gemini. Optimal strategies differ by language: Hausa benefits from functional text and dialogue, while Fongbe requires constrained generation prompts. We release all generated corpora and code.

</details>


### [248] [SCRIPT: A Subcharacter Compositional Representation Injection Module for Korean Pre-Trained Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12377)
*SungHo Kim,Juhyeong Park,Eda Atalay,SangKeun Lee*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: SCRIPT是一个模型无关的模块，通过注入子字符组合知识来增强韩语预训练语言模型，无需架构修改或额外预训练，在多项NLU和NLG任务上提升性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 韩语是形态丰富的语言，其表音文字系统具有子字符单位（Jamo），这些子字符不仅决定韩语的视觉结构，还编码频繁且有语言学意义的形态音系过程。然而，当前大多数韩语语言模型基于子词分词方案，并未明确设计来捕捉字符的内部组合结构。

Method: 提出SCRIPT模型，这是一个模型无关的模块，能够将子字符组合知识注入韩语预训练语言模型。SCRIPT通过增强子词嵌入的结构粒度来实现，无需改变模型架构或进行额外预训练。

Result: SCRIPT在所有基线模型上均提升了性能，覆盖多种韩语自然语言理解（NLU）和自然语言生成（NLG）任务。此外，详细的语言学分析表明，SCRIPT重塑了嵌入空间，使其更好地捕捉语法规律和语义连贯的变体。

Conclusion: SCRIPT通过注入韩语子字符组合知识有效增强了现有预训练语言模型，不仅提升了任务性能，还改善了嵌入空间的语义和语法表示质量，为韩语NLP提供了更精细的语言结构建模方法。

Abstract: Korean is a morphologically rich language with a featural writing system in which each character is systematically composed of subcharacter units known as Jamo. These subcharacters not only determine the visual structure of Korean but also encode frequent and linguistically meaningful morphophonological processes. However, most current Korean language models (LMs) are based on subword tokenization schemes, which are not explicitly designed to capture the internal compositional structure of characters. To address this limitation, we propose SCRIPT, a model-agnostic module that injects subcharacter compositional knowledge into Korean PLMs. SCRIPT allows to enhance subword embeddings with structural granularity, without requiring architectural changes or additional pre-training. As a result, SCRIPT enhances all baselines across various Korean natural language understanding (NLU) and generation (NLG) tasks. Moreover, beyond performance gains, detailed linguistic analyses show that SCRIPT reshapes the embedding space in a way that better captures grammatical regularities and semantically cohesive variations. Our code is available at https://github.com/SungHo3268/SCRIPT.

</details>


### [249] [Cooperative Memory Paging with Keyword Bookmarks for Long-Horizon LLM Conversations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12376)
*Ziyang Liu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 论文提出合作式分页机制：当LLM对话超出上下文窗口时，用关键词书签（8-24个token）替换被淘汰的内容，并提供recall()工具按需检索完整内容，在LoCoMo基准测试中优于多种基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当LLM对话长度超过上下文窗口限制时，旧内容必须被淘汰，但模型如何在需要时恢复这些信息？现有方法（截断、检索等）存在局限性，需要一种更有效的长对话记忆管理机制。

Method: 提出合作式分页机制：1) 将淘汰的内容段替换为简洁的关键词书签（[pN:keywords]格式）；2) 为模型提供recall()工具来按需检索完整内容；3) 通过系统实验研究分页设计空间，包括边界策略（固定大小vs主题转移）和淘汰策略（FIFO、LFU等）。

Result: 在LoCoMo基准测试（10个真实多轮对话，300+轮次）中，合作式分页在四个模型（GPT-4o-mini、DeepSeek-v3.2、Claude Haiku、GLM-5）上均取得最高答案质量，优于截断、BM25、词重叠检索、搜索工具基线和完整上下文（p=0.017）。关键发现：1) 粗粒度固定大小分页（fixed_20）达到96.7%准确率，而基于主题转移的分页仅56.7%；2) 淘汰策略选择依赖数据特性；3) 两种书签生成策略相比启发式基线分别提升4.4和8.7个E2E点；4) 主要瓶颈是书签区分度不足。

Conclusion: 合作式分页是管理长对话记忆的有效方法，通过关键词书签和按需检索机制实现了上下文的高效管理。未来工作应关注提高书签的区分度，因为关键词特异性单独就影响25个百分点的准确率差异。

Abstract: When LLM conversations grow beyond the context window, old content must be evicted -- but how does the model recover it when needed? We propose cooperative paging: evicted segments are replaced with minimal keyword bookmarks ([pN:keywords], ~8-24 tokens each), and the model is given a recall() tool to retrieve full content on demand. On the LoCoMo benchmark (10 real multi-session conversations, 300+ turns), cooperative paging achieves the highest answer quality among six methods -- outperforming truncation, BM25, word-overlap retrieval, a search-tool baseline, and full context -- on four models (GPT-4o-mini, DeepSeek-v3.2, Claude Haiku, GLM-5), confirmed by four independent LLM judges ($p=0.017$, paired bootstrap). We then study the paging design space with a 5x4 ablation over boundary strategies and eviction policies (3,176 synthetic probes, 1,600 LoCoMo probes). Key findings: (1) coarse fixed-size pages (fixed_20) reach 96.7% while content-aware topic_shift collapses to 56.7%; (2) eviction policy choice is data-dependent (FIFO best on synthetic, LFU on LoCoMo); (3) two bookmark generation strategies improve over the heuristic baseline (+4.4 and +8.7 E2E points); (4) the remaining bottleneck is bookmark discrimination -- the model triggers recall() 96% of the time but selects the correct page only 57% when bookmarks are insufficiently distinctive. Keyword specificity alone accounts for a 25 percentage point accuracy difference.

</details>


### [250] [Benchmarking Deflection and Hallucination in Large Vision-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12033)
*Nicholas Moratelli,Christopher Davis,Leonardo F. R. Ribeiro,Bill Byrne,Gonzalo Iglesias*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出了VLM-DeflectionBench基准测试，用于评估大型视觉语言模型在知识检索中的偏转能力，解决现有基准在视觉-文本证据冲突、偏转生成和快速过时等问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准测试存在三个主要问题：1) 忽视视觉与文本证据之间的冲突；2) 未评估模型在检索知识不完整时生成偏转回答（如"抱歉，我无法回答..."）的能力；3) 基准快速过时，因为LVLM训练集增长使得模型无需检索即可回答许多问题

Method: 提出三个贡献：1) 动态数据筛选流程，通过过滤真正依赖检索的样本来保持基准难度；2) VLM-DeflectionBench基准，包含2,775个样本，涵盖多种多模态检索场景；3) 细粒度评估协议，包含四种场景，区分参数记忆与检索鲁棒性

Result: 对20个最先进的LVLM进行实验表明，模型在面对噪声或误导性证据时通常无法正确偏转。结果强调需要评估模型不知道时的行为，而不仅仅是知道什么

Conclusion: 该工作为可靠的KB-VQA评估提供了可重用且可扩展的基准，所有资源将在发表后公开。研究突出了评估模型在知识不完整时行为的重要性

Abstract: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) increasingly rely on retrieval to answer knowledge-intensive multimodal questions. Existing benchmarks overlook conflicts between visual and textual evidence and the importance of generating deflections (e.g., Sorry, I cannot answer...) when retrieved knowledge is incomplete. These benchmarks also suffer from rapid obsolescence, as growing LVLM training sets allow models to answer many questions without retrieval. We address these gaps with three contributions. First, we propose a dynamic data curation pipeline that preserves benchmark difficulty over time by filtering for genuinely retrieval-dependent samples. Second, we introduce VLM-DeflectionBench, a benchmark of 2,775 samples spanning diverse multimodal retrieval settings, designed to probe model behaviour under conflicting or insufficient evidence. Third, we define a fine-grained evaluation protocol with four scenarios that disentangle parametric memorization from retrieval robustness. Experiments across 20 state-of-the-art LVLMs indicate that models usually fail to deflect in the presence of noisy or misleading evidence. Our results highlight the need to evaluate not only what models know, but how they behave when they do not, and serve as a reusable and extensible benchmark for reliable KB-VQA evaluation. All resources will be publicly available upon publication.

</details>


### [251] [LLM-Guided Semantic Bootstrapping for Interpretable Text Classification with Tsetlin Machines](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12223)
*Jiechao Gao,Rohan Kumar Yadav,Yuangang Li,Yuandong Pan,Jie Wang,Ying Liu,Michael Lepech*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出语义引导框架，将大语言模型知识转移到符号模型，结合可解释性与语义能力，无需嵌入或运行时LLM调用


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 预训练语言模型（如BERT）提供强语义表示但成本高且不透明，而符号模型（如Tsetlin Machine）提供透明度但缺乏语义泛化能力。需要结合两者的优势

Method: 语义引导框架：1) LLM根据类别标签生成子意图；2) 通过三阶段课程（种子、核心、丰富）创建合成数据扩展语义多样性；3) 非否定Tsetlin Machine从示例中提取高置信度字面量作为可解释语义线索；4) 将这些线索注入真实数据，使TM子句逻辑与LLM推断语义对齐

Result: 在多个文本分类任务中，相比原始TM提高了可解释性和准确性，性能接近BERT，同时保持完全符号化和高效

Conclusion: 该框架成功将LLM知识转移到符号模型，使符号模型具备预训练语义先验，无需嵌入或运行时LLM调用，实现了可解释性与语义能力的结合

Abstract: Pretrained language models (PLMs) like BERT provide strong semantic representations but are costly and opaque, while symbolic models such as the Tsetlin Machine (TM) offer transparency but lack semantic generalization. We propose a semantic bootstrapping framework that transfers LLM knowledge into symbolic form, combining interpretability with semantic capacity. Given a class label, an LLM generates sub-intents that guide synthetic data creation through a three-stage curriculum (seed, core, enriched), expanding semantic diversity. A Non-Negated TM (NTM) learns from these examples to extract high-confidence literals as interpretable semantic cues. Injecting these cues into real data enables a TM to align clause logic with LLM-inferred semantics. Our method requires no embeddings or runtime LLM calls, yet equips symbolic models with pretrained semantic priors. Across multiple text classification tasks, it improves interpretability and accuracy over vanilla TM, achieving performance comparable to BERT while remaining fully symbolic and efficient.

</details>


### [252] [CascadeDebate: Multi-Agent Deliberation for Cost-Aware LLM Cascades](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12262)
*Raeyoung Chang,Dongwook Kwon,Jisoo Lee,Nikhil Verma*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: CascadeDebate提出了一种新的级联LLM系统架构，通过在每层升级边界引入多智能体审议机制，动态调整计算资源分配，显著提升了系统性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统级联LLM系统在每层使用单一模型，面对模糊查询时容易因信心不足而触发过早升级到更昂贵模型或专家，导致计算效率低下和成本增加。

Method: 设计统一架构，在置信度路由器检测到不确定案例时激活轻量级智能体集合进行多智能体审议，通过共识驱动解决内部歧义，避免调用高成本升级，最终以人类专家作为后备方案。

Result: 在涵盖科学、医学和常识的五个基准测试中，CascadeDebate比强基线级联系统和独立多智能体系统性能提升高达26.75%。在线阈值优化器使准确率相对固定策略提升20.98%至52.33%。

Conclusion: CascadeDebate通过将多智能体审议集成到级联边界，实现了根据查询难度动态扩展测试时计算资源，显著提升了级联LLM系统的准确性和效率。

Abstract: Cascaded LLM systems coordinate models of varying sizes with human experts to balance accuracy, cost, and abstention under uncertainty. However, single-model tiers at each stage often struggle with ambiguous queries, triggering premature escalations to costlier models or experts due to under-confidence and inefficient compute scaling. CascadeDebate addresses this gap by inserting multi-agent deliberation directly at each tier's escalation boundary. Confidence-based routers activate lightweight agent ensembles only for uncertain cases, enabling consensus-driven resolution of ambiguities internally without invoking higher-cost upgrades. Our unified architecture alternates single-model inference with selective multi-agent deliberation across model scales, culminating in human experts as the final fallback. This design scales test-time compute dynamically according to query difficulty. Across five benchmarks spanning science, medicine, and general knowledge, CascadeDebate outperforms strong single-model cascades and standalone multi-agent systems by up to 26.75 percent. An online threshold optimizer proves essential, boosting accuracy by 20.98 to 52.33 percent relative improvement over fixed policies and enabling elastic adaptation to real-world distributions.

</details>


### [253] [Continuous Knowledge Metabolism: Generating Scientific Hypotheses from Evolving Literature](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12243)
*Jinkai Tao,Yubo Wang,Xiaoyu Liu,Menglin Yang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: CKM框架通过滑动时间窗口增量处理科学文献，CKM-Lite在预测覆盖率和效率上优于批处理，CKM-Full揭示知识变化类型影响假设生成质量与覆盖率之间的权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 科学假设生成需要跟踪知识如何演化，而不仅仅是当前已知内容。现有方法通常基于静态知识库，无法捕捉科学知识的动态演变过程。

Method: 提出连续知识代谢(CKM)框架，通过滑动时间窗口增量处理科学文献，更新结构化知识库。开发CKM-Lite（高效变体）和CKM-Full（全仪器化变体），后者能分类新发现为新颖、确认或矛盾，检测知识变化信号，并在完整演化轨迹上生成假设。

Result: CKM-Lite在命中率(+2.8%)、假设产量(+3.6)和最佳匹配对齐(+0.43)上优于批处理，同时减少92%的token成本。CKM-Full分析显示：增量处理优于批处理基线；变化感知与更高新颖性相关但预测覆盖率较低；领域轨迹稳定性与假设成功相关；知识收敛信号的命中率比矛盾信号高近5倍。

Conclusion: 生成的假设特征不仅取决于处理文献的数量，还取决于处理方式。评估框架必须考虑质量-覆盖率权衡，而不是优化单一指标。知识变化类型对假设预测性有显著影响。

Abstract: Scientific hypothesis generation requires tracking how knowledge evolves, not just what is currently known. We introduce Continuous Knowledge Metabolism (CKM), a framework that processes scientific literature through sliding time windows and incrementally updates a structured knowledge base as new findings arrive. We present CKM-Lite, an efficient variant that achieves strong predictive coverage through incremental accumulation, outperforming batch processing on hit rate (+2.8%, p=0.006), hypothesis yield (+3.6, p<0.001), and best-match alignment (+0.43, p<0.001) while reducing token cost by 92%. To understand what drives these differences, we develop CKM-Full, an instrumented variant that categorizes each new finding as novel, confirming, or contradicting, detects knowledge change signals, and conditions hypothesis generation on the full evolution trajectory. Analyzing 892 hypotheses generated by CKM-Full across 50 research topics, alongside parallel runs of the other variants, we report four empirical observations: (1) incremental processing outperforms batch baseline across predictive and efficiency metrics; (2) change-aware instrumentation is associated with higher LLM-judged novelty (Cohen's d=3.46) but lower predictive coverage, revealing a quality-coverage trade-off; (3) a field's trajectory stability is associated with hypothesis success (r=-0.28, p=0.051), suggesting boundary conditions for literature-based prediction; (4) knowledge convergence signals are associated with nearly 5x higher hit rate than contradiction signals, pointing to differential predictability across change types. These findings suggest that the character of generated hypotheses is shaped not only by how much literature is processed, but also by how it is processed. They further indicate that evaluation frameworks must account for the quality-coverage trade-off rather than optimize for a single metric.

</details>


### [254] [Robust Explanations for User Trust in Enterprise NLP Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12069)
*Guilin Zhang,Kai Zhao,Jeffrey Friedman,Xu Chu,Amine Anoun,Jerry Ting*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出统一的黑盒鲁棒性评估框架，用于评估token级解释在真实噪声下的稳定性，通过跨架构比较发现解码器LLM比编码器基线产生更稳定的解释，且稳定性随模型规模提升，最终建立成本-鲁棒性权衡曲线支持部署前模型选择。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 企业NLP中需要鲁棒的解释来建立用户信任，但在黑盒部署（仅API访问）场景下，预部署验证困难，现有研究对解释在真实用户噪声下的稳定性缺乏指导，特别是当组织从编码器分类器迁移到解码器LLM时。

Method: 提出基于留一遮挡的统一黑盒鲁棒性评估框架，通过现实扰动（替换、删除、重排和回译）在多个严重级别下，使用top-token翻转率来操作化解释鲁棒性。在三个基准数据集和六个模型（BERT、RoBERTa、Qwen 7B/14B、Llama 8B/70B）上进行系统跨架构比较，共64,800个案例。

Result: 解码器LLM比编码器基线产生显著更稳定的解释（平均翻转率降低73%），且稳定性随模型规模提升（从7B到70B提升44%）。将鲁棒性改进与推理成本关联，得到实用的成本-鲁棒性权衡曲线。

Conclusion: 该框架为黑盒部署场景下的解释鲁棒性评估提供了系统方法，发现解码器LLM在解释稳定性方面优于编码器模型，且规模效应明显。成本-鲁棒性权衡曲线为合规敏感应用中的模型和解释选择提供了实用指导。

Abstract: Robust explanations are increasingly required for user trust in enterprise NLP, yet pre-deployment validation is difficult in the common case of black-box deployment (API-only access) where representation-based explainers are infeasible and existing studies provide limited guidance on whether explanations remain stable under real user noise, especially when organizations migrate from encoder classifiers to decoder LLMs. To close this gap, we propose a unified black-box robustness evaluation framework for token-level explanations based on leave-one-out occlusion, and operationalize explanation robustness with top-token flip rate under realistic perturbations (swap, deletion, shuffling, and back-translation) at multiple severity levels. Using this protocol, we conduct a systematic cross-architecture comparison across three benchmark datasets and six models spanning encoder and decoder families (BERT, RoBERTa, Qwen 7B/14B, Llama 8B/70B; 64,800 cases). We find that decoder LLMs produce substantially more stable explanations than encoder baselines (73% lower flip rates on average), and that stability improves with model scale (44% gain from 7B to 70B). Finally, we relate robustness improvements to inference cost, yielding a practical cost-robustness tradeoff curve that supports model and explanation selection prior to deployment in compliance-sensitive applications.

</details>


### [255] [LoSA: Locality Aware Sparse Attention for Block-Wise Diffusion Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12056)
*Haocheng Xi,Harman Singh,Yuezhou Hu,Coleman Hooper,Rishabh Tiwari,Aditya Tomar,Minjae Lee,Wonjun Kang,Michael Mahoney,Chenfeng Xu,Kurt Keutzer,Amir Gholami*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: LOSA是一种针对块式扩散语言模型的局部感知稀疏注意力机制，通过重用稳定令牌的缓存前缀注意力结果，仅对活跃令牌应用稀疏注意力，显著减少KV索引加载，在保持接近密集注意力精度的同时大幅提升效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 块式扩散语言模型（DLMs）在长上下文场景中仍然受限于内存绑定的注意力机制。传统的稀疏注意力方法在DLMs上存在KV膨胀问题，即不同查询选择不同的前缀位置，导致访问的KV页面联合集过大。

Method: 提出LOSA（局部感知稀疏注意力），观察到在连续去噪步骤之间，只有一小部分活跃令牌的隐藏状态发生显著变化，而大多数稳定令牌保持几乎恒定。基于此，LOSA重用稳定令牌的缓存前缀注意力结果，仅对活跃令牌应用稀疏注意力，从而大幅减少需要加载的KV索引数量。

Result: 在多个块式DLMs和基准测试中，LOSA在保持接近密集注意力精度的同时显著提升效率：在激进稀疏级别下平均准确率提升高达+9分，同时保持1.54倍更低的注意力密度；在RTX A6000 GPU上实现高达4.14倍的注意力加速。

Conclusion: LOSA通过利用块式扩散语言模型中令牌状态的局部性，有效解决了KV膨胀问题，在保持模型精度的同时显著提升了长上下文场景下的注意力计算效率，为扩散语言模型的实用化提供了有效的优化方案。

Abstract: Block-wise diffusion language models (DLMs) generate multiple tokens in any order, offering a promising alternative to the autoregressive decoding pipeline. However, they still remain bottlenecked by memory-bound attention in long-context scenarios. Naive sparse attention fails on DLMs due to a KV Inflation problem, where different queries select different prefix positions, making the union of accessed KV pages large. To address this, we observe that between consecutive denoising steps, only a small fraction of active tokens exhibit significant hidden-state changes, while the majority of stable tokens remain nearly constant. Based on this insight, we propose LOSA (Locality-aware Sparse Attention), which reuses cached prefix-attention results for stable tokens and applies sparse attention only to active tokens. This substantially shrinks the number of KV indices that must be loaded, yielding both higher speedup and higher accuracy. Across multiple block-wise DLMs and benchmarks, LOSA preserves near-dense accuracy while significantly improving efficiency, achieving up to +9 points in average accuracy at aggressive sparsity levels while maintaining 1.54x lower attention density. It also achieves up to 4.14x attention speedup on RTX A6000 GPUs, demonstrating the effectiveness of the proposed method.

</details>


### [256] [Narrative over Numbers: The Identifiable Victim Effect and its Amplification Under Alignment and Reasoning in Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12076)
*Syed Rifat Raiyan*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 研究发现大型语言模型存在显著的可识别受害者效应，其强度受对齐训练影响：指令微调模型表现出极端IVE，而推理专用模型则反转该效应。标准思维链提示会加剧IVE，只有功利主义思维链能消除它。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着大型语言模型在人道主义分类、自动资助评估和内容审核等关键领域承担重要角色，需要研究这些系统是否继承了人类道德推理中的情感非理性，特别是可识别受害者效应这一道德心理学和行为经济学中最稳健的发现。

Method: 对16个前沿模型（来自9个组织）进行了51,955次验证API试验，使用10个实验套件，移植并扩展了Small等人（2007）和Kogut与Ritov（2005）的经典范式，研究IVE在不同模型中的表现。

Result: IVE在LLMs中普遍存在但受对齐训练强烈调节：指令微调模型表现出极端IVE（Cohen's d高达1.56），推理专用模型则反转该效应（低至d=-0.85）。标准思维链提示使IVE效应量几乎增加三倍，只有功利主义思维链能可靠消除它。还记录了心理麻木、完全数量忽视和边际内外群体文化偏见。

Conclusion: LLMs确实继承了人类道德推理中的可识别受害者效应，且效应强度约为人类单受害者元分析基线的两倍。模型对齐训练和提示工程显著影响IVE表现，这对AI在人道主义和伦理决策环境中的部署具有重要启示。

Abstract: The Identifiable Victim Effect (IVE) $-$ the tendency to allocate greater resources to a specific, narratively described victim than to a statistically characterized group facing equivalent hardship $-$ is one of the most robust findings in moral psychology and behavioural economics. As large language models (LLMs) assume consequential roles in humanitarian triage, automated grant evaluation, and content moderation, a critical question arises: do these systems inherit the affective irrationalities present in human moral reasoning? We present the first systematic, large-scale empirical investigation of the IVE in LLMs, comprising N=51,955 validated API trials across 16 frontier models spanning nine organizational lineages (Google, Anthropic, OpenAI, Meta, DeepSeek, xAI, Alibaba, IBM, and Moonshot). Using a suite of ten experiments $-$ porting and extending canonical paradigms from Small et al. (2007) and Kogut and Ritov (2005) $-$ we find that the IVE is prevalent but strongly modulated by alignment training. Instruction-tuned models exhibit extreme IVE (Cohen's d up to 1.56), while reasoning-specialized models invert the effect (down to d=-0.85). The pooled effect (d=0.223, p=2e-6) is approximately twice the single-victim human meta-analytic baseline (d$\approx$0.10) reported by Lee and Feeley (2016) $-$ and likely exceeds the overall human pooled effect by a larger margin, given that the group-victim human effect is near zero. Standard Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompting $-$ contrary to its role as a deliberative corrective $-$ nearly triples the IVE effect size (from d=0.15 to d=0.41), while only utilitarian CoT reliably eliminates it. We further document psychophysical numbing, perfect quantity neglect, and marginal in-group/out-group cultural bias, with implications for AI deployment in humanitarian and ethical decision-making contexts.

</details>


### [257] [Leveraging Weighted Syntactic and Semantic Context Assessment Summary (wSSAS) Towards Text Categorization Using LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12049)
*Shreeya Verma Kathuria,Nitin Mayande,Sharookh Daruwalla,Nitin Joglekar,Charles Weber*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: wSSAS框架通过加权句法和语义上下文评估，为大规模文本分类提供确定性方法，显著提升LLM在文本分类中的准确性和可重复性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型在文本分类等企业级分析应用中存在注意力机制随机性和噪声敏感性问题，这影响了分析精度和结果可重复性，需要确定性框架来保证数据完整性。

Method: 提出wSSAS确定性框架，采用两阶段验证：首先将原始文本组织成主题-故事-聚类的层次分类结构，然后利用信噪比优先处理高价值语义特征，通过摘要的摘要架构结合评分机制隔离关键信息并减少背景噪声。

Result: 在Google商业评论、亚马逊产品评论和Goodreads图书评论等多样化数据集上使用Gemini 2.0 Flash Lite进行实验，wSSAS显著提高了聚类完整性和分类准确性，降低了分类熵。

Conclusion: wSSAS为基于LLM的摘要提供了可重复的改进路径，通过高精度确定性过程实现了大规模文本分类的可靠性和可重复性提升。

Abstract: The use of Large Language Models (LLMs) for reliable, enterprise-grade analytics such as text categorization is often hindered by the stochastic nature of attention mechanisms and sensitivity to noise that compromise their analytical precision and reproducibility. To address these technical frictions, this paper introduces the Weighted Syntactic and Semantic Context Assessment Summary (wSSAS), a deterministic framework designed to enforce data integrity on large-scale, chaotic datasets. We propose a two-phased validation framework that first organizes raw text into a hierarchical classification structure containing Themes, Stories, and Clusters. It then leverages a Signal-to-Noise Ratio (SNR) to prioritize high-value semantic features, ensuring the model's attention remains focused on the most representative data points. By incorporating this scoring mechanism into a Summary-of-Summaries (SoS) architecture, the framework effectively isolates essential information and mitigates background noise during data aggregation.
  Experimental results using Gemini 2.0 Flash Lite across diverse datasets - including Google Business reviews, Amazon Product reviews, and Goodreads Book reviews - demonstrate that wSSAS significantly improves clustering integrity and categorization accuracy. Our findings indicate that wSSAS reduces categorization entropy and provides a reproducible pathway for improving LLM based summaries based on a high-precision, deterministic process for large-scale text categorization.

</details>


### [258] [LLMs Struggle with Abstract Meaning Comprehension More Than Expected](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12018)
*Hamoud Alhazmi,Jiachen Jiang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: SemEval-2021 Task 4 (ReCAM)评估模型对抽象概念的理解能力，发现大多数LLMs在零/少样本设置下表现不佳，而微调模型表现更好。提出的双向注意力分类器通过动态关注篇章和选项，显著提升了抽象意义理解性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 抽象意义理解是高级语言理解的关键，但抽象词汇因其非具体、高层次的语义特性而具有挑战性。SemEval-2021 Task 4 (ReCAM)旨在评估模型对抽象概念的解释能力，探索如何提升模型在抽象意义理解任务上的表现。

Method: 研究采用SemEval-2021 Task 4的完形填空格式任务，包含篇章、问题和五个抽象选项。提出了一种双向注意力分类器，受人类认知策略启发，能够动态关注篇章和选项。该方法在微调模型（如BERT、RoBERTa）基础上进行改进。

Result: (1) 大多数大型语言模型（包括GPT-4o）在零样本、单样本和少样本设置下对抽象意义理解表现不佳；(2) 微调模型如BERT和RoBERTa表现更好；(3) 提出的双向注意力分类器在Task 1上提升准确率4.06%，在Task 2上提升3.41%，显著改善了抽象意义理解性能。

Conclusion: 抽象意义理解对现有语言模型仍具挑战性，微调模型优于零/少样本LLMs。受人类认知启发的双向注意力机制能有效提升模型对抽象概念的理解能力，为改进抽象意义理解提供了有前景的方向。

Abstract: Understanding abstract meanings is crucial for advanced language comprehension. Despite extensive research, abstract words remain challenging due to their non-concrete, high-level semantics. SemEval-2021 Task 4 (ReCAM) evaluates models' ability to interpret abstract concepts by presenting passages with questions and five abstract options in a cloze-style format. Key findings include: (1) Most large language models (LLMs), including GPT-4o, struggle with abstract meaning comprehension under zero-shot, one-shot, and few-shot settings, while fine-tuned models like BERT and RoBERTa perform better. (2) A proposed bidirectional attention classifier, inspired by human cognitive strategies, enhances fine-tuned models by dynamically attending to passages and options. This approach improves accuracy by 4.06 percent on Task 1 and 3.41 percent on Task 2, demonstrating its potential for abstract meaning comprehension.

</details>


### [259] [LangFlow: Continuous Diffusion Rivals Discrete in Language Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11748)
*Yuxin Chen,Chumeng Liang,Hangke Sui,Ruihan Guo,Chaoran Cheng,Jiaxuan You,Ge Liu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: LangFlow是首个能与离散扩散模型匹敌的连续扩散语言模型，通过Bregman散度连接嵌入空间扩散与流匹配，引入三个关键创新：ODE-based NLL边界、信息均匀噪声调度和学习型Gumbel调度器、自条件训练协议，在困惑度和生成质量上达到SOTA水平。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
