KITE distills each trajectory into a small set of motion-salient keyframes with open-vocabulary detections and pairs each keyframe with a schematic bird's-eye-view (BEV) representation that encodes relative object layout, axes, timestamps, and detection confidence. These visual cues are serialized with robot-profile and scene-context tokens into a unified prompt, allowing the same front-end to support failure detection, identification, localization, explanation, and correction with an off-the-shelf VLM. On the RoboFAC benchmark, KITE with Qwen2.5-VL substantially improves over vanilla Qwen2.5-VL in the training-free setting, with especially large gains on simulation failure detection, identification, and localization, while remaining competitive with a RoboFAC-tuned baseline. A small QLoRA fine-tune further improves explanation and correction quality. We also report qualitative results on real dual-arm robots, demonstrating the practical applicability of KITE as a structured and interpretable front-end for robot failure analysis. Code and models are released on our project page: https://m80hz.github.io/kite/

</details>


### [518] [Differentiable Environment-Trajectory Co-Optimization for Safe Multi-Agent Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06972)
*Zhan Gao,Gabriele Fadini,Stelian Coros,Amanda Prorok*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出双层优化框架，将环境配置作为决策变量与智能体动作联合优化，通过可微优化方法实现安全导航


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统方法将环境视为固定因素，未探索环境配置对智能体导航性能的影响。本文旨在将环境配置作为决策变量，与智能体动作联合优化以实现安全导航

Method: 提出双层优化问题：下层子问题优化智能体轨迹以最小化导航成本，上层子问题优化环境配置以最大化导航安全性。开发可微优化方法，使用内点法求解下层问题，梯度上升法求解上层问题。利用KKT条件和隐函数定理计算智能体轨迹对环境参数的梯度，实现双层结构的可微性

Result: 实验验证了该框架在多种安全关键导航场景（从仓库物流到城市交通）中的有效性。结果表明，优化后的环境能够提供导航引导，同时提高智能体的安全性和效率

Conclusion: 通过将环境配置作为决策变量进行联合优化，可以显著改善多智能体导航的安全性和效率，为安全关键导航系统提供了新的设计范式

Abstract: The environment plays a critical role in multi-agent navigation by imposing spatial constraints, rules, and limitations that agents must navigate around. Traditional approaches treat the environment as fixed, without exploring its impact on agents' performance. This work considers environment configurations as decision variables, alongside agent actions, to jointly achieve safe navigation. We formulate a bi-level problem, where the lower-level sub-problem optimizes agent trajectories that minimize navigation cost and the upper-level sub-problem optimizes environment configurations that maximize navigation safety. We develop a differentiable optimization method that iteratively solves the lower-level sub-problem with interior point methods and the upper-level sub-problem with gradient ascent. A key challenge lies in analytically coupling these two levels. We address this by leveraging KKT conditions and the Implicit Function Theorem to compute gradients of agent trajectories w.r.t. environment parameters, enabling differentiation throughout the bi-level structure. Moreover, we propose a novel metric that quantifies navigation safety as a criterion for the upper-level environment optimization, and prove its validity through measure theory. Our experiments validate the effectiveness of the proposed framework in a variety of safety-critical navigation scenarios, inspired from warehouse logistics to urban transportation. The results demonstrate that optimized environments provide navigation guidance, improving both agents' safety and efficiency.

</details>


### [519] [Learning-Based Strategy for Composite Robot Assembly Skill Adaptation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06949)
*Khalil Abuibaid,Aleksandr Sidorenko,Achim Wagner,Martin Ruskowski*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于残差强化学习的模块化技能框架，用于解决位置控制机械臂在接触丰富任务（如轴孔装配）中的适应性问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 工业机器人在接触丰富的任务中面临几何公差、摩擦变化和不确定接触动力学的挑战，特别是位置控制机械臂在轴孔装配等任务中难以适应环境变化。

Method: 采用残差强化学习（RRL）框架，将装配过程表示为具有明确前置、后置和不变条件的复合技能，在保持技能结构和执行流程不变的前提下，通过残差细化实现接触交互中的适应性。

Result: 在MuJoCo仿真环境中使用UR5e机械臂和Robotiq夹爪进行实验，采用SAC和JAX进行训练，结果表明该方法能够实现装配技能的鲁棒执行。

Conclusion: 提出的基于残差强化学习的技能框架为工业自动化提供了一种可重用、模块化且安全的解决方案，能够在保持技能结构不变的同时适应接触丰富的交互环境。

Abstract: Contact-rich robotic skills remain challenging for industrial robots due to tight geometric tolerances, frictional variability, and uncertain contact dynamics, particularly when using position-controlled manipulators. This paper presents a reusable and encapsulated skill-based strategy for peg-in-hole assembly, in which adaptation is achieved through Residual Reinforcement Learning (RRL). The assembly process is represented using composite skills with explicit pre-, post-, and invariant conditions, enabling modularity, reusability, and well-defined execution semantics across task variations. Safety and sample efficiency are promoted through RRL by restricting adaptation to residual refinements within each skill during contact-rich interactions, while the overall skill structure and execution flow remain invariant. The proposed approach is evaluated in MuJoCo simulation on a UR5e robot equipped with a Robotiq gripper and trained using SAC and JAX. Results demonstrate that the proposed formulation enables robust execution of assembly skills, highlighting its suitability for industrial automation.

</details>


### [520] [Sustainable Transfer Learning for Adaptive Robot Skills](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06943)
*Khalil Abuibaid,Vinit Hegiste,Nigora Gafur,Achim Wagner,Martin Ruskowski*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该研究探讨了不同机器人平台间的策略迁移，重点关注使用强化学习的孔洞插入任务。通过对比零样本迁移、微调和从头训练，发现微调能显著提升性能并减少训练时间，支持可持续机器人学习。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 从零开始学习机器人技能通常耗时，而重用数据能促进可持续性并提高样本效率。研究旨在探索不同机器人平台间的策略迁移，减少重复训练需求。

Method: 在两个不同的机器人上进行策略训练，然后进行三种方式的评估：零样本迁移、微调和从头训练。使用强化学习方法进行孔洞插入任务。

Result: 零样本迁移导致较低的成功率和相对较长的任务执行时间，而微调能显著提升性能且需要较少的训练时间步。策略迁移结合适应技术能提高样本效率和泛化能力。

Conclusion: 策略迁移与适应技术相结合能有效提高样本效率、促进泛化能力，减少大量重新训练的需求，支持可持续的机器人学习。

Abstract: Learning robot skills from scratch is often time-consuming, while reusing data promotes sustainability and improves sample efficiency. This study investigates policy transfer across different robotic platforms, focusing on peg-in-hole task using reinforcement learning (RL). Policy training is carried out on two different robots. Their policies are transferred and evaluated for zero-shot, fine-tuning, and training from scratch. Results indicate that zero-shot transfer leads to lower success rates and relatively longer task execution times, while fine-tuning significantly improves performance with fewer training time-steps. These findings highlight that policy transfer with adaptation techniques improves sample efficiency and generalization, reducing the need for extensive retraining and supporting sustainable robotic learning.

</details>


### [521] [Towards Multi-Object Nonprehensile Transportation via Shared Teleoperation: A Framework Based on Virtual Object Model Predictive Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06932)
*Xinyang Fan,Zhaoyang Chen,Shu Xin,Yi Ren,Zainan Jiang,Fenglei Ni,Hong Liu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种共享遥操作框架，用于多物体非抓取运输，其中人类与机器人共享位置控制，机器人自主管理托盘方向以满足动态约束


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在模型依赖性、参数不确定性和多物体适应性方面存在困难，需要同时实现轨迹跟踪和托盘方向控制

Method: 1) 基于虚拟对象的理论动态约束分析简化轨迹规划约束；2) MPC轨迹平滑算法实时强制执行约束并协调用户跟踪与方向控制；3) 共享遥操作框架，人类控制位置，机器人自主管理方向

Result: 稳定操纵9个物体，加速度达2.4 m/s²，相比基线方法滑动距离减少72.45%，倾覆率从13.9%降至0%，在复杂场景中表现出鲁棒适应性

Conclusion: 提出的共享遥操作框架有效解决了多物体非抓取运输中的轨迹跟踪和方向控制问题，通过理论约束分析和MPC算法实现了稳定、自适应的操作性能

Abstract: Multi-object nonprehensile transportation in teleoperation demands simultaneous trajectory tracking and tray orientation control. Existing methods often struggle with model dependency, uncertain parameters, and multi-object adaptability. We propose a shared teleoperation framework where humans and robots share positioning control, while the robot autonomously manages orientation to satisfy dynamic constraints. Key contributions include: 1) A theoretical dynamic constraint analysis utilizing a novel virtual object (VO)-based method to simplify constraints for trajectory planning. 2) An MPC-based trajectory smoothing algorithm that enforces real-time constraints and coordinates user tracking with orientation control. 3) Validations demonstrating stable manipulation of nine objects at accelerations up to 2.4 m/s2. Compared to the baseline, our approach reduces sliding distance by 72.45% and eliminates tip-overs (0% vs. 13.9%), proving robust adaptability in complex scenarios.

</details>


### [522] [A Physical Agentic Loop for Language-Guided Grasping with Execution-State Monitoring](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07395)
*Wenze Wang,Mehdi Hosseinzadeh,Feras Dayoub*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种物理智能体循环框架，将语言引导的抓取任务从单次执行模式转变为基于执行状态监控的有界循环系统，通过事件接口和执行监控层提高机器人操作的鲁棒性和可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前机器人操作系统通常以单次执行方式运行语言指令，缺乏对执行失败（如空抓、滑动、卡顿等）的结构化反馈机制。受数字工具使用智能体中的智能循环启发，需要将物理操作转化为具有明确执行状态监控的有界智能体系统。

Method: 引入物理智能体循环框架，包含：(1) 事件驱动接口；(2) Watchdog执行监控层，通过接触感知融合和时间稳定化将嘈杂的夹爪遥测数据转换为离散结果标签；(3) 确定性有界策略，基于结果事件（可选结合抓取后语义验证）决定最终确认、重试或向用户请求澄清，确保有限终止。

Result: 在配备眼在手D405相机的移动机械臂上验证，保持底层抓取模型不变，测试了视觉模糊、干扰物和诱导执行失败等代表性场景。结果显示，显式执行状态监控和有界恢复相比开环执行能实现更鲁棒和可解释的行为，同时增加最小的架构开销。

Conclusion: 通过将语言引导抓取重新构建为基于执行状态的有界智能体系统，并引入事件接口和监控层，能够显著提高机器人操作的鲁棒性和可解释性，为物理智能体系统设计提供了新范式。

Abstract: Robotic manipulation systems that follow language instructions often execute grasp primitives in a largely single-shot manner: a model proposes an action, the robot executes it, and failures such as empty grasps, slips, stalls, timeouts, or semantically wrong grasps are not surfaced to the decision layer in a structured way. Inspired by agentic loops in digital tool-using agents, we reformulate language-guided grasping as a bounded embodied agent operating over grounded execution states, where physical actions expose an explicit tool-state stream. We introduce a physical agentic loop that wraps an unmodified learned manipulation primitive (grasp-and-lift) with (i) an event-based interface and (ii) an execution monitoring layer, Watchdog, which converts noisy gripper telemetry into discrete outcome labels using contact-aware fusion and temporal stabilization. These outcome events, optionally combined with post-grasp semantic verification, are consumed by a deterministic bounded policy that finalizes, retries, or escalates to the user for clarification, guaranteeing finite termination. We validate the resulting loop on a mobile manipulator with an eye-in-hand D405 camera, keeping the underlying grasp model unchanged and evaluating representative scenarios involving visual ambiguity, distractors, and induced execution failures. Results show that explicit execution-state monitoring and bounded recovery enable more robust and interpretable behavior than open-loop execution, while adding minimal architectural overhead. For the source code and demo refer to our project page: https://wenzewwz123.github.io/Agentic-Loop/

</details>


### [523] [RichMap: A Reachability Map Balancing Precision, Efficiency, and Flexibility for Rich Robot Manipulation Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06778)
*Yupu Lu,Yuxiang Ma,Jia Pan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: RichMap是一种高精度可达性地图表示方法，通过改进经典网格结构，在保持结构灵活性的同时实现接近紧凑地图形式的性能，支持机器人操作任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为机器人灵巧操作任务开发一种既能平衡效率与灵活性，又能保持高精度的可达性地图表示方法，以支持复杂的机器人操作需求。

Method: 通过改进经典网格结构，利用S²(或SO(3))的理论容量界限确保严格覆盖，采用异步流水线进行高效构建，并扩展框架应用包括基于最大均值差异的工作空间相似性量化和基于能量的扩散策略迁移引导。

Result: 验证显示高预测准确率(>98%)、低误报率(1-2%)、快速批量查询(~15μs/query)；在跨具身场景的方块推动实验中，基于能量的扩散策略迁移实现了高达26%的性能提升。

Conclusion: RichMap提供了一种高效灵活的高精度可达性地图表示，能够有效支持机器人操作任务，并在跨具身策略迁移中展现出显著优势。

Abstract: This paper presents RichMap, a high-precision reachability map representation designed to balance efficiency and flexibility for versatile robot manipulation tasks. By refining the classic grid-based structure, we propose a streamlined approach that achieves performance close to compact map forms (e.g., RM4D) while maintaining structural flexibility. Our method utilizes theoretical capacity bounds on $\mathbb{S}^2$ (or $SO(3)$) to ensure rigorous coverage and employs an asynchronous pipeline for efficient construction. We validate the map against comprehensive metrics, pursuing high prediction accuracy ($>98\%$), low false positive rates ($1\sim2\%$), and fast large-batch query ($\sim$15 $μ$s/query). We extend the framework applications to quantify robot workspace similarity via maximum mean discrepancy (MMD) metrics and demonstrate energy-based guidance for diffusion policy transfer, achieving up to $26\%$ improvement for cross-embodiment scenarios in the block pushing experiment.

</details>


### [524] [Train-Small Deploy-Large: Leveraging Diffusion-Based Multi-Robot Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06598)
*Siddharth Singh,Soumee Guha,Qing Chang,Scott Acton*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于扩散模型的多机器人路径规划方法，能够在训练时使用少量机器人，部署时泛化到更多机器人，实现"训练小、部署大"的范式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于学习的方法难以泛化到机器人数量变化，特别是部署时机器人数量增加的情况；而分析方法在计算可扩展性或处理动态环境变化方面存在困难。

Method: 采用扩散模型规划器，结合专用的智能体间注意力计算和时间卷积，能够处理动态变化的智能体数量，在有限数量智能体上训练后能有效泛化到更多智能体。

Result: 该方法在多个场景中验证有效，与现有的多智能体强化学习技术和启发式控制方法相比表现出良好性能，实现了训练小、部署大的范式并保持良好准确性。

Conclusion: 基于扩散模型的规划器能够有效处理动态变化的智能体数量，解决了现有方法在可扩展性和泛化性方面的限制，为多机器人路径规划提供了新的解决方案。

Abstract: Learning based multi-robot path planning methods struggle to scale or generalize to changes, particularly variations in the number of robots during deployment. Most existing methods are trained on a fixed number of robots and may tolerate a reduced number during testing, but typically fail when the number increases. Additionally, training such methods for a larger number of agents can be both time consuming and computationally expensive. However, analytical methods can struggle to scale computationally or handle dynamic changes in the environment. In this work, we propose to leverage a diffusion model based planner capable of handling dynamically varying number of agents. Our approach is trained on a limited number of agents and generalizes effectively to larger numbers of agents during deployment. Results show that integrating a single shared diffusion model based planner with dedicated inter-agent attention computation and temporal convolution enables a train small deploy-large paradigm with good accuracy. We validate our method across multiple scenarios and compare the performance with existing multi-agent reinforcement learning techniques and heuristic control based methods.

</details>


### [525] [BiDexGrasp: Coordinated Bimanual Dexterous Grasps across Object Geometries and Sizes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06589)
*Mu Lin,Yi-Lin Wei,Jiaxuan Chen,Yuhao Lin,Shuoyu Chen,Jiangran Lyu,Jiayi Chen,Yansong Tang,He Wang,Wei-Shi Zheng*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: BiDexGrasp：包含大规模双手灵巧抓取数据集和生成模型，通过两阶段合成策略构建数据集，并提出双手协调和几何尺寸自适应抓取生成框架


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 双手灵巧抓取是机器人学的基础和重要领域，但其发展受到缺乏全面数据集和强大生成模型的限制

Method: 1. 数据集构建：提出新颖的双手抓取合成流水线，采用两阶段策略（基于区域的高效抓取初始化和解耦力闭合抓取优化）；2. 生成模型：提出双手协调和几何尺寸自适应抓取生成框架，包含双手协调模块和几何尺寸自适应抓取生成策略

Result: 构建了大规模双手灵巧抓取数据集，包含6351个尺寸30-80cm的多样化物体和970万标注抓取数据；在仿真和真实世界实验中证明了数据合成流水线和生成框架的优越性能

Conclusion: BiDexGrasp通过创新的数据集构建方法和生成模型，有效解决了双手灵巧抓取领域的数据和模型瓶颈，为机器人双手操作提供了重要基础

Abstract: Bimanual dexterous grasping is a fundamental and promising area in robotics, yet its progress is constrained by the lack of comprehensive datasets and powerful generation models. In this work, we propose BiDexGrasp, consists of a large-scale bimanual dexterous grasp dataset and a novel generation model. For dataset, we propose a novel bimanual grasp synthesis pipeline to efficiently annotate physically feasible data for dataset construction. This pipeline addresses the challenges of high-dimensional bimanual grasping through a two-stage synthesis strategy of efficient region-based grasp initialization and decoupled force-closure grasp optimization. Powered by this pipeline, we construct a large-scale bimanual dexterous grasp dataset, comprising 6351 diverse objects with sizes ranging from 30 to 80 cm, along with 9.7 million annotated grasp data. Based on this dataset, we further introduce a bimanual-coordinated and geometry-size-adaptive dexterous grasping generation framework. The framework lies in two key designs: a bimanual coordination module and a geometry-size-adaptive grasp generation strategy to generate coordinated and high-quality grasps on unseen objects. Extensive experiments conducted in both simulation and real world demonstrate the superior performance of our proposed data synthesis pipeline and learned generative framework.

</details>


### [526] [Evaluation as Evolution: Transforming Adversarial Diffusion into Closed-Loop Curricula for Autonomous Vehicles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07378)
*Yicheng Guo,Jiaqi Liu,Chengkai Xu,Peng Hang,Jian Sun*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: E²框架将对抗性场景生成从静态验证转变为自适应进化课程，通过传输正则化稀疏控制和拓扑驱动支持选择，在保持真实性的同时高效发现安全关键故障案例。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自动驾驶在交互交通环境中受限于静态数据集中安全关键尾部事件的稀缺性，导致学习策略偏向平均情况行为，降低鲁棒性。现有对抗性压力测试方法主要是开环和事后处理，难以将发现的故障案例整合回训练过程。

Method: 提出E²框架，将对抗性场景合成公式化为基于学习到的反向时间SDE先验的传输正则化稀疏控制问题。采用拓扑驱动支持选择识别关键交互智能体，引入拓扑锚定稳定生成过程，在约束偏离真实数据分布的同时有针对性地发现故障案例。

Result: 在nuScenes数据集上碰撞故障发现率提升9.01%，在nuPlan数据集上提升高达21.43%，同时保持低无效性和高真实性。将发现的边界案例用于闭环策略微调可获得显著的鲁棒性提升。

Conclusion: E²框架成功将对抗性生成从静态验证转变为自适应进化课程，在保持真实性的同时高效发现安全关键故障案例，为自动驾驶系统的鲁棒性评估和训练提供了有效的闭环解决方案。

Abstract: Autonomous vehicles in interactive traffic environments are often limited by the scarcity of safety-critical tail events in static datasets, which biases learned policies toward average-case behaviors and reduces robustness. Existing evaluation methods attempt to address this through adversarial stress testing, but are predominantly open-loop and post-hoc, making it difficult to incorporate discovered failures back into the training process. We introduce Evaluation as Evolution ($E^2$), a closed-loop framework that transforms adversarial generation from a static validation step into an adaptive evolutionary curriculum. Specifically, $E^2$ formulates adversarial scenario synthesis as transport-regularized sparse control over a learned reverse-time SDE prior. To make this high-dimensional generation tractable, we utilize topology-driven support selection to identify critical interacting agents, and introduce Topological Anchoring to stabilize the process. This approach enables the targeted discovery of failure cases while strictly constraining deviations from realistic data distributions. Empirically, $E^2$ improves collision failure discovery by 9.01% on the nuScenes dataset and up to 21.43% on the nuPlan dataset over the strongest baselines, while maintaining low invalidity and high realism. It further yields substantial robustness gains when the resulting boundary cases are recycled for closed-loop policy fine-tuning.

</details>


### [527] [Uncertainty Estimation for Deep Reconstruction in Actuatic Disaster Scenarios with Autonomous Vehicles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06387)
*Samuel Yanes Luis,Alejandro Casado Pérez,Alejandro Mendoza Barrionuevo,Dame Seck Diop,Sergio Toral Marín,Daniel Gutiérrez Reina*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 比较四种方法（高斯过程、蒙特卡洛dropout、深度集成、证据深度学习）用于自主水下车辆稀疏观测的环境标量场重建与不确定性分解，发现证据深度学习在精度、校准和推理成本方面最优。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自主水下车辆进行环境监测时，需要从稀疏观测中准确重建标量场，同时进行不确定性量化以支持主动感知策略（如信息路径规划），其中认知不确定性对数据收集决策至关重要。

Method: 比较四种方法：高斯过程（GP）、蒙特卡洛dropout（MC Dropout）、深度集成（Deep Ensembles）和证据深度学习（Evidential Deep Learning），在三种代表真实传感器模态的感知模型下进行标量场重建和不确定性分解。

Result: 证据深度学习在所有传感器配置下实现了最佳重建精度和不确定性校准，且推理成本最低；高斯过程受限于其平稳核假设，在观测密度增加时变得不可行。

Conclusion: 证据深度学习是实时自主车辆部署中不确定性感知场重建的首选方法，因其在精度、校准和计算效率方面的综合优势。

Abstract: Accurate reconstruction of environmental scalar fields from sparse onboard observations is essential for autonomous vehicles engaged in aquatic monitoring. Beyond point estimates, principled uncertainty quantification is critical for active sensing strategies such as Informative Path Planning, where epistemic uncertainty drives data collection decisions. This paper compares Gaussian Processes, Monte Carlo Dropout, Deep Ensembles, and Evidential Deep Learning for simultaneous scalar field reconstruction and uncertainty decomposition under three perceptual models representative of real sensor modalities. Results show that Evidential Deep Learning achieves the best reconstruction accuracy and uncertainty calibration across all sensor configurations at the lowest inference cost, while Gaussian Processes are fundamentally limited by their stationary kernel assumption and become intractable as observation density grows. These findings support Evidential Deep Learning as the preferred method for uncertainty-aware field reconstruction in real-time autonomous vehicle deployments.

</details>


### [528] [Designing Privacy-Preserving Visual Perception for Robot Navigation Based on User Privacy Preferences](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06382)
*Xuying Huang,Sicong Pan,Delphine Reinhardt,Maren Bennewitz*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 用户中心化的隐私保护机器人视觉导航设计，通过用户研究确定偏好，提出基于距离-分辨率策略的隐私保护方案


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 移动服务机器人的视觉导航需要摄像头，但可能捕获隐私敏感信息。现有方法主要基于技术考虑，缺乏对用户隐私偏好的关注，需要用户中心化的隐私保护视觉感知设计。

Method: 采用用户中心化方法设计隐私保护视觉感知，通过两个用户研究调查用户隐私偏好，基于研究结果推导出用户可配置的距离-分辨率隐私策略。

Result: 用户偏好隐私保护的视觉抽象和捕获时低分辨率保护机制；用户偏好的RGB分辨率取决于期望的隐私级别和机器人导航时的接近程度。

Conclusion: 基于用户隐私偏好研究，提出了用户可配置的距离-分辨率隐私策略，为隐私保护机器人视觉导航提供了用户中心化的设计框架。

Abstract: Visual navigation is a fundamental capability of mobile service robots, yet the onboard cameras required for such navigation can capture privacy-sensitive information and raise user privacy concerns. Existing approaches to privacy-preserving navigation-oriented visual perception have largely been driven by technical considerations, with limited grounding in user privacy preferences. In this work, we propose a user-centered approach to designing privacy-preserving visual perception for robot navigation. To investigate how user privacy preferences can inform such design, we conducted two user studies. The results show that users prefer privacy-preserving visual abstractions and capture-time low-resolution preservation mechanisms: their preferred RGB resolution depends both on the desired privacy level and robot proximity during navigation. Based on these findings, we further derive a user-configurable distance-to-resolution privacy policy for privacy-preserving robot visual navigation.

</details>


### [529] [Occlusion Handling by Pushing for Enhanced Fruit Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06341)
*Ege Gursoy,Dana Kulić,Andrea Cherubini*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该研究提出了一种农业机器人系统，通过推开遮挡果实的树枝来提高果实可见性，结合深度学习、经典图像处理和3D霍夫变换技术


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 农业机器人中，果实被树枝和树叶遮挡导致观察和定位困难，可能造成错误定位或阻碍采摘。需要清除遮挡以提高果实可见性

Method: 使用RGB-D相机和机械臂，首先在RGB图像中检测被遮挡果实，通过深度学习生成模型在深度空间估计被遮挡部分；使用经典图像处理技术确定推开方向；引入3D霍夫变换检测点云中的直线段以识别主要遮挡树枝；最后用机械臂推开树枝

Result: 在不同光照条件和多种水果（苹果、柠檬、橙子）的真实数据上验证了感知方法，实现了可见性提升和成功清除遮挡，并通过真实机器人树枝推开演示展示了实际应用

Conclusion: 该方法结合深度学习、经典图像处理和3D霍夫变换，有效解决了农业机器人中果实遮挡问题，提高了果实可见性并实现了成功的遮挡清除

Abstract: In agricultural robotics, effective observation and localization of fruits present challenges due to occlusions caused by other parts of the tree, such as branches and leaves. These occlusions can result in false fruit localization or impede the robot from picking the fruit. The objective of this work is to push away branches that block the fruit's view to increase their visibility. Our setup consists of an RGB-D camera and a robot arm. First, we detect the occluded fruit in the RGB image and estimate its occluded part via a deep learning generative model in the depth space. The direction to push to clear the occlusions is determined using classic image processing techniques. We then introduce a 3D extension of the 2D Hough transform to detect straight line segments in the point cloud. This extension helps detect tree branches and identify the one mainly responsible for the occlusion. Finally, we clear the occlusion by pushing the branch with the robot arm. Our method uses a combination of deep learning for fruit appearance estimation, classic image processing for push direction determination, and 3D Hough transform for branch detection. We validate our perception methods through real data under different lighting conditions and various types of fruits (i.e. apple, lemon, orange), achieving improved visibility and successful occlusion clearance. We demonstrate the practical application of our approach through a real robot branch pushing demonstration.

</details>


### [530] [Learning-Guided Force-Feedback Model Predictive Control with Obstacle Avoidance for Robotic Deburring](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06133)
*Krzysztof Wojciechowski,Ege Gursoy,Arthur Haffemayer,Sebastien Kleff,Vincent Bonnet,Florent Lamiraux,Nicolas Mansard*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 将扩散运动先验与力反馈MPC结合，解决工业去毛刺任务中接触丰富、碰撞约束下的精确力控问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统MPC在扭矩控制机器人中应用广泛，但常忽略实时力反馈，难以处理碰撞约束下的接触丰富工业任务。去毛刺任务需要精确工具插入、稳定力调节和无碰撞圆周运动，这超出了标准MPC的能力范围

Method: 提出一个集成力反馈MPC与扩散运动先验的框架。扩散模型作为运动策略的记忆库，提供跨多个任务实例的鲁棒初始化和适应，而MPC确保具有显式力跟踪、扭矩可行性和碰撞避免的安全执行

Result: 在扭矩控制机械臂上进行工业去毛刺任务验证。实验展示了可靠的工具插入、精确的法向力跟踪，以及在难以到达的配置和障碍约束下仍能实现圆周去毛刺运动

Conclusion: 这是首次将扩散运动先验与力反馈MPC集成，用于碰撞感知、接触丰富的工业任务。该框架成功解决了传统MPC在复杂工业应用中面临的挑战

Abstract: Model Predictive Control (MPC) is widely used for torque-controlled robots, but classical formulations often neglect real-time force feedback and struggle with contact-rich industrial tasks under collision constraints. Deburring in particular requires precise tool insertion, stable force regulation, and collision-free circular motions in challenging configurations, which exceeds the capability of standard MPC pipelines. We propose a framework that integrates force-feedback MPC with diffusion-based motion priors to address these challenges. The diffusion model serves as a memory of motion strategies, providing robust initialization and adaptation across multiple task instances, while MPC ensures safe execution with explicit force tracking, torque feasibility, and collision avoidance. We validate our approach on a torque-controlled manipulator performing industrial deburring tasks. Experiments demonstrate reliable tool insertion, accurate normal force tracking, and circular deburring motions even in hard-to-reach configurations and under obstacle constraints. To our knowledge, this is the first integration of diffusion motion priors with force-feedback MPC for collision-aware, contact-rich industrial tasks.

</details>


### [531] [Intuitive Human-Robot Interaction: Development and Evaluation of a Gesture-Based User Interface for Object Selection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06073)
*Bijan Kavousian,Oliver Petrovic,Werner Herfs*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于手势的用户界面，使用指向和点击手势进行物体选择，通过实验评估准确性和选择时间


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 手势是人类之间自然的交流方式，可以用于人机交互，特别是人机协作中的物体选择任务

Method: 开发基于手势的用户界面，使用指向和点击手势进行物体选择，并通过20名参与者的实验进行评估

Result: 实验评估了准确性和选择时间，展示了该界面在高效协作方面的潜力

Conclusion: 基于手势的物体选择界面具有实现高效人机协作的潜力

Abstract: Gestures are a natural form of communication between humans and can also be leveraged for human-robot interaction. This work presents a gesture-based user interface for object selection using pointing and click gestures. An experiment with 20 participants evaluates accuracy and selection time, demonstrating the potential for efficient collaboration.

</details>


### [532] [HiPolicy: Hierarchical Multi-Frequency Action Chunking for Policy Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06067)
*Jiyao Zhang,Zimu Han,Junhan Wang,Xionghao Wu,Shihong Lin,Jinzhou Li,Hongwei Fan,Ruihai Wu,Dongjiang Li,Hao Dong*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: HiPolicy：一种分层多频率动作分块框架，通过联合预测不同频率的动作序列来同时捕获粗粒度高层规划和精确反应运动，解决机器人模仿学习中长时依赖与精细闭环控制的权衡问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人模仿学习面临一个基本权衡：建模长时依赖与实现精细闭环控制之间的冲突。现有的固定频率动作分块方法难以同时实现这两个目标，需要一种能够兼顾高层规划和精细控制的解决方案。

Method: 提出HiPolicy分层多频率动作分块框架：1）联合预测不同频率的动作序列以捕获粗粒度高层规划和精确反应运动；2）从历史观测中提取并融合与各频率对齐的分层特征用于多频率分块生成；3）引入基于熵的引导执行机制，根据动作不确定性自适应平衡长时规划与精细控制。

Result: 在多种模拟基准测试和真实世界操作任务上的实验表明，HiPolicy可以无缝集成到现有的2D和3D生成策略中，在显著提升执行效率的同时，带来一致的性能改进。

Conclusion: HiPolicy通过分层多频率动作分块框架有效解决了机器人模仿学习中长时依赖建模与精细闭环控制之间的权衡问题，为现有策略提供了可扩展的性能提升方案。

Abstract: Robotic imitation learning faces a fundamental trade-off between modeling long-horizon dependencies and enabling fine-grained closed-loop control. Existing fixed-frequency action chunking approaches struggle to achieve both. Building on this insight, we propose HiPolicy, a hierarchical multi-frequency action chunking framework that jointly predicts action sequences at different frequencies to capture both coarse high-level plans and precise reactive motions. We extract and fuse hierarchical features from history observations aligned to each frequency for multi-frequency chunk generation, and introduce an entropy-guided execution mechanism that adaptively balances long-horizon planning with fine-grained control based on action uncertainty. Experiments on diverse simulated benchmarks and real-world manipulation tasks show that HiPolicy can be seamlessly integrated into existing 2D and 3D generative policies, delivering consistent improvements in performance while significantly enhancing execution efficiency.

</details>


### [533] [A Co-Design Framework for High-Performance Jumping of a Five-Bar Monoped with Actuator Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06025)
*Aastha Mishra,Aman Singh,Shishir Kolathaya*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一个用于平面五杆闭链单足机器人的协同设计框架，联合优化机械设计、电机与变速箱参数以及控制参数，以最大化跳跃距离并最小化机械能耗。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有协同设计研究大多关注连杆尺寸和传动比优化，忽略了详细的执行器设计（特别是电机和变速箱参数优化），且主要局限于串联开链机构。需要开发一个能同时优化机械设计、执行器参数和控制参数的综合框架。

Method: 采用两阶段优化方法：第一阶段执行器优化生成从齿轮比到执行器质量、效率和峰值扭矩的映射；第二阶段使用CMA-ES算法协同优化机器人设计和控制参数。应用于平面闭链五杆单足机器人的动态跳跃任务。

Result: 仿真结果显示，与基准设计相比，跳跃距离提高了约42%，机械能耗降低了15.8%，证明了该框架在识别高性能、高能效平面跳跃机器人的最优设计、执行器和控制参数方面的有效性。

Conclusion: 提出的协同设计框架能够有效联合优化机械设计、执行器参数和控制参数，显著提升平面跳跃机器人的性能表现和能量效率，为闭链机构的协同设计提供了新方法。

Abstract: The performance of legged robots depends strongly on both mechanical design and control, motivating co-design approaches that jointly optimize these parameters. However, most existing co-design studies focus on optimizing link dimensions and transmission ratios while neglecting detailed actuator design, particularly motor and gearbox parameter optimization, and are largely limited to serial open-chain mechanisms. In this work, we present a co-design framework for a planar closed-chain five-bar monoped that jointly optimizes mechanical design, motor and gearbox parameters, and control parameters for dynamic jumping. The objective is to maximize jump distance while minimizing mechanical energy consumption. The framework uses a two-stage optimization approach, where actuator optimization generates a mapping from gear ratio to actuator mass, efficiency, and peak torque, which is then used in co-design optimization of the robot design and control using CMA-ES. Simulation results show an improvement of approximately 42% in jump distance and a 15.8% reduction in mechanical energy consumption compared to a nominal design, demonstrating the effectiveness of the proposed framework in identifying optimal design, actuator, and control parameters for high-performance and energy-efficient planar jumping.

</details>


### [534] [Force Polytope-Based Cant-Angle Selection for Tilting Hexarotor UAVs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05998)
*Alberto Piccina,Massimiliano Bertoni,Angelo Cenedese,Giulia Michieletto*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出轻量级控制框架，用于星形相互依赖倾斜六旋翼无人机，通过离线计算的零力矩力多面体查找表优化倾斜角选择，平衡效率和平滑性，提升交互任务性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 倾斜多旋翼无人机的主要优势在于可执行力矩的动态可变性，这对物理交互任务至关重要。倾斜角选择需要优化以确保高性能，同时避免突变并保持现实可行性。

Method: 提出轻量级控制框架，使用离线计算的零力矩力多面体查找表来识别期望控制力的可行倾斜角，并通过平衡效率和平滑性选择最优倾斜角。该框架与几何全姿态控制器集成。

Result: 结果显示计算时间显著减少，姿态跟踪性能改善，驱动效率具有竞争力。在Simscape中进行的完整墙壁检查任务的物理仿真进一步证实了该方法在交互场景中的可行性。

Conclusion: 所提出的轻量级控制框架通过优化倾斜角选择，在星形相互依赖倾斜六旋翼无人机的交互任务中实现了计算效率、跟踪性能和驱动效率的平衡，验证了其在物理交互场景中的可行性。

Abstract: From a maneuverability perspective, the main advantage of tilting multirotor UAVs lies in the dynamic variability of the feasible executable wrench, which represents a key asset for physical interaction tasks. Accordingly, cant-angle selection should be optimized to ensure high performance while avoiding abrupt variations and preserving real-world feasibility. In this context, this work proposes a lightweight control framework for star-shaped interdependent cant-tilting hexarotor UAVs performing interaction tasks. The method uses an offline-computed look-up table of zero-moment force polytopes to identify feasible cant angles for a desired control force and select the optimal one by balancing efficiency and smoothness. The framework is integrated with a geometric full-pose controller and validated through Monte Carlo simulations in MATLAB/Simulink and compared against a baseline strategy. The results show a significant reduction in computation time, together with improved pose-tracking performance and competitive actuation efficiency. A final physics-based simulation of a complete wall inspection task in Simscape further confirms the feasibility of the proposed strategy in interacting scenarios.

</details>


### [535] [Automating Manual Tasks through Intuitive Robot Programming and Cognitive Robotics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05978)
*Bijan Kavousian,Petar Tesic,Oliver Petrovic,Christian Brecher*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于自然语言和手势的机器人编程框架，利用大语言模型和计算机视觉将人类自然交互转化为机器人程序，并通过澄清问题和视觉反馈确保安全性和用户接受度


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统机器人编程需要专业技术知识，限制了普通用户的使用。本文旨在通过模仿人类自然交互方式（语言和手势），降低机器人编程门槛，使非专业用户也能直观地编程机器人

Method: 结合大语言模型（LLMs）解析自然语言指令，计算机视觉（CV）识别手势，将两者融合转化为机器人可执行程序。系统通过澄清问题和视觉反馈机制让用户审查和调整生成的程序

Result: 开发了一个直观的机器人编程框架，能够将自然交互转化为机器人程序，并通过交互式反馈机制确保程序正确性和安全性，提高了用户接受度

Conclusion: 该研究证明了基于自然交互的机器人编程的可行性，通过LLMs和CV技术结合，为非专业用户提供了安全、透明且易于接受的机器人编程方案，为普及机器人应用奠定了基础

Abstract: This paper presents a novel concept for intuitive end-user programming of robots, inspired by natural interaction between humans. Natural language and supportive gestures are translated into robot programs using large language models (LLMs) and computer vision (CV). Through equally natural system feedback in the form of clarification questions and visual representations, the generated program can be reviewed and adjusted, thereby ensuring safety, transparency, and user acceptance.

</details>


### [536] [You're Pushing My Buttons: Instrumented Learning of Gentle Button Presses](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05954)
*Raman Talwar,Remko Proesmans,Thomas Lips,Andreas Verleysen,Francis wyffels*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 使用指尖麦克风捕捉接触音频，通过按钮状态信号作为特权监督微调音频编码器为接触事件检测器，结合模仿学习策略，仅使用视觉和音频进行推理，降低接触力


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 接触丰富的操作任务仅通过摄像头和本体感知难以学习，因为接触事件只能部分观测。研究训练时仪器化（物体传感器化）是否能提高策略性能而不产生部署时依赖

Method: 以按钮按压为测试平台，使用指尖麦克风捕捉接触相关音频；利用仪器化的按钮状态信号作为特权监督，微调音频编码器为接触事件检测器；结合三种模仿学习策略，使策略在推理时仅使用视觉和音频

Result: 按钮按压成功率在各方法间相似，但仪器化引导的音频表示能持续降低接触力

Conclusion: 仪器化作为训练时的辅助目标，对于学习接触丰富的操作策略具有实际应用价值

Abstract: Learning contact-rich manipulation is difficult from cameras and proprioception alone because contact events are only partially observed. We test whether training-time instrumentation, i.e., object sensorisation, can improve policy performance without creating deployment-time dependencies. Specifically, we study button pressing as a testbed and use a microphone fingertip to capture contact-relevant audio. We use an instrumented button-state signal as privileged supervision to fine-tune an audio encoder into a contact event detector. We combine the resulting representation with imitation learning using three strategies, such that the policy only uses vision and audio during inference. Button press success rates are similar across methods, but instrumentation-guided audio representations consistently reduce contact force. These results support instrumentation as a practical training-time auxiliary objective for learning contact-rich manipulation policies.

</details>


### [537] [Dialogue based Interactive Explanations for Safety Decisions in Human Robot Collaboration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05896)
*Yifan Xu,Xiao Zhan,Akilu Yunusa Kaltungo,Ming Shan Ng,Tsukasa Ishizawa,Kota Fujimoto,Clara Cheung*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于对话的框架，用于解释人机协作中的安全决策，将解释与基于约束的安全评估紧密结合，支持因果、对比和反事实查询，确保交互探索不放松安全保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着机器人在共享安全关键环境中运行，仅安全行动已不足够，必须让人类合作者理解其安全决策。当前人机协作中的安全约束触发行为（如停止或切换模式）对附近工作人员不透明，需要提高安全决策的可解释性。

Method: 提出基于对话的交互式安全决策解释框架，将解释与基于约束的安全评估紧密结合。框架使用与行为选择相同的状态和约束表示作为对话基础，直接从记录决策轨迹生成解释，支持因果（"为什么？"）、对比（"为什么不？"）和反事实（"如果...会怎样？"）查询。反事实推理在固定认证安全参数下有界评估，确保交互探索不放松操作保证。

Result: 在建筑机器人场景中实例化该框架，提供结构化操作轨迹说明约束感知对话如何澄清安全干预并支持协调任务恢复。通过将解释作为安全控制的操作接口，为交互式安全感知自主性提供设计视角。

Conclusion: 通过将解释作为安全控制的操作接口，这项工作为人机协作中的交互式安全感知自主性推进了设计视角，使安全决策对合作者透明，同时保持操作安全保证。

Abstract: As robots increasingly operate in shared, safety critical environments, acting safely is no longer sufficient robots must also make their safety decisions intelligible to human collaborators. In human robot collaboration (HRC), behaviours such as stopping or switching modes are often triggered by internal safety constraints that remain opaque to nearby workers. We present a dialogue based framework for interactive explanation of safety decisions in HRC. The approach tightly couples explanation with constraint based safety evaluation, grounding dialogue in the same state and constraint representations that govern behaviour selection. Explanations are derived directly from the recorded decision trace, enabling users to pose causal ("Why?"), contrastive ("Why not?"), and counterfactual ("What if?") queries about safety interventions. Counterfactual reasoning is evaluated in a bounded manner under fixed, certified safety parameters, ensuring that interactive exploration does not relax operational guarantees. We instantiate the framework in a construction robotics scenario and provide a structured operational trace illustrating how constraint aware dialogue clarifies safety interventions and supports coordinated task recovery. By treating explanation as an operational interface to safety control, this work advances a design perspective for interactive, safety aware autonomy in HRC.

</details>


### [538] [BiCoord: A Bimanual Manipulation Benchmark towards Long-Horizon Spatial-Temporal Coordination](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05831)
*Xingyu Peng,Chen Gao,Liankai Jin,Annan Li,Si Liu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出BiCoord基准，用于评估长时程、紧密协调的双臂操作，包含需要连续臂间依赖和动态角色交换的任务，并设计了时空协调度量指标。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有双臂操作基准（如RoboTwin、RLBench2）主要关注短时程、松散协调的任务，无法捕捉真实世界中双臂行为的时空耦合特性，需要建立能够评估长时程、紧密协调操作的基准。

Method: 提出BiCoord基准，包含多样化的长时程、紧密协调双臂操作任务，这些任务需要连续的臂间依赖和动态角色交换。同时设计了一套从时间、空间和时空角度评估协调性的量化指标。

Result: 实验表明，代表性操作策略（如DP、RDT、Pi0、OpenVLA-OFT）在长时程、高度耦合的任务上表现不佳，揭示了实现长时程紧密协调任务的基本挑战。

Conclusion: BiCoord基准为研究长时程协作操作提供了基础，有望推动协调感知机器人学习的发展，所有数据集、代码和补充材料已开源。

Abstract: Bimanual manipulation, i.e., the coordinated use of two robotic arms to complete tasks, is essential for achieving human-level dexterity in robotics. Recent simulation benchmarks, e.g., RoboTwin and RLBench2, have advanced data-driven learning for bimanual manipulation. However, existing tasks are short-horizon and only loosely coordinated, failing to capture the spatial-temporal coupling inherent in real-world bimanual behaviors. To address this gap, we introduce BiCoord, a benchmark for long-horizon and tightly coordinated bimanual manipulation. Specifically, BiCoord comprises diverse tasks that require continuous inter-arm dependency and dynamic role exchange across multiple sub-goals. Also, we propose a suite of quantitative metrics that evaluate coordination from temporal, spatial, and spatial-temporal perspectives, enabling systematic measurement of bimanual cooperation. Experimental results show that representative manipulation policies, e.g., DP, RDT, Pi0, and OpenVLA-OFT, struggle with long-duration and highly coupled tasks, revealing fundamental challenges in achieving long-horizon and tight coordination tasks. We hope BiCoord can serve as a foundation for studying long-horizon cooperative manipulation and inspire future research on coordination-aware robotic learning. All datasets, codes and supplements could be found at https://buaa-colalab.github.io/BiCoord/.

</details>


### [539] [Precise Aggressive Aerial Maneuvers with Sensorimotor Policies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05828)
*Tianyue Wu,Guangtong Xu,Zihan Wang,Junxiao Lin,Tianyang Chen,Yuze Wu,Zhichao Han,Zhiyang Liu,Fei Gao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于强化学习的端到端传感器融合策略，使四旋翼无人机能够在仅使用机载传感器的情况下，通过狭窄间隙进行精确的SE(3)约束下的激进机动。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前使用轻量级机载传感器实现精确激进机动是无人机充分发挥机动性的关键瓶颈。这种机动对于通过环境中的狭窄开口扩展系统可达区域至关重要，特别是四旋翼在SE(3)约束下通过狭窄间隙的激进穿越问题，需要利用瞬时倾斜姿态和机身不对称性。

Method: 开发传感器融合策略，直接将机载视觉和本体感觉映射到低级控制命令。使用强化学习在仿真中进行端到端策略蒸馏，通过基于模型规划器生成的轨迹初始化策略来缓解模型无关RL在受限解空间中的探索困难。采用精心设计的仿真到现实迁移方法。

Result: 该方法使四旋翼能够在5厘米间隙、倾斜角度高达90度的情况下导航通过矩形间隙，无需知道间隙的位置或方向。未经动态间隙训练的策略能够反应性地伺服四旋翼通过移动间隙。该方法还在挑战性的狭窄间隙密集排列轨道上进行了验证，并展示了策略学习方法的灵活性，能够处理几何多样化的间隙。

Conclusion: 提出的基于强化学习的传感器融合策略成功实现了四旋翼在SE(3)约束下通过狭窄间隙的激进机动，展示了端到端学习方法在复杂无人机机动任务中的有效性和灵活性，无需依赖手动定义的穿越姿态和视觉特征。

Abstract: Precise aggressive maneuvers with lightweight onboard sensors remains a key bottleneck in fully exploiting the maneuverability of drones. Such maneuvers are critical for expanding the systems' accessible area by navigating through narrow openings in the environment. Among the most relevant problems, a representative one is aggressive traversal through narrow gaps with quadrotors under SE(3) constraints, which require the quadrotors to leverage a momentary tilted attitude and the asymmetry of the airframe to navigate through gaps. In this paper, we achieve such maneuvers by developing sensorimotor policies directly mapping onboard vision and proprioception into low-level control commands. The policies are trained using reinforcement learning (RL) with end-to-end policy distillation in simulation. We mitigate the fundamental hardness of model-free RL's exploration on the restricted solution space with an initialization strategy leveraging trajectories generated by a model-based planner. Careful sim-to-real design allows the policy to control a quadrotor through narrow gaps with low clearances and high repeatability. For instance, the proposed method enables a quadrotor to navigate a rectangular gap at a 5 cm clearance, tilted at up to 90-degree orientation, without knowledge of the gap's position or orientation. Without training on dynamic gaps, the policy can reactively servo the quadrotor to traverse through a moving gap. The proposed method is also validated by training and deploying policies on challenging tracks of narrow gaps placed closely. The flexibility of the policy learning method is demonstrated by developing policies for geometrically diverse gaps, without relying on manually defined traversal poses and visual features.

</details>


### [540] [Hazard Management in Robot-Assisted Mammography Support](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05749)
*Ioannis Stefanakos,Roisin Bradley,Radu Calinescu,Beverley Townsend,Tianyuan Wang,Jihong Zhu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种用于MammoBot辅助机器人系统的危险管理方法，结合了利益相关者引导的过程建模、SHARD和STPA分析，以识别临床环境中人机交互的安全风险。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人和具身AI系统在临床环境中具有改善护理可及性和质量的潜力，但与脆弱患者近距离接触部署时引入了重大安全风险。需要确保从早期开发阶段就考虑安全性。

Method: 结合利益相关者引导的过程建模、软件危险分析与设计解决方案(SHARD)和系统理论过程分析(STPA)。与临床医生、机器人专家和患者代表协作定义机器人辅助工作流程，SHARD识别技术和程序偏差，STPA分析用户交互引起的不安全控制行为。

Result: 分析显示许多危险并非来自组件故障，而是源于时间不匹配、过早行动和系统状态误解。这些危险被转化为精细化和额外的安全要求，约束系统行为并减少对正确人类时间或解释的依赖。

Conclusion: 该工作展示了一种结构化且可追溯的安全驱动设计方法，对临床环境中的辅助机器人系统具有潜在适用性。

Abstract: Robotic and embodied-AI systems have the potential to improve accessibility and quality of care in clinical settings, but their deployment in close physical contact with vulnerable patients introduces significant safety risks. This paper presents a hazard management methodology for MammoBot, an assistive robotic system designed to support patients during X-ray mammography. To ensure safety from early development stages, we combine stakeholder-guided process modelling with Software Hazard Analysis and Resolution in Design (SHARD) and System-Theoretic Process Analysis (STPA). The robot-assisted workflow is defined collaboratively with clinicians, roboticists, and patient representatives to capture key human-robot interactions. SHARD is applied to identify technical and procedural deviations, while STPA is used to analyse unsafe control actions arising from user interaction. The results show that many hazards arise not from component failures, but from timing mismatches, premature actions, and misinterpretation of system state. These hazards are translated into refined and additional safety requirements that constrain system behaviour and reduce reliance on correct human timing or interpretation alone. The work demonstrates a structured and traceable approach to safety-driven design with potential applicability to assistive robotic systems in clinical environments.

</details>


<div id='cs.MA'></div>

# cs.MA [[Back]](#toc)

### [541] [MIND: AI Co-Scientist for Material Research](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13699)
*Geonhee Ahn,Donghyun Lee,Hayoung Doo,Jonggeol Na,Hyunsoo Cho,Sookyung Kim*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: MIND是一个基于大语言模型的自动化材料研究假设验证框架，通过多智能体流程实现假设精炼、实验和辩论式验证，并集成了机器学习原子间势能进行硅基实验验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前基于大语言模型的科学发现系统大多局限于文本推理，缺乏自动化实验验证能力，限制了其在材料研究等需要实验验证领域的实际应用。

Method: MIND采用模块化多智能体框架，将科学发现过程组织为假设精炼、实验验证和辩论式验证三个阶段。系统集成了机器学习原子间势能（特别是SevenNet-Omni）进行可扩展的硅基实验，并提供基于Web的用户界面。

Result: 开发了完整的MIND框架，包括代码库和演示视频，实现了自动化材料假设验证系统。模块化设计支持集成更多实验模块，可适应更广泛的科学工作流程。

Conclusion: MIND框架成功将大语言模型驱动的科学发现与自动化实验验证相结合，为材料研究提供了端到端的假设验证解决方案，有望推动AI驱动的科学发现向实验验证方向发展。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have enabled agentic AI systems for scientific discovery, but most approaches remain limited to textbased reasoning without automated experimental verification. We propose MIND, an LLM-driven framework for automated hypothesis validation in materials research. MIND organizes the scientific discovery process into hypothesis refinement, experimentation, and debate-based validation within a multi-agent pipeline. For experimental verification, the system integrates Machine Learning Interatomic Potentials, particularly SevenNet-Omni, enabling scalable in-silico experiments. We also provide a web-based user interface for automated hypothesis testing. The modular design allows additional experimental modules to be integrated, making the framework adaptable to broader scientific workflows. The code is available at: https://github.com/IMMS-Ewha/MIND, and a demonstration video at: https://youtu.be/lqiFe1OQzN4.

</details>


### [542] [Learning Probabilistic Responsibility Allocations for Multi-Agent Interactions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13128)
*Isaac Remy,Caleb Chang,Karen Leung*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于条件变分自编码器的概率责任分配模型，用于捕捉多智能体交互中的不确定性，通过可微优化层将责任分配映射到可观测的控制信号，在驾驶数据集上验证了预测性能和可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人类在交互环境中的行为不仅受个人目标影响，还受与他人共享的约束（如安全）影响。理解人们如何分配责任（即个体为适应他人而偏离其期望策略的程度）对于设计社会合规且可信的自主系统至关重要。

Method: 结合条件变分自编码器的潜在空间和多智能体轨迹预测技术，学习基于场景和智能体上下文的概率责任分配模型。虽然缺乏真实责任标签，但通过可微优化层将责任分配映射到可观测的控制信号，使模型可训练。

Result: 在INTERACTION驾驶数据集上评估，模型不仅实现了强大的预测性能，还通过责任视角为多智能体交互模式提供了可解释的洞察。

Conclusion: 提出的概率责任分配模型能够有效捕捉多智能体交互中的不确定性，为理解人类责任分配行为提供了新方法，有助于设计更社会合规的自主系统。

Abstract: Human behavior in interactive settings is shaped not only by individual objectives but also by shared constraints with others, such as safety. Understanding how people allocate responsibility, i.e., how much one deviates from their desired policy to accommodate others, can inform the design of socially compliant and trustworthy autonomous systems. In this work, we introduce a method for learning a probabilistic responsibility allocation model that captures the multimodal uncertainty inherent in multi-agent interactions. Specifically, our approach leverages the latent space of a conditional variational autoencoder, combined with techniques from multi-agent trajectory forecasting, to learn a distribution over responsibility allocations conditioned on scene and agent context. Although ground-truth responsibility labels are unavailable, the model remains tractable by incorporating a differentiable optimization layer that maps responsibility allocations to induced controls, which are available. We evaluate our method on the INTERACTION driving dataset and demonstrate that it not only achieves strong predictive performance but also provides interpretable insights, through the lens of responsibility, into patterns of multi-agent interaction.

</details>


### [543] [Logical Robots: Declarative Multi-Agent Programming in Logica](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06629)
*Evgeny Skvortsov,Yilin Xia,Ojaswa Garg,Shawn Bowers,Bertram Ludäscher*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: Logical Robots：基于逻辑编程语言Logica的交互式多机器人仿真平台，通过逻辑谓词定义机器人行为


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为多机器人系统提供一个统一的编程框架，使低层反应式控制和高层规划能够在同一逻辑编程环境中协同工作

Method: 使用逻辑编程语言Logica，通过逻辑谓词将模拟雷达阵列和共享内存的观测映射到期望的电机输出，实现机器人行为的声明式规范

Result: 开发了一个交互式多智能体仿真平台，支持在单一编程环境中同时实现反应式控制和规划，为多机器人行为研究提供了连贯框架

Conclusion: 逻辑编程方法为多机器人系统提供了一种优雅的编程范式，能够统一处理不同层次的机器人行为，简化了复杂多智能体系统的开发

Abstract: We present Logical Robots, an interactive multi-agent simulation platform where autonomous robot behavior is specified declaratively in the logic programming language Logica. Robot behavior is defined by logical predicates that map observations from simulated radar arrays and shared memory to desired motor outputs. This approach allows low-level reactive control and high-level planning to coexist within a single programming environment, providing a coherent framework for exploring multi-agent robot behavior.

</details>


<div id='cs.AR'></div>

# cs.AR [[Back]](#toc)

### [544] [CUTEv2: Unified and Configurable Matrix Extension for Diverse CPU Architectures with Minimal Design Overhead](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11615)
*Jinpeng Ye,Chongxi Wang,Wenqing Li,Bin Yuan,Shiyi Wang,Fenglu Zhang,Junyu Yue,Jianan Xie,Yunhao Ye,Haoyu Deng,Yingkun Zhou,Xin Cheng,Fuxin Zhang,Jian Wang*

Main category: cs.AR

TL;DR: 提出统一可配置的CPU矩阵扩展架构，通过解耦矩阵单元与CPU流水线实现低开销集成，支持混合精度运算和异步矩阵乘法抽象，在开源CPU平台上实现高利用率和显著性能提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有CPU矩阵扩展设计存在硬件和软件设计开销大、与CPU流水线紧耦合导致跨平台集成困难、细粒度同步指令阻碍高性能内核开发等问题，需要更灵活高效的解决方案。

Method: 提出解耦矩阵单元与CPU流水线的统一可配置架构，支持混合精度运算，采用异步矩阵乘法抽象隐藏硬件细节，实现矩阵-向量执行重叠，提供统一软件栈支持。

Result: 在四个开源CPU RTL平台集成，GEMM工作负载下矩阵单元利用率超过90%；与Intel AMX可比配置下，ResNet、BERT、Llama3分别获得1.57x、1.57x、2.31x加速，其中30%以上增益来自矩阵-向量重叠执行；4 TOPS@2GHz矩阵单元在14nm CMOS中仅占0.53 mm²。

Conclusion: 该架构展示了强大的跨平台适应性和有效的软硬件协同优化，为开源社区提供了实用的矩阵扩展解决方案，平衡了性能、灵活性和集成复杂度。

Abstract: Matrix extensions have emerged as an essential feature in modern CPUs to address the surging demands of AI workloads. However, existing designs often incur substantial hardware and software design overhead. Tight coupling with the CPU pipeline complicates integration across diverse CPUs, while fine-grained synchronous instructions hinder the development of high-performance kernels.
  This paper proposes a unified and configurable CPU matrix extension architecture. By decoupling matrix units from the CPU pipeline, the design enables low-overhead integration while maintaining close coordination with existing compute and memory resources. The configurable matrix unit supports mixed-precision operations and adapts to diverse compute demands and memory bandwidth constraints. An asynchronous matrix multiplication abstraction with flexible granularity conceals hardware details, simplifies matrix-vector overlap, and supports a unified software stack.
  The architecture is integrated into four open-source CPU RTL platforms and evaluated on representative AI models. Matrix unit utilization under GEMM workloads exceeds 90% across all platforms. When configured with compute throughput and memory bandwidth comparable to Intel AMX, our design achieves speedups of 1.57x, 1.57x, and 2.31x on ResNet, BERT, and Llama3, with over 30% of the gains attributed to overlapped matrix-vector execution. A 4 TOPS@2GHz matrix unit occupies only 0.53 mm\textsuperscript{2} in 14nm CMOS. These results demonstrate strong cross-platform adaptability and effective hardware-software co-optimization, offering a practical matrix extension for the open-source community.

</details>


<div id='cs.DB'></div>

# cs.DB [[Back]](#toc)

### [545] [ROSE: An Intent-Centered Evaluation Metric for NL2SQL](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12988)
*Wenqi Pei,Shizheng Hou,Boyan Li,Han Chen,Zhichao Shi,Yuyu Luo*

Main category: cs.DB

TL;DR: ROSE是一个意图中心的NL2SQL评估指标，通过对抗性证明者-反驳者级联来评估预测SQL是否回答用户问题，而非与参考SQL的语法一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统执行准确率(EX)指标在NL2SQL评估中存在多个问题：对语法变化敏感、忽略问题可能有多种解释、容易被错误的地面真值SQL误导，导致评估不可靠。

Method: ROSE采用意图中心评估范式，包含对抗性证明者-反驳者级联：SQL证明者独立评估预测SQL相对于用户意图的语义正确性；对抗性反驳者使用地面真值SQL作为证据来挑战和精炼这一判断。

Result: 在专家对齐验证集ROSE-VEC上，ROSE与人类专家的一致性最佳，Cohen's Kappa比次优指标高出近24%。对19种NL2SQL方法的大规模重新评估揭示了四个有价值的见解。

Conclusion: ROSE解决了传统EX指标的局限性，提供了更可靠的NL2SQL评估方法。作者发布了ROSE和ROSE-VEC以促进更可靠的NL2SQL研究。

Abstract: Execution Accuracy (EX), the widely used metric for evaluating the effectiveness of Natural Language to SQL (NL2SQL) solutions, is becoming increasingly unreliable. It is sensitive to syntactic variation, ignores that questions may admit multiple interpretations, and is easily misled by erroneous ground-truth SQL. To address this, we introduce ROSE, an intent-centered metric that focuses on whether the predicted SQL answers the question, rather than consistency with the ground-truth SQL under the reference-dependent paradigm. ROSE employs an adversarial Prover-Refuter cascade: SQL Prover assesses the semantic correctness of a predicted SQL against the user's intent independently, while Adversarial Refuter uses the ground-truth SQL as evidence to challenge and refine this judgment. On our expert-aligned validation set ROSE-VEC, ROSE achieves the best agreement with human experts, outperforming the next-best metric by nearly 24% in Cohen's Kappa. We also conduct a largescale re-evaluation of 19 NL2SQL methods, revealing four valuable insights. We release ROSE and ROSE-VEC to facilitate more reliable NL2SQL research.

</details>


### [546] [Lit2Vec: A Reproducible Workflow for Building a Legally Screened Chemistry Corpus from S2ORC for Downstream Retrieval and Text Mining](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12498)
*Mahmoud Amiri,Jamile Mohammad Jafari,Sara Mostafapour,Thomas Bocklitz*

Main category: cs.DB

TL;DR: Lit2Vec：基于语义学者开放研究语料库，通过保守的元数据许可筛选构建化学语料库的可复现工作流程，包含58万篇化学全文研究文章，提供段落级嵌入、摘要、许可信息等结构化数据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 构建一个可复现的化学领域语料库工作流程，解决现有化学文本挖掘研究中语料库构建缺乏标准化、许可筛选不明确、可复现性不足的问题，为下游检索和文本挖掘应用提供高质量基础数据。

Method: 1. 使用语义学者开放研究语料库作为基础数据源；2. 通过Unpaywall、OpenAlex和Crossref的元数据进行保守的许可筛选；3. 构建包含582,683篇化学全文研究文章的内部研究语料库；4. 使用intfloat/e5-large-v2模型生成段落级嵌入；5. 对符合条件的子集添加机器生成的简要摘要和18个化学领域的多标签子领域标注；6. 进行模式合规性、嵌入可复现性、文本质量和元数据完整性的技术验证。

Result: 成功构建了一个包含582,683篇化学全文研究文章的可复现语料库，提供结构化全文、标记感知段落块、段落级嵌入、摘要和许可信息等元数据。工作流程经过技术验证，确保模式合规、嵌入可复现、文本质量高、元数据完整。发布了代码、重建工作流程、模式、元数据/来源工件和验证输出，使其他研究人员能够从固定的公共上游资源复现语料库。

Conclusion: Lit2Vec提供了一个可复现的化学语料库构建和验证工作流程，解决了化学文本挖掘中语料库构建的标准化和可复现性问题。主要贡献包括工作流程本身及其相关模式和可复现性资源，为下游检索和文本挖掘应用提供了高质量基础，同时明确了许可边界（不公开发布源文本和广泛的文本衍生表示）。

Abstract: We present Lit2Vec, a reproducible workflow for constructing and validating a chemistry corpus from the Semantic Scholar Open Research Corpus using conservative, metadata-based license screening. Using this workflow, we assembled an internal study corpus of 582,683 chemistry-specific full-text research articles with structured full text, token-aware paragraph chunks, paragraph-level embeddings generated with the intfloat/e5-large-v2 model, and record-level metadata including abstracts and licensing information. To support downstream retrieval and text-mining use cases, an eligible subset of the corpus was additionally enriched with machine-generated brief summaries and multi-label subfield annotations spanning 18 chemistry domains. Licensing was screened using metadata from Unpaywall, OpenAlex, and Crossref, and the resulting corpus was technically validated for schema compliance, embedding reproducibility, text quality, and metadata completeness. The primary contribution of this work is a reproducible workflow for corpus construction and validation, together with its associated schema and reproducibility resources. The released materials include the code, reconstruction workflow, schema, metadata/provenance artifacts, and validation outputs needed to reproduce the corpus from pinned public upstream resources. Public redistribution of source-derived text and broad text-derived representations is outside the scope of the general release. Researchers can reproduce the workflow by using the released pipeline with publicly available upstream datasets and metadata services.

</details>


<div id='cs.LO'></div>

# cs.LO [[Back]](#toc)

### [547] [Formally Guaranteed Control Adaptation for ODD-Resilient Autonomous Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07414)
*Gricel Vázquez,Calum Imrie,Sepeedeh Shahbeigi,Nawshin Mannan Proma,Tian Gan,Victoria J Hodge,John Molloy,Simos Gerasimou*

Main category: cs.LO

TL;DR: 提出一种自适应概率系统模型方法，用于处理超出操作设计域的场景，并提供定量保证，增强自主系统在意外情况下的可靠性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 确保自主系统在超出操作设计域（ODD）情况下的可靠性能是构建弹性自主系统的主要挑战。现有系统在面对未预料场景时缺乏适应能力和形式化保证。

Method: 引入自适应概率系统模型方法，动态扩展现有系统态势能力覆盖范围，支持在未预料情况下验证和调整系统行为，同时提供定量保证。

Result: 初步结果表明，该方法能有效提高系统可靠性，即使在未预见的超出ODD情况下，也能通过行为调整和形式化保证增强系统性能。

Conclusion: 所提出的方法为解决自主系统在超出操作设计域场景下的可靠性挑战提供了有前景的解决方案，通过动态适应和形式化保证增强了系统弹性。

Abstract: Ensuring reliable performance in situations outside the Operational Design Domain (ODD) remains a primary challenge in devising resilient autonomous systems. We explore this challenge by introducing an approach for adapting probabilistic system models to handle out-of-ODD scenarios while, in parallel, providing quantitative guarantees. Our approach dynamically extends the coverage of existing system situation capabilities, supporting the verification and adaptation of the system's behaviour under unanticipated situations. Preliminary results demonstrate that our approach effectively increases system reliability by adapting its behaviour and providing formal guarantees even under unforeseen out-of-ODD situations.

</details>


<div id='cs.CY'></div>

# cs.CY [[Back]](#toc)

### [548] [Who Gets Flagged? The Pluralistic Evaluation Gap in AI Content Watermarking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13776)
*Alexander Nemecek,Osama Zafar,Yuqiao Xu,Wenbiao Li,Erman Ayday*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 论文指出AI水印技术存在内容依赖性偏见，现有基准测试缺乏跨语言、文化和人口群体的评估，提出三个多元化评估维度，并呼吁在部署前进行公平性审计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 水印技术已成为AI内容认证的默认机制，但其信号强度、可检测性和鲁棒性依赖于内容本身的统计特性，这些特性在不同语言、文化视觉传统和人口群体中系统性变化。现有水印基准测试大多未报告跨语言、文化内容类型或人口群体的性能差异，存在公平性风险。

Method: 通过回顾各模态（文本、图像、音频）的主要水印基准测试，分析其评估方法的局限性。提出三个具体的多元化水印基准评估维度：跨语言检测均等性、文化多样性内容覆盖、检测指标的群体分解。将这些维度与当前要求水印部署的治理框架联系起来。

Result: 研究发现，除一个例外，所有水印基准测试均未报告跨语言、文化内容类型或人口群体的性能差异。水印技术被要求部署的治理框架对其公平性标准低于其旨在监管的生成系统本身。

Conclusion: 评估应先于部署，应用于AI模型的偏见审计要求应扩展到验证层。水印技术需要建立多元化的基准测试框架，确保在不同语言、文化和人口群体中的公平性能。

Abstract: Watermarking is becoming the default mechanism for AI content authentication, with governance policies and frameworks referencing it as infrastructure for content provenance. Yet across text, image, and audio modalities, watermark signal strength, detectability, and robustness depend on statistical properties of the content itself, properties that vary systematically across languages, cultural visual traditions, and demographic groups. We examine how this content dependence creates modality-specific pathways to bias. Reviewing the major watermarking benchmarks across modalities, we find that, with one exception, none report performance across languages, cultural content types, or population groups. To address this, we propose three concrete evaluation dimensions for pluralistic watermark benchmarking: cross-lingual detection parity, culturally diverse content coverage, and demographic disaggregation of detection metrics. We connect these to the governance frameworks currently mandating watermarking deployment and show that watermarking is held to a lower fairness standard than the generative systems it is meant to govern. Our position is that evaluation must precede deployment, and that the same bias auditing requirements applied to AI models should extend to the verification layer.

</details>


### [549] [Automatically Inferring Teachers' Geometric Content Knowledge: A Skills Based Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13666)
*Ziv Fenigstein,Kobi Gal,Avi Segal,Osama Swidan,Inbal Israel,Hassan Ayoob*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 开发基于大语言模型的自动化方法，通过整合几何推理技能词典来诊断教师的范希尔几何思维水平，显著提升了分类性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统范希尔几何思维水平评估依赖专家手动分析开放式回答，耗时耗力且难以规模化，需要开发自动化评估方法以支持大规模教师几何推理能力评估。

Method: 与数学教育研究者合作构建包含33个细粒度推理技能的结构化技能词典，收集31名职前教师的226个几何问题回答，专家标注范希尔水平和技能。实现两种分类方法：检索增强生成（RAG）和多任务学习（MTL），每种方法都对比了包含技能信息的变体与无技能信息的基线。

Result: 对于两种方法，包含技能信息的变体在多个评估指标上均显著优于基线，验证了整合显式技能信息能显著提升范希尔分类性能的假设。

Conclusion: 首次实现了从开放式回答中自动分类范希尔几何思维水平的方法，提供了可扩展、理论基础的教师几何推理评估方法，支持大规模评估和个性化教师学习系统。

Abstract: Assessing teachers' geometric content knowledge is essential for geometry instructional quality and student learning, but difficult to scale. The Van Hiele model characterizes geometric reasoning through five hierarchical levels. Traditional Van Hiele assessment relies on manual expert analysis of open-ended responses. This process is time-consuming, costly, and prevents large-scale evaluation. This study develops an automated approach for diagnosing teachers' Van Hiele reasoning levels using large language models grounded in educational theory. Our central hypothesis is that integrating explicit skills information significantly improves Van Hiele classification. In collaboration with mathematics education researchers, we built a structured skills dictionary decomposing the Van Hiele levels into 33 fine-grained reasoning skills. Through a custom web platform, 31 pre-service teachers solved geometry problems, yielding 226 responses. Expert researchers then annotated each response with its Van Hiele level and demonstrated skills from the dictionary. Using this annotated dataset, we implemented two classification approaches: (1) retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) and (2) multi-task learning (MTL). Each approach compared a skills-aware variant incorporating the skills dictionary against a baseline without skills information. Results showed that for both methods, skills-aware variants significantly outperformed baselines across multiple evaluation metrics. This work provides the first automated approach for Van Hiele level classification from open-ended responses. It offers a scalable, theory-grounded method for assessing teachers' geometric reasoning that can enable large-scale evaluation and support adaptive, personalized teacher learning systems.

</details>


### [550] [Infrastructure First: Enabling Embodied AI for Science in the Global South](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06722)
*Shaoshan Liu,Jie Tang,Marwa S. Hassan,Mohamed H. Sharkawy,Moustafa M. G. Fouda,Tiewei Shang,Zixin Wang*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: EAI4S通过感知、推理和机器人行动实现实验室自主实验，对全球南方而言，关键不是算法能力而是基础设施，需要边缘计算、节能硬件、模块化机器人等基础支撑才能将AI转化为可持续科研能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决全球南方科研面临的根本能力约束：人手不足无法运行足够多的实验。通过EAI4S实现持续可靠的实验自动化，将自动化从奢侈品转变为必要的科研基础设施。

Method: 提出基础设施优先的方法，强调需要可靠的边缘计算、节能硬件、模块化机器人系统、本地化数据管道和开放标准等基础支撑。

Result: 开源AI和基础模型已经缩小了知识差距，但EAI4S的成功部署依赖于上述基础设施的建立，否则最强大的模型也只能局限在资源充足的实验室中。

Conclusion: 为全球南方机构提供了一条将AI进步转化为可持续科研能力和有竞争力研究成果的具体路径，强调基础设施优先是实现规模化部署具身智能的关键。

Abstract: Embodied AI for Science (EAI4S) brings intelligence into the laboratory by uniting perception, reasoning, and robotic action to autonomously run experiments in the physical world. For the Global South, this shift is not about adopting advanced automation for its own sake, but about overcoming a fundamental capacity constraint: too few hands to run too many experiments. By enabling continuous, reliable experimentation under limits of manpower, power, and connectivity, EAI4S turns automation from a luxury into essential scientific infrastructure. The main obstacle, however, is not algorithmic capability. It is infrastructure. Open-source AI and foundation models have narrowed the knowledge gap, but EAI4S depends on dependable edge compute, energy-efficient hardware, modular robotic systems, localized data pipelines, and open standards. Without these foundations, even the most capable models remain trapped in well-resourced laboratories. This article argues for an infrastructure-first approach to EAI4S and outlines the practical requirements for deploying embodied intelligence at scale, offering a concrete pathway for Global South institutions to translate AI advances into sustained scientific capacity and competitive research output.

</details>


<div id='physics.comp-ph'></div>

# physics.comp-ph [[Back]](#toc)

### [551] [AeTHERON: Autoregressive Topology-aware Heterogeneous Graph Operator Network for Fluid-Structure Interaction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13369)
*Sushrut Kumar*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: AeTHERON是一种异构图神经算子，通过双图表示分离流体和结构域，使用稀疏交叉注意力模拟浸没边界法，实现了对柔性尾鳍拍动等复杂流固耦合问题的快速高精度预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 浸没运动边界驱动的流固耦合问题中，结构动力学与混沌、非定常流体现象耦合，这对计算物理和机器学习都是根本性挑战。现有方法难以高效准确地模拟这类复杂物理现象。

Method: 提出AeTHERON异构图神经算子，其架构直接镜像锐界面浸没边界法：采用双图表示分离流体和结构域，通过稀疏交叉注意力耦合，反映IBM插值模板的紧支撑特性。使用连续正弦时间嵌入提供跨时间步的泛化能力。

Result: 在柔性尾鳍拍动DNS模拟上评估，训练前150个时间步，评估150-200时间步的未见外推窗口。AeTHERON能捕捉大尺度涡拓扑和尾迹结构，平均外推MAE为0.168，误差峰值出现在拍动半周期转换处（流动重组最迅速）。单GPU推理仅需毫秒级，而等效DNS计算需数小时。

Conclusion: AeTHERON通过物理信息归纳偏置，在共享高维潜空间中学习非线性流固耦合，实现了对复杂流固耦合问题的快速准确预测，为计算物理和机器学习交叉领域提供了有前景的解决方案。

Abstract: Surrogate modeling of body-driven fluid flows where immersed moving boundaries couple structural dynamics to chaotic, unsteady fluid phenomena remains a fundamental challenge for both computational physics and machine learning. We present AeTHERON, a heterogeneous graph neural operator whose architecture directly mirrors the structure of the sharp-interface immersed boundary method (IBM): a dual-graph representation separating fluid and structural domains, coupled through sparse cross-attention that reflects the compact support of IBM interpolation stencils. This physics-informed inductive bias enables AeTHERON to learn nonlinear fluid-structure coupling in a shared high-dimensional latent space, with continuous sinusoidal time embeddings providing temporal generalization across lead times. We evaluate AeTHERON on direct numerical simulations of a flapping flexible caudal fin, a canonical FSI benchmark featuring leading-edge vortex formation, large membrane deformation, and chaotic wake shedding across a 4x5 parameter grid of membrane thickness (h* = 0.01-0.04) and Strouhal number (St = 0.30-0.50). As a proof-of-concept, we train on the first 150 timesteps of a representative case using a 70/30 train/validation split and evaluate on the fully unseen extrapolation window t=150-200. AeTHERON captures large-scale vortex topology and wake structure with qualitative fidelity, achieving a mean extrapolation MAE of 0.168 without retraining, with error peaking near flapping half-cycle transitions where flow reorganization is most rapid -- a physically interpretable pattern consistent with the nonlinear fluid-membrane coupling. Inference requires milliseconds per timestep on a single GPU versus hours for equivalent DNS computation. This is a continuously developing preprint; results and figures will be updated in subsequent versions.

</details>


<div id='astro-ph.SR'></div>

# astro-ph.SR [[Back]](#toc)

### [552] [Irregularly Sampled Time Series Interpolation for Binary Evolution Simulations Using Dynamic Time Warping](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13604)
*Ugur Demir,Philipp M. Srivastava,Aggelos Katsaggelos,Vicky Kalogera,Santiago L. Tapia,Manuel Ballester,Shamal Lalvani,Patrick Koller,Jeff J. Andrews,Seth Gossage,Max M. Briel,Elizabeth Teng*

Main category: astro-ph.SR

TL;DR: 提出基于动态时间规整的联合对齐方法，解决双星演化轨迹插值中的时间错位问题，显著提高计算效率和精度


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 双星演化模拟计算成本高昂，传统单星轨迹插值方法不适用于复杂的双星系统，因为双星相互作用会引入演化轨迹的不连续性和时间错位问题

Method: 基于动态时间规整的轨迹对齐和迭代轨迹平均方法，同时计算所有物理参数的共享规整路径，将参数置于一致的时间网格上，保持参数间的因果关系

Result: 联合对齐策略能保持关键物理关系（如斯特藩-玻尔兹曼定律），在多种双星配置评估中优于现有方法，实现更准确的双星群体样本生成

Conclusion: 适当的时间对齐对轨迹插值方法至关重要，提出的方法能高效生成更准确的双星演化轨迹，为天体物理研究提供更好的计算工具

Abstract: Binary stellar evolution simulations are computationally expensive. Stellar population synthesis relies on these detailed evolution models at a fundamental level. Producing thousands of such models requires hundreds of CPU hours, but stellar track interpolation provides one approach to significantly reduce this computational cost. Although single-star track interpolation is straightforward, stellar interactions in binary systems introduce significant complexity to binary evolution, making traditional single-track interpolation methods inapplicable. Binary tracks present fundamentally different challenges compared to single stars, which possess relatively straightforward evolutionary phases identifiable through distinct physical properties. Binary systems are complicated by mutual interactions that can dramatically alter evolutionary trajectories and introduce discontinuities difficult to capture through standard interpolation. In this work, we introduce a novel approach for track alignment and iterative track averaging based on Dynamic Time Warping to address misalignments between neighboring tracks. Our method computes a single shared warping path across all physical parameters simultaneously, placing them on a consistent temporal grid that preserves the causal relationships between parameters. We demonstrate that this joint-alignment strategy maintains key physical relationships such as the Stefan-Boltzmann law in the interpolated tracks. Our comprehensive evaluation across multiple binary configurations demonstrates that proper temporal alignment is crucial for track interpolation methods. The proposed method consistently outperforms existing approaches and enables the efficient generation of more accurate binary population samples for astrophysical studies.

</details>


<div id='stat.ML'></div>

# stat.ML [[Back]](#toc)

### [553] [Covariance-adapting algorithm for semi-bandits with application to sparse rewards](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13738)
*Pierre Perrault,Vianney Perchet,Michal Valko*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 论文研究了随机组合半赌博机问题，提出了一种新的次指数分布族来替代传统次高斯假设，建立了基于未知协方差矩阵的遗憾下界，并设计了使用协方差估计的算法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统随机组合半赌博机问题通常假设特定的参数化分布族（如次高斯分布），这些分布需要先验知识但在实践中难以估计。作者旨在缓解这一问题，通过考虑更一般的次指数分布族，该族包含有界分布和高斯分布，从而降低对先验知识的依赖。

Method: 1. 提出新的次指数分布族，包含有界和高斯分布；2. 证明基于未知协方差矩阵的遗憾下界，该下界比次高斯矩阵更紧；3. 构建使用协方差估计的算法；4. 将结果扩展到稀疏结果族，适用于推荐系统等应用。

Result: 1. 建立了次指数分布族下的遗憾下界，该下界由未知协方差矩阵参数化；2. 设计了使用协方差估计的算法，并提供了紧的渐近遗憾分析；3. 将结果应用于稀疏结果族，展示了在推荐系统等领域的应用潜力。

Conclusion: 论文通过引入更一般的次指数分布族，解决了传统方法对先验知识依赖过强的问题。提出的基于协方差估计的算法在次指数分布下实现了紧的渐近遗憾界，并将结果扩展到稀疏结果场景，为实际应用提供了更实用的理论框架。

Abstract: We investigate stochastic combinatorial semi-bandits, where the entire joint distribution of outcomes impacts the complexity of the problem instance (unlike in the standard bandits). Typical distributions considered depend on specific parameter values, whose prior knowledge is required in theory but quite difficult to estimate in practice; an example is the commonly assumed sub-Gaussian family. We alleviate this issue by instead considering a new general family of sub-exponential distributions, which contains bounded and Gaussian ones. We prove a new lower bound on the expected regret on this family, that is parameterized by the unknown covariance matrix of outcomes, a tighter quantity than the sub-Gaussian matrix. We then construct an algorithm that uses covariance estimates, and provide a tight asymptotic analysis of the regret. Finally, we apply and extend our results to the family of sparse outcomes, which has applications in many recommender systems.

</details>


### [554] [Robust Low-Rank Tensor Completion based on M-product with Weighted Correlated Total Variation and Sparse Regularization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13525)
*Biswarup Karmakar,Ratikanta Behera*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出TWCTV正则化方法，通过加权Schatten-p范数和稀疏分量处理，解决张量补全中的结构保留问题，优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有张量补全方法使用统一的核范数和ℓ1范数正则化，对所有奇异值和稀疏分量施加相同收缩，破坏了关键张量结构，需要更精细的正则化方案。

Method: 提出张量加权相关全变分(TWCTV)正则化器，基于M-积框架结合加权Schatten-p范数（用于梯度张量的低秩性和平滑性）和加权稀疏分量（用于噪声抑制），采用自适应阈值降低策略保护主要奇异值和稀疏分量。

Result: 通过增强的ADMM算法实现计算效率和理论保证，在图像补全、去噪和背景减除任务中验证了优于基准方法的性能。

Conclusion: TWCTV方法通过自适应加权方案有效保护张量结构细节，在鲁棒低秩张量补全问题上取得了显著改进。

Abstract: The robust low-rank tensor completion problem addresses the challenge of recovering corrupted high-dimensional tensor data with missing entries, outliers, and sparse noise commonly found in real-world applications. Existing methodologies have encountered fundamental limitations due to their reliance on uniform regularization schemes, particularly the tensor nuclear norm and $\ell_1$ norm regularization approaches, which indiscriminately apply equal shrinkage to all singular values and sparse components, thereby compromising the preservation of critical tensor structures. The proposed tensor weighted correlated total variation (TWCTV) regularizer addresses these shortcomings through an $M$-product framework that combines a weighted Schatten-$p$ norm on gradient tensors for low-rankness with smoothness enforcement and weighted sparse components for noise suppression. The proposed weighting scheme adaptively reduces the thresholding level to preserve both dominant singular values and sparse components, thus improving the reconstruction of critical structural elements and nuanced details in the recovered signal. Through a systematic algorithmic approach, we introduce an enhanced alternating direction method of multipliers (ADMM) that offers both computational efficiency and theoretical substantiation, with convergence properties comprehensively analyzed within the $M$-product framework.Comprehensive numerical evaluations across image completion, denoising, and background subtraction tasks validate the superior performance of this approach relative to established benchmark methods.

</details>


### [555] [Identifiability of Potentially Degenerate Gaussian Mixture Models With Piecewise Affine Mixing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13218)
*Danru Xu,Sébastien Lachapelle,Sara Magliacane*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 该论文研究因果表示学习，针对潜在变量服从可能退化的高斯混合分布且通过分段仿射混合函数观测的情况，提出了一系列逐步增强的可识别性结果，并基于稀疏正则化开发了两阶段估计方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 因果表示学习旨在从高维观测中识别潜在变量，但在变量相互依赖、潜在变量服从可能退化的高斯混合分布且通过分段仿射混合函数观测的挑战性场景中，由于概率密度函数可能未定义，现有方法面临困难。

Method: 提出基于稀疏正则化的可识别性理论框架，利用潜在变量的稀疏性实现排列和缩放级别的可识别性。基于理论结果开发两阶段估计方法：第一阶段通过稀疏正则化学习表示，第二阶段通过高斯性约束精炼估计。

Result: 在合成数据和图像数据上的实验表明，该方法能有效恢复真实潜在变量，验证了理论可识别性结果的实际可行性。

Conclusion: 该研究为退化高斯混合分布和分段仿射混合函数下的因果表示学习提供了理论保证和实用方法，通过稀疏正则化解决了概率密度函数未定义带来的挑战。

Abstract: Causal representation learning (CRL) aims to identify the underlying latent variables from high-dimensional observations, even when variables are dependent with each other. We study this problem for latent variables that follow a potentially degenerate Gaussian mixture distribution and that are only observed through the transformation via a piecewise affine mixing function. We provide a series of progressively stronger identifiability results for this challenging setting in which the probability density functions are ill-defined because of the potential degeneracy. For identifiability up to permutation and scaling, we leverage a sparsity regularization on the learned representation. Based on our theoretical results, we propose a two-stage method to estimate the latent variables by enforcing sparsity and Gaussianity in the learned representations. Experiments on synthetic and image data highlight our method's effectiveness in recovering the ground-truth latent variables.

</details>


### [556] [Rare Event Analysis via Stochastic Optimal Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13213)
*Yuanqi Du,Jiajun He,Dinghuai Zhang,Eric Vanden-Eijnden,Carles Domingo-Enrich*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 将过渡路径理论中的承诺函数估计转化为随机最优控制问题，通过反馈控制引导轨迹采样，提高稀有事件模拟效率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生物分子构象变化、相变和化学反应等稀有事件在物理系统中至关重要，但无偏模拟很难产生这些事件。过渡路径理论提供了分析框架，但其核心承诺函数的准确估计具有挑战性

Method: 将承诺函数估计转化为随机最优控制问题，承诺函数定义了反馈控制策略。开发了两种互补目标函数：直接反向传播损失和离策略值匹配损失，并引入替代采样过程解决亚稳态问题

Result: 在基准系统上，该方法比现有方法显著提高了承诺函数估计、反应速率和平衡常数的准确性

Conclusion: 随机最优控制框架为稀有事件模拟提供了更准确高效的承诺函数估计方法，能够更好地采样反应路径并克服亚稳态问题

Abstract: Rare events such as conformational changes in biomolecules, phase transitions, and chemical reactions are central to the behavior of many physical systems, yet they are extremely difficult to study computationally because unbiased simulations seldom produce them. Transition Path Theory (TPT) provides a rigorous statistical framework for analyzing such events: it characterizes the ensemble of reactive trajectories between two designated metastable states (reactant and product), and its central object--the committor function, which gives the probability that the system will next reach the product rather than the reactant--encodes all essential kinetic and thermodynamic information. We introduce a framework that casts committor estimation as a stochastic optimal control (SOC) problem. In this formulation the committor defines a feedback control--proportional to the gradient of its logarithm--that actively steers trajectories toward the reactive region, thereby enabling efficient sampling of reactive paths. To solve the resulting hitting-time control problem we develop two complementary objectives: a direct backpropagation loss and a principled off-policy Value Matching loss, for which we establish first-order optimality guarantees. We further address metastability, which can trap controlled trajectories in intermediate basins, by introducing an alternative sampling process that preserves the reactive current while lowering effective energy barriers. On benchmark systems, the framework yields markedly more accurate committor estimates, reaction rates, and equilibrium constants than existing methods.

</details>


### [557] [Causal Diffusion Models for Counterfactual Outcome Distributions in Longitudinal Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12992)
*Farbod Alinezhad,Jianfei Cao,Gary J. Young,Brady Post*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: CDM是首个基于去噪扩散概率模型的因果推断方法，专门用于生成序列干预下的反事实结果概率分布，无需显式解混杂调整，在复杂时间依赖混杂场景中优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 纵向数据中反事实结果预测面临两大挑战：1) 序列治疗决策严重依赖患者状态演变，存在复杂的时间依赖混杂；2) 现有方法在不确定性量化方面不足。需要一种能够生成完整概率分布且无需显式解混杂调整的方法。

Method: CDM采用创新的残差去噪架构和关系自注意力机制，捕捉复杂的时间依赖性和多模态结果轨迹。该方法基于去噪扩散概率模型，无需逆概率加权或对抗平衡等显式解混杂调整。

Result: 在药代动力学-药效学肿瘤生长模拟器上的评估显示，CDM在分布准确性（1-Wasserstein距离）上相对改进15-30%，在高混杂场景下保持竞争性或更优的点估计准确性（RMSE），显著优于现有纵向因果推断方法。

Conclusion: CDM统一了不确定性量化和稳健的反事实预测，无需定制化解混杂，为医学决策支持、政策评估等纵向领域提供了灵活高效的工具。

Abstract: Predicting counterfactual outcomes in longitudinal data, where sequential treatment decisions heavily depend on evolving patient states, is critical yet notoriously challenging due to complex time-dependent confounding and inadequate uncertainty quantification in existing methods. We introduce the Causal Diffusion Model (CDM), the first denoising diffusion probabilistic approach explicitly designed to generate full probabilistic distributions of counterfactual outcomes under sequential interventions.
