This perspective has implications for model design, evaluation protocols, and benchmark construction, and outline open research challenges toward robust, context-aware multimodal anomaly detection.

</details>


### [633] [FAST: A Synergistic Framework of Attention and State-space Models for Spatiotemporal Traffic Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13453)
*Xinjin Li,Jinghan Cao,Mengyue Wang,Yue Wu,Longxiang Yan,Yeyang Zhou,Ziqi Sha,Yu Ma*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: FAST是一个结合注意力机制和状态空间模型的统一框架，用于可扩展的时空交通预测，通过Temporal-Spatial-Temporal架构和可学习的多源时空嵌入，在保持线性复杂度的同时实现更好的预测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有交通预测方法在表达能力和效率之间存在权衡：基于Transformer的模型能很好捕捉全局依赖但具有二次复杂度，而选择性状态空间模型计算高效但在图结构交通数据中建模空间交互效果较差。需要一种既能有效建模复杂时空动态和长程空间依赖，又能保持计算效率的方法。

Method: FAST采用Temporal-Spatial-Temporal架构：时间注意力模块捕捉短期和长期时间模式，基于Mamba的空间模块以线性复杂度建模传感器间的长程依赖。引入可学习的多源时空嵌入，整合历史交通流、时间上下文和节点级信息，并采用多级跳跃预测机制进行分层特征融合。

Result: 在PeMS04、PeMS07和PeMS08数据集上的实验表明，FAST在Transformer、GNN、注意力和Mamba等基线方法中表现最佳。在所有三个基准测试中都取得了最好的MAE和RMSE，比最强基线RMSE降低达4.3%，MAE降低达2.8%，展示了准确性、可扩展性和泛化性的良好平衡。

Conclusion: FAST通过统一注意力机制和状态空间建模，成功解决了交通预测中表达能力和效率的权衡问题，在保持线性复杂度的同时实现了更好的预测性能，为可扩展的时空交通预测提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Traffic forecasting requires modeling complex temporal dynamics and long-range spatial dependencies over large sensor networks. Existing methods typically face a trade-off between expressiveness and efficiency: Transformer-based models capture global dependencies well but suffer from quadratic complexity, while recent selective state-space models are computationally efficient yet less effective at modeling spatial interactions in graph-structured traffic data. We propose FAST, a unified framework that combines attention and state-space modeling for scalable spatiotemporal traffic forecasting. FAST adopts a Temporal-Spatial-Temporal architecture, where temporal attention modules capture both short- and long-term temporal patterns, and a Mamba-based spatial module models long-range inter-sensor dependencies with linear complexity. To better represent heterogeneous traffic contexts, FAST further introduces a learnable multi-source spatiotemporal embedding that integrates historical traffic flow, temporal context, and node-level information, together with a multi-level skip prediction mechanism for hierarchical feature fusion. Experiments on PeMS04, PeMS07, and PeMS08 show that FAST consistently outperforms strong baselines from Transformer-, GNN-, attention-, and Mamba-based families. In particular, FAST achieves the best MAE and RMSE on all three benchmarks, with up to 4.3\% lower RMSE and 2.8\% lower MAE than the strongest baseline, demonstrating a favorable balance between accuracy, scalability, and generalization.

</details>


### [634] [WIN-U: Woodbury-Informed Newton-Unlearning as a retain-free Machine Unlearning Framework](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13438)
*Xingjian Zhao,Mohammad Mohammadi Amiri,Malik Magdon-Ismail*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: WIN-U：一种无需保留数据的遗忘学习框架，仅需原始模型在完整数据上的二阶信息，通过牛顿式单步更新实现高效遗忘


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型中的隐私问题催生了数据"被遗忘权"的需求。现有遗忘学习方法大多需要直接访问保留数据，这在隐私或成本限制下不切实际。需要开发无需保留数据的遗忘学习方法。

Method: 提出WIN-U框架，仅需原始模型在完整数据上的二阶信息。使用Woodbury矩阵恒等式和遗忘集曲率的广义高斯-牛顿近似，通过单步牛顿式更新实现遗忘。该方法恢复了闭式线性解，并作为黄金标准重新训练最优解的局部二阶近似。

Result: 在多种视觉和语言基准测试中，WIN-U在遗忘效能和效用保持方面达到SOTA性能，相比现有方法对重新学习攻击更具鲁棒性。重要的是，WIN-U无需访问保留数据。

Conclusion: WIN-U提供了一种高效、实用的遗忘学习解决方案，解决了现有方法需要保留数据访问权限的限制，在隐私保护和模型效用之间取得了良好平衡。

Abstract: Privacy concerns in LLMs have led to the rapidly growing need to enforce a data's "right to be forgotten". Machine unlearning addresses precisely this task, namely the removal of the influence of some specific data, i.e., the forget set, from a trained model. The gold standard for unlearning is to produce the model that would have been learned on only the rest of the training data, i.e., the retain set. Most existing unlearning methods rely on direct access to the retained data, which may not be practical due to privacy or cost constraints. We propose WIN-U, a retained-data free unlearning framework that requires only second order information for the originally trained model on the full data. The unlearning is performed using a single Newton-style step. Using the Woodbury matrix identity and a generalized Gauss-Newton approximation for the forget set curvature, the WIN-U update recovers the closed-form linear solution and serves as a local second-order approximation to the gold-standard retraining optimum. Extensive experiments on various vision and language benchmarks demonstrate that WIN-U achieves SOTA performance in terms of unlearning efficacy and utility preservation, while being more robust against relearning attacks compared to existing methods. Importantly, WIN-U does not require access to the retained data.

</details>


### [635] [Dataset-Level Metrics Attenuate Non-Determinism: A Fine-Grained Non-Determinism Evaluation in Diffusion Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13413)
*Zhengyu Fang,Zhimeng Jiang,Huiyuan Chen,Xiaoge Zhang,Tianyi Li,Kaiyu Tang,Xiao Li,Jing Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文指出扩散语言模型(DLMs)的非确定性行为评估存在局限，现有数据集级指标会系统性地弱化非确定性表现。作者通过细粒度评估发现DLMs的非确定性普遍存在且具有结构性，并提出了因子方差归因(FVA)方法来分解不同因素对非确定性的贡献。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散语言模型作为大型语言模型的新范式，其非确定性行为尚未被充分理解。现有评估主要依赖固定推理配置下的数据集级指标，无法揭示模型在不同运行和评估条件下的行为变化，特别是无法捕捉细粒度的不稳定性和错误模式。

Method: 1) 进行细粒度非确定性评估，分析模型相关因素（引导尺度、扩散步数、蒙特卡洛采样）和系统相关因素（批大小、硬件、数值精度）对样本级预测差异的影响；2) 提出因子方差归因(FVA)方法，通过跨因子分析将观察到的非确定性分解为不同评估因素设置可归因的方差。

Result: 研究发现：1) DLMs的非确定性普遍存在且具有结构性；2) 代码生成对因素选择的敏感性显著高于问答任务；3) 数据集级指标会系统性地弱化非确定性，导致具有相似聚合性能的配置在单个输入上表现出截然不同的行为。

Conclusion: 需要细粒度、因子感知的评估方法来实现对扩散语言模型非确定性的可靠评估。因子方差归因(FVA)为分解非确定性来源提供了有效工具，有助于更全面地理解DLMs的行为特性。

Abstract: Diffusion language models (DLMs) have emerged as a promising paradigm for large language models (LLMs), yet the non-deterministic behavior of DLMs remains poorly understood. The existing non-determinism evaluations for LLMs predominantly rely on dataset-level metrics under fixed inference configurations, providing limited insight into how model behavior varies across runs and evaluation conditions. In this work, we show that dataset-level metrics systematically attenuate non-determinism in diffusion language models by aggregating sample-level prediction quality across different runs. As a result, configurations with similar aggregate performance can exhibit substantially different behaviors on individual inputs, leaving fine-grained instability and distinct error patterns uncharacterized. To address this limitation, we conduct a fine-grained evaluation of non-determinism based on sample-level prediction differences across a range of model-related factors-including guidance scale, diffusion steps, and Monte Carlo sampling-as well as system-related factors such as batch size, hardware, and numerical precision. Our analysis reveals that non-determinism in DLMs is pervasive and structured, with code generation exhibiting markedly higher sensitivity to factor-level choices than question answering. To attribute sources of non-determinism evaluation, we introduce Factor Variance Attribution (FVA), a cross-factor analysis metric that decomposes observed non-determinism into variance attributable to different evaluation factor settings. Our findings highlight the need for fine-grained, factor-aware evaluation to enable reliable non-determinism assessment of diffusion language models.

</details>


### [636] [KV Packet: Recomputation-Free Context-Independent KV Caching for LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13226)
*Chuangtao Chen,Grace Li Zhang,Xunzhao Yin,Cheng Zhuo,Bing Li,Ulf Schlichtmann*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: KV Packet：一种免重计算的KV缓存重用框架，通过可训练的软令牌适配器包装缓存文档，实现上下文无关的缓存复用，显著降低计算开销和首令牌延迟。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统KV缓存存在上下文依赖性，在不同上下文中重用缓存文档需要重计算KV状态以调整注意力分布。现有解决方案如CacheBlend、EPIC和SAM-KV虽然通过选择性重计算部分令牌来缓解问题，但仍产生不可忽略的计算开销和首令牌延迟增加。

Method: 提出KV Packet框架，将缓存文档视为不可变的"数据包"，用轻量级可训练的软令牌适配器进行包装。这些适配器通过自监督蒸馏训练，以弥合上下文不连续性，实现免重计算的缓存重用。

Result: 在Llama-3.1和Qwen2.5上的实验表明，KV Packet方法实现了接近零的FLOPs，比基于重计算的基线方法具有更低的首令牌延迟，同时保持与完全重计算基线相当的F1分数。

Conclusion: KV Packet通过软令牌适配器实现上下文无关的KV缓存重用，显著降低了计算开销和推理延迟，为大语言模型的高效推理提供了一种有效的解决方案。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) rely heavily on Key-Value (KV) caching to minimize inference latency. However, standard KV caches are context-dependent: reusing a cached document in a new context requires recomputing KV states to account for shifts in attention distribution. Existing solutions such as CacheBlend, EPIC, and SAM-KV mitigate this issue by selectively recomputing a subset of tokens; however, they still incur non-negligible computational overhead (FLOPs) and increased Time-to-First-Token (TTFT) latency. In this paper, we propose KV Packet, a recomputation-free cache reuse framework that treats cached documents as immutable ``packets'' wrapped in light-weight trainable soft-token adapters, which are trained via self-supervised distillation to bridge context discontinuities. Experiments on Llama-3.1 and Qwen2.5 demonstrate that the proposed KV Packet method achieves near-zero FLOPs and lower TTFT than recomputation-based baselines, while retaining F1 scores comparable to those of the full recomputation baseline.

</details>


### [637] [Linear Probe Accuracy Scales with Model Size and Benefits from Multi-Layer Ensembling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13386)
*Erik Nordby,Tasha Pais,Aviel Parrack*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 多层级线性探针集成能有效检测语言模型的欺骗性输出，相比单层探针性能显著提升，且检测能力随模型规模扩大而增强


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 单层线性探针在检测语言模型欺骗性输出时存在脆弱性：最佳检测层因模型和任务而异，且在某些欺骗类型上完全失效。需要更鲁棒的检测方法来应对欺骗和奖励黑客问题

Method: 提出多层级线性探针集成方法，将多个层的探针结果组合起来，而非依赖单一层。通过几何分析发现欺骗方向在层间逐渐旋转，而非集中在某一特定层

Result: 多层级集成显著提升检测性能：在Insider Trading任务上AUROC提升29%，在Harm-Pressure Knowledge任务上提升78%。在12个模型（0.5B-176B参数）上的实验显示，探针准确率随模型规模扩大而提高，每10倍参数增加约5% AUROC（R=0.81）

Conclusion: 欺骗方向在Transformer层间逐渐旋转的几何特性解释了单层探针的脆弱性和多层集成的成功。多层级线性探针集成为检测语言模型欺骗性输出提供了更鲁棒的方法

Abstract: Linear probes can detect when language models produce outputs they "know" are wrong, a capability relevant to both deception and reward hacking. However, single-layer probes are fragile: the best layer varies across models and tasks, and probes fail entirely on some deception types. We show that combining probes from multiple layers into an ensemble recovers strong performance even where single-layer probes fail, improving AUROC by +29% on Insider Trading and +78% on Harm-Pressure Knowledge. Across 12 models (0.5B--176B parameters), we find probe accuracy improves with scale: ~5% AUROC per 10x parameters (R=0.81). Geometrically, deception directions rotate gradually across layers rather than appearing at one location, explaining both why single-layer probes are brittle and why multi-layer ensembles succeed.

</details>


### [638] [Pareto-Optimal Offline Reinforcement Learning via Smooth Tchebysheff Scalarization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13175)
*Aadyot Bhatnagar,Peter Mørch Groth,Ali Madani*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: STOMP是一种新颖的离线强化学习算法，通过平滑切比雪夫标量化将多目标对齐问题转化为优化问题，在蛋白质工程任务中优于现有基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实应用中经常需要同时优化多个相互冲突的目标（如蛋白质工程中的催化活性和特异性，聊天机器人的帮助性和无害性）。传统线性标量化方法无法恢复帕累托前沿的非凸区域，需要更有效的多目标对齐算法。

Method: 提出STOMP算法：1) 将多目标RL本身作为优化问题，使用平滑切比雪夫标量化克服线性标量化的缺点；2) 通过标准化观察到的个体奖励分布，将直接偏好优化扩展到多目标设置；3) 在三个蛋白质语言模型和三个实验室数据集上进行对齐。

Result: 在九个设置中的八个中，STOMP实现了最高的超体积（根据离线离策略和生成评估）。在蛋白质工程任务中，STOMP显著优于现有最先进的基线方法。

Conclusion: STOMP是一种强大、稳健的多目标对齐算法，能够有意义地改进后训练模型，适用于多属性蛋白质优化及其他领域。

Abstract: Large language models can be aligned with human preferences through offline reinforcement learning (RL) on small labeled datasets. While single-objective alignment is well-studied, many real-world applications demand the simultaneous optimization of multiple conflicting rewards, e.g. optimizing both catalytic activity and specificity in protein engineering, or helpfulness and harmlessness for chatbots. Prior work has largely relied on linear reward scalarization, but this approach provably fails to recover non-convex regions of the Pareto front. In this paper, instead of scalarizing the rewards directly, we frame multi-objective RL itself as an optimization problem to be scalarized via smooth Tchebysheff scalarization, a recent technique that overcomes the shortcomings of linear scalarization. We use this formulation to derive Smooth Tchebysheff Optimization of Multi-Objective Preferences (STOMP), a novel offline RL algorithm that extends direct preference optimization to the multi-objective setting in a principled way by standardizing the individual rewards based on their observed distributions. We empirically validate STOMP on a range of protein engineering tasks by aligning three autoregressive protein language models on three laboratory datasets of protein fitness. Compared to state-of-the-art baselines, STOMP achieves the highest hypervolumes in eight of nine settings according to both offline off-policy and generative evaluations. We thus demonstrate that STOMP is a powerful, robust multi-objective alignment algorithm that can meaningfully improve post-trained models for multi-attribute protein optimization and beyond.

</details>


### [639] [When Less Latent Leads to Better Relay: Information-Preserving Compression for Latent Multi-Agent LLM Collaboration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13349)
*Yiping Li,Zhiyu An,Wan Du*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Orthogonal Backfill方法，通过正交残差注入缓解KV缓存硬驱逐的信息损失，在保持性能的同时显著降低多智能体系统通信成本


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM多智能体系统中，基于完整KV缓存的通信（如LatentMAS）存在高内存和通信成本问题，需要更高效的压缩方法

Method: 采用驱逐式KV压缩，并引入正交回填技术，将丢弃KV状态的低秩正交残差注入保留的KV状态中，减少信息损失

Result: 在9个标准基准测试（数学推理、编码、知识密集型QA）上，性能与完整KV中继相当，通信成本降低79.8%-89.4%，在7个基准上取得最佳结果

Conclusion: 更多信息不一定带来更好的通信效果，保留最有用的信息更为重要；正交回填方法有效平衡了性能与通信效率

Abstract: Communication in Large Language Model (LLM)-based multi-agent systems is moving beyond discrete tokens to preserve richer context. Recent work such as LatentMAS enables agents to exchange latent messages through full key-value (KV) caches. However, full KV relay incurs high memory and communication cost. We adapt eviction-style KV compression to this setting and introduce Orthogonal Backfill (OBF) to mitigate information loss from hard eviction. OBF injects a low-rank orthogonal residual from discarded KV states into the retained KV states. We evaluate proposed method against full KV relay on nine standard benchmarks spanning mathematical reasoning, coding, and knowledge-intensive QA. It achieves performance comparable to full KV relay while reducing communication cost by 79.8%--89.4%. OBF further improves the performance and achieves the best results on 7 of the 9 benchmarks. This suggests that more information does not necessarily lead to better communication; preserving the most useful information matters more. Our codebase is publicly available on https://github.com/markli404/When-Less-Latent-Leads-to-Better-Relay.

</details>


### [640] [Selecting Feature Interactions for Generalized Additive Models by Distilling Foundation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13332)
*Jingyun Jia,Chandan Singh,Rich Caruana,Ben Lengerich*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: TabDistill利用表格基础模型和事后蒸馏方法，通过大规模表征学习隐式学习丰富的自适应特征依赖，提取显著特征交互用于广义加性模型，提升预测性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 识别有意义的特征交互是构建准确且可解释表格数据模型的核心挑战。广义加性模型在建模表格数据方面表现出色，但通常依赖启发式程序选择交互，可能遗漏高阶或上下文依赖效应

Method: 提出TabDistill方法：1）首先为数据集拟合表格基础模型；2）应用事后交互归因方法从中提取显著特征交互；3）将这些交互作为广义加性模型中的项进行评估

Result: TabDistill识别的交互在不同任务中导致下游广义加性模型预测性能的一致改进，表明表格基础模型可以作为有效的、数据驱动的交互发现指南

Conclusion: 表格基础模型可以作为有效的、数据驱动的交互发现指南，桥接高容量模型和可解释的加性框架，为广义加性模型提供更好的特征交互选择

Abstract: Identifying meaningful feature interactions is a central challenge in building accurate and interpretable models for tabular data. Generalized additive models (GAMs) have shown great success at modeling tabular data, but often rely on heuristic procedures to select interactions, potentially missing higher-order or context-dependent effects. To meet this challenge, we propose TabDistill, a method that leverages tabular foundation models and post-hoc distillation methods. Our key intuition is that tabular foundation models implicitly learn rich, adaptive feature dependencies through large-scale representation learning. Given a dataset, TabDistill first fits a tabular foundation model to the dataset, and then applies a post-hoc interaction attribution method to extract salient feature interactions from it. We evaluate these interactions by then using them as terms in a GAM. Across tasks, we find that interactions identified by TabDistill lead to consistent improvements in downstream GAMs' predictive performance. Our results suggest that tabular foundation models can serve as effective, data-driven guides for interaction discovery, bridging high-capacity models and interpretable additive frameworks.

</details>


### [641] [Multi-Task LLM with LoRA Fine-Tuning for Automated Cancer Staging and Biomarker Extraction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13328)
*Jiahao Shao,Anam Nawaz Khan,Christopher Brett,Tom Berg,Xueping Li,Bing Yao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种参数高效的多任务框架，用于从病理报告中自动提取TNM分期、组织学分级和生物标志物信息，通过LoRA微调Llama-3-8B-Instruct编码器，在10,677份专家验证的报告上取得了0.976的宏观F1分数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 病理报告作为乳腺癌分期的权威记录，其非结构化格式阻碍了大规模数据整理。虽然大型语言模型（LLMs）具备语义推理能力，但其部署常受限于高计算成本和幻觉风险。

Method: 使用低秩适应（LoRA）在专家验证的10,677份报告数据集上微调Llama-3-8B-Instruct编码器，采用并行分类头架构而非生成式方法，以确保模式一致性。

Result: 模型取得了0.976的宏观F1分数，成功解决了传统提取方法（包括基于规则的NLP流程、零样本LLMs和单任务LLM基线）难以处理的复杂上下文歧义和异构报告格式问题。

Conclusion: 提出的适配器高效多任务架构能够实现可靠、可扩展的病理衍生癌症分期和生物标志物分析，有潜力增强临床决策支持并加速数据驱动的肿瘤学研究。

Abstract: Pathology reports serve as the definitive record for breast cancer staging, yet their unstructured format impedes large-scale data curation. While Large Language Models (LLMs) offer semantic reasoning, their deployment is often limited by high computational costs and hallucination risks. This study introduces a parameter-efficient, multi-task framework for automating the extraction of Tumor-Node-Metastasis (TNM) staging, histologic grade, and biomarkers. We fine-tune a Llama-3-8B-Instruct encoder using Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) on a curated, expert-verified dataset of 10,677 reports. Unlike generative approaches, our architecture utilizes parallel classification heads to enforce consistent schema adherence. Experimental results demonstrate that the model achieves a Macro F1 score of 0.976, successfully resolving complex contextual ambiguities and heterogeneous reporting formats that challenge traditional extraction methods including rule-based natural language processing (NLP) pipelines, zero-shot LLMs, and single-task LLM baselines. The proposed adapter-efficient, multi-task architecture enables reliable, scalable pathology-derived cancer staging and biomarker profiling, with the potential to enhance clinical decision support and accelerate data-driven oncology research.

</details>


### [642] [Rethinking On-Policy Distillation of Large Language Models: Phenomenology, Mechanism, and Recipe](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13016)
*Yaxuan Li,Yuxin Zuo,Bingxiang He,Jinqian Zhang,Chaojun Xiao,Cheng Qian,Tianyu Yu,Huan-ang Gao,Wenkai Yang,Zhiyuan Liu,Ning Ding*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文系统研究了在线策略蒸馏（OPD）的训练动态与机制，揭示了OPD成功的关键条件：师生需具备兼容的思维模式，且教师需提供学生未见的新能力。研究发现成功的OPD表现为在师生共享的高概率token集上渐进对齐，并提出了恢复失败OPD的实用策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在线策略蒸馏已成为大语言模型后训练的核心技术，但其训练动态机制尚不明确。本文旨在系统探究OPD的成功与失败条件，理解其内在机制，为实际应用提供理论指导。

Method: 通过弱到强反向蒸馏实验验证师生兼容性条件；分析token级机制，识别高概率token对齐模式；提出两种实用策略：离策略冷启动和教师对齐提示选择；探讨OPD在长序列蒸馏中的可扩展性问题。

Result: 发现OPD成功的两个关键条件：师生思维模式兼容且教师提供新能力；验证同族1.5B和7B教师在分布上对学生不可区分；揭示成功OPD表现为在师生共享的97%-99%概率质量的高概率token集上渐进对齐；提出的恢复策略能有效改善失败OPD。

Conclusion: OPD的成功依赖于师生兼容性和教师新能力；其密集token级奖励看似免费实则存在代价，在长序列蒸馏中的可扩展性存疑；提出的实用策略为改善OPD训练提供了有效方法。

Abstract: On-policy distillation (OPD) has become a core technique in the post-training of large language models, yet its training dynamics remain poorly understood. This paper provides a systematic investigation of OPD dynamics and mechanisms. We first identify that two conditions govern whether OPD succeeds or fails: (i) the student and teacher should share compatible thinking patterns; and (ii) even with consistent thinking patterns and higher scores, the teacher must offer genuinely new capabilities beyond what the student has seen during training. We validate these findings through weak-to-strong reverse distillation, showing that same-family 1.5B and 7B teachers are distributionally indistinguishable from the student's perspective. Probing into the token-level mechanism, we show that successful OPD is characterized by progressive alignment on high-probability tokens at student-visited states, a small shared token set that concentrates most of the probability mass (97%-99%). We further propose two practical strategies to recover failing OPD: off-policy cold start and teacher-aligned prompt selection. Finally, we show that OPD's apparent free lunch of dense token-level reward comes at a cost, raising the question of whether OPD can scale to long-horizon distillation.

</details>


### [643] [Lightning OPD: Efficient Post-Training for Large Reasoning Models with Offline On-Policy Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13010)
*Yecheng Wu,Song Han,Hai Cai*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Lightning OPD：一种离线策略蒸馏框架，通过预计算SFT轨迹上的教师对数概率来强制教师一致性，消除实时教师服务器需求，实现与标准OPD相同的性能但效率显著提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准在线策略蒸馏需要实时教师推理服务器，导致大量基础设施开销。离线OPD的简单实现（预计算教师对数概率）在实践中无法可靠匹配标准OPD性能，需要深入理解这种差异的根本原因。

Method: 提出Lightning OPD框架，识别并强制执行教师一致性条件（要求SFT和OPD使用相同的教师模型）。通过预计算SFT轨迹上的教师对数概率，完全消除实时教师服务器需求。证明在教师一致性条件下，Lightning OPD与标准OPD共享相同的最优点，具有有界梯度差异和防止策略漂移的隐式正则化效应。

Result: 实验表明Lightning OPD在数学推理和代码生成任务上达到最先进性能。从SFT初始化的Qwen3-8B-Base模型开始，仅用30GPU小时就在AIME 2024上达到69.9%，相比标准OPD实现4.0倍加速，显著降低了LLM后训练的学术研究门槛。

Conclusion: 教师一致性是OPD成功的关键条件，违反该条件会导致不可约的梯度偏差和次优固定点。Lightning OPD通过离线方式强制执行教师一致性，在保持性能的同时大幅提升效率，为LLM后训练提供了更易访问的解决方案。

Abstract: On-policy distillation (OPD) has emerged as an efficient post-training paradigm for large language models. However, standard OPD requires a live teacher inference server throughout training, resulting in substantial infrastructure overhead. In this work, we investigate whether on-policy distillation can be performed offline. A natural approach is to precompute teacher log-probabilities once over SFT rollouts and reuse them during training. In practice, however, this offline variant fails to reliably match the performance of standard OPD. To understand this discrepancy, we identify a previously overlooked condition that is critical for any OPD pipeline, which we term teacher consistency. This condition requires that the same teacher model be used for both supervised fine-tuning and OPD. We show that violating teacher consistency introduces an irreducible gradient bias, causing both offline and online OPD to converge to a suboptimal fixed point regardless of training duration. Building on this insight, we propose Lightning OPD, an offline on-policy distillation framework that enforces teacher consistency by precomputing teacher log-probabilities over SFT rollouts. This design eliminates the need for a live teacher server entirely. We further show that, under teacher consistency, Lightning OPD shares the same optimum as standard OPD, with bounded gradient discrepancy and an implicit regularization effect that helps prevent policy drift. Extensive experiments on mathematical reasoning and code generation demonstrate that Lightning OPD achieves state-of-the-art performance with significantly improved efficiency. Starting from an SFT-initialized Qwen3-8B-Base model, Lightning OPD reaches 69.9% on AIME 2024 in just 30 GPU hours, achieving a 4.0x speedup over standard OPD and substantially lowering the barrier to entry for academic research on LLM post-training.

</details>


### [644] [Concrete Jungle: Towards Concreteness Paved Contrastive Negative Mining for Compositional Understanding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13313)
*Eun Woo Im,Dhruv Madhwal,Vivek Gupta*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Slipform框架通过基于词汇具体性的负样本生成和梯度平衡损失函数，显著提升了视觉语言模型在组合推理任务上的性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视觉语言模型在组合推理方面存在明显不足，特别是在词序和属性绑定方面容易出错。这种局限性源于对比预训练中缺乏能够区分细微语义差异的信息样本。虽然硬负样本挖掘提供了有希望的解决方案，但现有方法缺乏明确的机制来指导哪些语言元素应该被修改。

Method: 1. 提出词汇具体性作为负样本有效性的基本决定因素，修改高度具体的术语会产生更明显的结构和视觉差异；2. 开发ConcretePlant系统，系统地分离和操作感知基础的概念；3. 分析InfoNCE损失函数发现严重的梯度不平衡问题；4. 提出Cement损失函数，使用基于边距的方法，通过将心理语言学分数与样本难度相关联，动态校准对单个训练对的惩罚。

Result: 综合评估证实了理论主张。集成的Slipform框架在多样化的组合评估基准、通用跨模态检索、单标签和多标签线性探测任务上实现了最先进的准确性。

Conclusion: 词汇具体性是负样本有效性的关键因素，通过基于具体性的负样本生成和梯度平衡的损失函数设计，可以显著提升视觉语言模型的组合推理能力。Slipform框架为这一领域提供了系统性的解决方案。

Abstract: Vision-Language Models demonstrate remarkable capabilities but often struggle with compositional reasoning, exhibiting vulnerabilities regarding word order and attribute binding. This limitation arises from a scarcity of informative samples needed to differentiate subtle semantic variations during contrastive pretraining. Although hard negative mining offers a promising remedy, existing methods lack explicit mechanisms to dictate which linguistic elements undergo modification. Instead of engineering generative architectures, this study establishes lexical concreteness as a fundamental determinant of negative sample efficacy. Modifying highly concrete terms generates more pronounced structural and visual discrepancies, providing a substantially stronger learning signal. Leveraging this principle, ConcretePlant is proposed to systematically isolate and manipulate perceptually grounded concepts. Analyses of the InfoNCE further reveals a severe gradient imbalance, where easily distinguishable pairs disproportionately overwhelm the optimization process and restrict the bandwidth available for nuanced learning. To resolve this degradation, the Cement loss is formulated utilizing a margin-based approach. By correlating psycholinguistic scores with sample difficulty, this objective dynamically calibrates the penalization applied to individual training pairs. Comprehensive evaluations substantiate these theoretical claims. The integrated framework, designated as Slipform, achieves state-of-the-art accuracy across diverse compositional evaluation benchmarks, general cross-modal retrieval, single and multi label linear probing.

</details>


### [645] [Some Theoretical Limitations of t-SNE](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13295)
*Rupert Li,Elchanan Mossel*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文分析了t-SNE降维技术可能导致数据重要特征丢失的问题，建立了数学框架来理解这种信息损失


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: t-SNE作为流行的降维和可视化技术，虽然广泛应用，但所有降维技术都可能丢失数据的重要特征。需要建立数学框架来系统理解t-SNE在何种情况下会丢失哪些重要特征

Method: 建立数学框架，在不同场景下分析t-SNE导致特征丢失的问题。通过理论分析和证明，展示t-SNE如何丢失数据的重要特征

Result: 建立了多个结果，证明在不同场景下t-SNE会丢失数据的重要特征。这些结果为理解t-SNE的信息损失提供了数学基础

Conclusion: t-SNE作为降维技术确实会丢失数据的重要特征，论文建立的数学框架为理解这种信息损失提供了理论基础，有助于更谨慎地使用t-SNE并理解其局限性

Abstract: t-SNE has gained popularity as a dimension reduction technique, especially for visualizing data. It is well-known that all dimension reduction techniques may lose important features of the data. We provide a mathematical framework for understanding this loss for t-SNE by establishing a number of results in different scenarios showing how important features of data are lost by using t-SNE.

</details>


### [646] [MOONSHOT : A Framework for Multi-Objective Pruning of Vision and Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13287)
*Gabriel Afriat,Xiang Meng,Shibal Ibrahim,Hussein Hazimeh,Rahul Mazumder*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: MOONSHOT是一个通用的后训练单次剪枝框架，通过联合优化层重建误差和二阶泰勒近似损失，将单目标剪枝方法扩展为多目标方法，显著提升各种模型在不同稀疏度下的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有单次剪枝方法通常只优化单一目标（层重建损失或二阶泰勒近似），但在不同架构和稀疏度下，没有单一目标始终最有效。需要一种更灵活的多目标方法来提升剪枝效果。

Method: 提出MOONSHOT框架，作为现有剪枝算法的包装器，联合优化层重建误差和二阶泰勒近似损失。通过建模决策和高效计算逆Hessian矩阵，保持可扩展性，支持十亿参数模型。

Result: 在Llama-3.2和Llama-2模型上，2:4稀疏度下C4困惑度降低32.6%，七个分类基准的零样本平均准确率提升4.9点。Vision Transformers在ImageNet-1k上70%稀疏度准确率提升超5点，ResNet-50在90%稀疏度提升4点。

Conclusion: MOONSHOT通过多目标优化显著提升后训练剪枝效果，为不同架构和稀疏度提供一致的性能改进，同时保持计算效率，是通用且可扩展的剪枝框架。

Abstract: Weight pruning is a common technique for compressing large neural networks. We focus on the challenging post-training one-shot setting, where a pre-trained model is compressed without any retraining. Existing one-shot pruning methods typically optimize a single objective, such as a layer-wise reconstruction loss or a second-order Taylor approximation of the training loss. We highlight that neither objective alone is consistently the most effective across architectures and sparsity levels. Motivated by this insight, we propose MOONSHOT, a general and flexible framework that extends any single-objective pruning method into a multi-objective formulation by jointly optimizing both the layer-wise reconstruction error and second-order Taylor approximation of the training loss. MOONSHOT acts as a wrapper around existing pruning algorithms. To enable this integration while maintaining scalability to billion-parameter models, we propose modeling decisions and introduce an efficient procedure for computing the inverse Hessian, preserving the efficiency of state-of-the-art one-shot pruners. When combined with state-of-the-art pruning methods on Llama-3.2 and Llama-2 models, MOONSHOT reduces C4 perplexity by up to 32.6% at 2:4 sparsity and improves zero-shot mean accuracy across seven classification benchmarks by up to 4.9 points. On Vision Transformers, it improves accuracy on ImageNet-1k by over 5 points at 70% sparsity, and on ResNet-50, it yields a 4-point gain at 90% sparsity.

</details>


### [647] [Binomial Gradient-Based Meta-Learning for Enhanced Meta-Gradient Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13263)
*Yilang Zhang,Abraham Jaeger Mountain,Bingcong Li,Georgios B. Giannakis*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出基于二项式展开的梯度元学习方法（BinomGBML），通过截断二项式展开估计元梯度，提高计算效率同时降低近似误差


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统梯度元学习方法（GBML）计算开销大，随梯度步数线性增长；现有截断反向传播方法近似误差大，需要更精确高效的元梯度估计方法

Method: 提出二项式梯度元学习（BinomGBML），使用截断二项式展开进行元梯度估计，通过高效并行计算在元梯度估计中融入更多信息；应用于模型无关元学习（MAML）形成BinomMAML

Result: 理论证明BinomMAML的误差界优于现有方法，在温和条件下呈超指数衰减；数值实验验证理论分析，性能提升明显而计算开销仅轻微增加

Conclusion: BinomGBML提供了一种高效准确的元梯度估计方法，通过二项式展开实现计算效率与精度的平衡，为梯度元学习提供了新的理论框架和实用算法

Abstract: Meta-learning offers a principled framework leveraging \emph{task-invariant} priors from related tasks, with which \emph{task-specific} models can be fine-tuned on downstream tasks, even with limited data records. Gradient-based meta-learning (GBML) relies on gradient descent (GD) to adapt the prior to a new task. Albeit effective, these methods incur high computational overhead that scales linearly with the number of GD steps. To enhance efficiency and scalability, existing methods approximate the gradient of prior parameters (meta-gradient) via truncated backpropagation, yet suffer large approximation errors. Targeting accurate approximation, this work puts forth binomial GBML (BinomGBML), which relies on a truncated binomial expansion for meta-gradient estimation. This novel expansion endows more information in the meta-gradient estimation via efficient parallel computation. As a running paradigm applied to model-agnostic meta-learning (MAML), the resultant BinomMAML provably enjoys error bounds that not only improve upon existing approaches, but also decay super-exponentially under mild conditions. Numerical tests corroborate the theoretical analysis and showcase boosted performance with slightly increased computational overhead.

</details>


### [648] [Counterfactual Peptide Editing for Causal TCR--pMHC Binding Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13256)
*Sanjar Khudoyberdiev,Arman Bekov*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文提出CIP框架解决TCR-pMHC结合预测中的捷径学习问题，通过生成生物学约束的反事实肽编辑，强制模型对非锚点位置编辑保持不变性，同时增强对锚点残基扰动的敏感性，显著提升分布外泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有TCR-pMHC结合预测的神经模型容易陷入捷径学习，利用训练数据中的伪相关（如肽长度偏差或V基因共现）而非真实的物理结合界面，导致在家族留出和距离感知评估中预测脆弱，这些捷径无法迁移到新场景。

Method: 提出反事实不变预测（CIP）训练框架：1）生成生物学约束的反事实肽编辑；2）强制模型对非锚点位置的保守替换保持预测不变性（不变性损失）；3）鼓励模型对锚点位置扰动产生大的预测变化（对比损失）。通过这两个辅助目标增强基础分类器。

Result: 在精心策划的VDJdb-IEDB基准测试中，CIP在家族留出协议下达到AUROC 0.831和反事实一致性（CFC）0.724，相对于无约束基线减少了39.7%的捷径指数。消融实验证实锚点感知编辑生成是分布外增益的主要驱动力。

Conclusion: CIP框架通过反事实不变性约束有效缓解了TCR特异性建模中的捷径学习问题，锚点感知编辑生成是实现因果基础TCR建模的关键，为生物信息学中的分布外泛化提供了实用方案。

Abstract: Neural models for TCR-pMHC binding prediction are susceptible to shortcut learning: they exploit spurious correlations in training data -- such as peptide length bias or V-gene co-occurrence -- rather than the physical binding interface. This renders predictions brittle under family-held-out and distance-aware evaluation, where such shortcuts do not transfer. We introduce \emph{Counterfactual Invariant Prediction} (CIP), a training framework that generates biologically constrained counterfactual peptide edits and enforces invariance to edits at non-anchor positions while amplifying sensitivity at MHC anchor residues. CIP augments the base classifier with two auxiliary objectives: (1) an invariance loss penalizing prediction changes under conservative non-anchor substitutions, and (2) a contrastive loss encouraging large prediction changes under anchor-position disruptions. Evaluated on a curated VDJdb-IEDB benchmark under family-held-out, distance-aware, and random splits, CIP achieves AUROC 0.831 and counterfactual consistency (CFC) 0.724 under the challenging family-held-out protocol -- a 39.7\% reduction in shortcut index relative to the unconstrained baseline. Ablations confirm that anchor-aware edit generation is the dominant driver of OOD gains, providing a practical recipe for causally-grounded TCR specificity modeling.

</details>


### [649] [Bias-Corrected Adaptive Conformal Inference for Multi-Horizon Time Series Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13253)
*Ankit Lade,Sai Krishna J.,Indar Kumar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: BC-ACI通过在线偏差估计和校正机制，在保持覆盖保证的同时，显著提升了自适应共形推理在分布漂移下的预测区间效率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准ACI仅调整分位数阈值，无法校正区间中心。当基础预测器在分布漂移后产生持续偏差时，ACI只能通过对称地加宽区间来补偿，导致不必要的保守预测区间

Method: 提出偏差校正ACI（BC-ACI），在标准ACI基础上增加在线指数加权移动平均（EWMA）偏差估计。在分位数计算前校正非共形分数，并重新中心化预测区间。采用自适应死区阈值抑制噪声级别的偏差校正

Result: 在688次实验中，BC-ACI在均值和复合分布漂移下将Winkler区间得分降低13-17%（Wilcoxon p<0.001），在平稳数据上保持等效性能（比率1.002x）。有限样本分析显示覆盖保证随偏差估计误差适度降低

Conclusion: BC-ACI通过直接解决预测偏差的根本原因而非症状，显著提升了自适应共形推理在时间序列分布漂移下的效率，同时保持了分布自由的覆盖保证

Abstract: Adaptive Conformal Inference (ACI) provides distribution-free prediction intervals with asymptotic coverage guarantees for time series under distribution shift. However, ACI only adapts the quantile threshold -- it cannot shift the interval center. When a base forecaster develops persistent bias after a regime change, ACI compensates by widening intervals symmetrically, producing unnecessarily conservative bands. We propose Bias-Corrected ACI (BC-ACI), which augments standard ACI with an online exponentially weighted moving average (EWM) estimate of forecast bias. BC-ACI corrects nonconformity scores before quantile computation and re-centers prediction intervals, addressing the root cause of miscalibration rather than its symptom. An adaptive dead-zone threshold suppresses corrections when estimated bias is indistinguishable from noise, ensuring no degradation on well-calibrated data. In controlled experiments across 688 runs spanning two base models, four synthetic regimes, and three real datasets, BC-ACI reduces Winkler interval scores by 13--17% under mean and compound distribution shifts (Wilcoxon p < 0.001) while maintaining equivalent performance on stationary data (ratio 1.002x). We provide finite-sample analysis showing that coverage guarantees degrade gracefully with bias estimation error.

</details>


### [650] [Information-Theoretic Optimization for Task-Adapted Compressed Sensing Magnetic Resonance Imaging](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12709)
*Xinyu Peng,Ziyang Zheng,Wenrui Dai,Duoduo Xue,Shaohui Li,Chenglin Li,Junni Zou,Hongkai Xiong*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出首个从信息论视角的任务自适应压缩感知MRI框架，实现不确定性预测和自适应采样，支持多种临床应用场景


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有任务自适应CS-MRI方法存在医学诊断的不确定性问题，无法在端到端优化中实现自适应采样，且不能适应不同临床应用需求

Method: 从信息论角度形式化任务自适应CS-MRI优化问题，最大化欠采样k空间测量与临床任务间的互信息；采用摊销优化和变分边界构建，联合优化采样、重建和任务推断模型；支持两种临床场景：联合任务与重建、抑制重建的任务实施

Result: 在大规模MRI数据集上的实验表明，该框架在Dice等标准指标上具有竞争力，同时通过广义能量距离（GED）衡量，能更好地匹配真实后验分布

Conclusion: 提出的信息论框架解决了任务自适应CS-MRI的不确定性问题，实现了自适应采样和多种临床应用，为医学影像分析提供了概率推断能力

Abstract: Task-adapted compressed sensing magnetic resonance imaging (CS-MRI) is emerging to address the specific demands of downstream clinical tasks with significantly fewer k-space measurements than required by Nyquist sampling. However, existing task-adapted CS-MRI methods suffer from the uncertainty problem for medical diagnosis and cannot achieve adaptive sampling in end-to-end optimization with reconstruction or clinical tasks. To address these limitations, we propose the first task-adapted CS-MRI from the information-theoretic perspective to simultaneously achieve probabilistic inference for uncertainty prediction and adapt to arbitrary sampling ratios and versatile clinical applications. Specifically, we formalize the task-adapted CS-MRI optimization problem by maximizing the mutual information between undersampled k-space measurements and clinical tasks to enable probabilistic inference for addressing the uncertainty problem. We leverage amortized optimization and construct tractable variational bounds for mutual information to jointly optimize sampling, reconstruction, and task-inference models, which enables flexible sampling ratio control using a single end-to-end trained model. Furthermore, the proposed framework addresses two kinds of distinct clinical scenarios within a unified approach, i.e., i) joint task and reconstruction, where reconstruction serves as an auxiliary process to enhance task performance; and ii) task implementation with suppressed reconstruction, applicable for privacy protection. Extensive experiments on large-scale MRI datasets demonstrate that the proposed framework achieves highly competitive performance on standard metrics like Dice compared to deterministic counterpart but provides better distribution matching to the ground-truth posterior distribution as measured by the generalized energy distance (GED).

</details>


### [651] [Analog Optical Inference on Million-Record Mortgage Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13251)
*Sofia Berloff,Pavel Koptev,Konstantin Malkov*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究首次将模拟光学计算机应用于大规模现实世界金融分类任务（抵押贷款审批），识别了三种精度损失来源：编码限制、架构限制和硬件保真度，发现编码是主要瓶颈而硬件非理想性影响可忽略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 模拟光学计算机在机器学习推理方面具有巨大效率优势，但此前研究仅限于小规模图像基准测试。需要验证其在现实世界大规模金融分类任务中的性能表现，并系统分析精度损失的来源。

Method: 使用美国HMDA的584万条抵押贷款记录进行抵押贷款审批分类任务。构建模拟光学计算机的数字孪生模型，与XGBoost等数字模型对比。通过三种实验设计分离精度损失来源：1) 比较不同通道数(16-48)的AOC性能；2) 限制所有模型使用127位二进制编码；3) 引入七种校准的硬件非理想性。

Result: 在原始19个特征上，AOC达到94.6%平衡精度（5,126参数，含1,024光学参数），XGBoost为97.9%，存在3.3个百分点差距。将光学核心从16通道扩展到48通道仅缩小0.5pp，表明是架构而非硬件限制。当所有模型使用127位二进制编码时，精度降至89.4-89.6%，编码成本对数字模型为8pp，对AOC为5pp。七种硬件非理想性未造成可测量的精度损失。

Conclusion: 研究识别了模拟光学计算机精度损失的三个层次：编码限制（主要瓶颈）、架构限制和硬件保真度（影响最小）。这为未来改进指明了方向，即应优先优化编码方案和架构设计，而非过度追求硬件完美性。

Abstract: Analog optical computers promise large efficiency gains for machine learning inference, yet no demonstration has moved beyond small-scale image benchmarks. We benchmark the analog optical computer (AOC) digital twin on mortgage approval classification from 5.84 million U.S. HMDA records and separate three sources of accuracy loss. On the original 19 features, the AOC reaches 94.6% balanced accuracy with 5,126 parameters (1,024 optical), compared with 97.9% for XGBoost; the 3.3 percentage-point gap narrows by only 0.5pp when the optical core is widened from 16 to 48 channels, suggesting an architectural rather than hardware limitation. Restricting all models to a shared 127-bit binary encoding drops every model to 89.4--89.6%, with an encoding cost of 8pp for digital models and 5pp for the AOC. Seven calibrated hardware non-idealities impose no measurable penalty. The three resulting layers of limitation (encoding, architecture, hardware fidelity) locate where accuracy is lost and what to improve next.

</details>


### [652] [Does Dimensionality Reduction via Random Projections Preserve Landscape Features?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13230)
*Iván Olarte Rodríguez,Anja Jankovic,Thomas Bäck,Elena Raponi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: ELA特征在高维空间存在计算成本高、稀疏性等问题，降维是解决方案但特征在降维后是否仍反映原始景观特性未知。本文研究ELA特征在随机高斯嵌入降维下的鲁棒性，发现大多数特征对降维敏感，少数相对稳定但可能反映投影伪影而非内在特性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索性景观分析(ELA)为黑盒优化问题提供数值特征，但在高维设置中面临稀疏效应、高估计方差和计算成本问题。虽然降维被提议作为解决方案，但尚不清楚降维空间计算的特征是否仍反映原始景观的内在特性。

Method: 使用随机高斯嵌入(RGEs)进行降维，从相同的采样点和目标值出发，在投影空间中计算ELA特征，并与原始搜索空间的特征进行比较。研究覆盖多个样本预算和嵌入维度。

Result: 线性随机投影通常会改变与ELA相关的几何和拓扑结构，导致特征值不再代表原始问题。虽然一小部分特征相对稳定，但大多数对嵌入高度敏感。此外，投影下的鲁棒性不一定意味着信息性，因为看似鲁棒的特征可能仍反映投影引起的伪影而非内在景观特性。

Conclusion: 在高维优化问题中使用降维后的ELA特征需要谨慎，因为大多数特征在降维后不再可靠地反映原始景观特性。即使相对稳定的特征也可能包含投影伪影，因此不能简单地将降维空间中的特征解释为原始问题的内在特性。

Abstract: Exploratory Landscape Analysis (ELA) provides numerical features for characterizing black-box optimization problems. In high-dimensional settings, however, ELA suffers from sparsity effects, high estimator variance, and the prohibitive cost of computing several feature classes. Dimensionality reduction has therefore been proposed as a way to make ELA applicable in such settings, but it remains unclear whether features computed in reduced spaces still reflect intrinsic properties of the original landscape.
  In this work, we investigate the robustness of ELA features under dimensionality reduction via Random Gaussian Embeddings (RGEs). Starting from the same sampled points and objective values, we compute ELA features in projected spaces and compare them to those obtained in the original search space across multiple sample budgets and embedding dimensions.
  Our results show that linear random projections often alter the geometric and topological structure relevant to ELA, yielding feature values that are no longer representative of the original problem. While a small subset of features remains comparatively stable, most are highly sensitive to the embedding. Moreover, robustness under projection does not necessarily imply informativeness, as apparently robust features may still reflect projection-induced artifacts rather than intrinsic landscape characteristics.

</details>


### [653] [Algorithmic Analysis of Dense Associative Memory: Finite-Size Guarantees and Adversarial Robustness](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12811)
*Madhava Gaikwad*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文对密集联想记忆(DAM)的检索动态进行了算法分析，在有限规模N下提供收敛保证和显式收敛速率，建立了对抗鲁棒性界限和容量保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有DAM动态分析主要研究随机采样模式下的热力学极限N→∞，缺乏有限规模保证和显式收敛速率。需要开发能够提供有限N保证并在显式、可验证模式条件下工作的算法分析框架。

Method: 开发DAM检索动态的算法分析框架，在模式分离假设和高负载下的有界干扰条件下，证明异步检索动态的几何收敛性。建立通过显式边界条件量化的对抗鲁棒性界限，推导容量保证，并展示DAM检索动态具有势博弈解释。

Result: 证明了在轨迹进入吸引域后，收敛时间为O(log N)；建立了量化每轮扫描可容忍损坏比特数的对抗鲁棒性界限；推导了在最坏情况下容量缩放为Θ(N^{n-1})（最多相差多对数因子），对随机模式集合恢复经典Θ(N^{n-1})缩放；展示了DAM检索动态在异步更新下收敛到纯纳什均衡。

Conclusion: 该研究为DAM检索动态提供了首个有限规模保证和显式收敛速率，建立了对抗鲁棒性界限和容量保证，并通过势博弈解释为理解DAM动态提供了新视角，为实际应用中的可靠性和可验证性奠定了基础。

Abstract: Dense Associative Memory (DAM) generalizes Hopfield networks through higher-order interactions and achieves storage capacity that scales as $O(N^{n-1})$ under suitable pattern separation conditions. Existing dynamical analyses primarily study the thermodynamic limit $N\to\infty$ with randomly sampled patterns and therefore do not provide finite-size guarantees or explicit convergence rates.
  We develop an algorithmic analysis of DAM retrieval dynamics that yields finite-$N$ guarantees under explicit, verifiable pattern conditions. Under a separation assumption and a bounded-interference condition at high loading, we prove geometric convergence of asynchronous retrieval dynamics, which implies $O(\log N)$ convergence time once the trajectory enters the basin of attraction. We further establish adversarial robustness bounds expressed through an explicit margin condition that quantifies the number of corrupted bits tolerable per sweep, and derive capacity guarantees that scale as $Θ(N^{n-1})$ up to polylogarithmic factors in the worst case, while recovering the classical $Θ(N^{n-1})$ scaling for random pattern ensembles. Finally, we show that DAM retrieval dynamics admit a potential-game interpretation that ensures convergence to pure Nash equilibria under asynchronous updates.
  Complete proofs are provided in the appendices, together with preliminary experiments that illustrate the predicted convergence, robustness, and capacity scaling behavior.

</details>


### [654] [VFA: Relieving Vector Operations in Flash Attention with Global Maximum Pre-computation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12798)
*Yupeng Sun,Yanzhao Li,Zhiqiang Zou,Bai Du,Zhiyuan Zhang,Hui Dong,Gaoyige Fan,Hui Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: VFA/VSA通过初始化运行最大值、重排序关键块遍历和冻结最大值来缓解FlashAttention中在线softmax的向量/SIMD瓶颈，避免条件重缩放操作，实现显著加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着注意力核接近现代加速器的峰值张量核心吞吐量，在线softmax中的非矩阵乘法组件（特别是每块的行最大值和行和归约以及重缩放链）可能成为向量/SIMD瓶颈并主导延迟。需要重新审视FlashAttention以解决这些瓶颈。

Method: 提出向量缓解Flash注意力（VFA）：1）通过关键块表示的廉价近似初始化运行最大值；2）重排序关键块遍历以优先处理高影响汇块和局部块；3）对剩余块冻结最大值以避免重复归约和重缩放。进一步与块稀疏跳过方法（如BLASST）结合形成向量缓解稀疏注意力（VSA）。

Result: 评估显示：1）汇块和局部重排序能早期稳定运行最大值；2）简单的Q和K块摘要因块内异质性而失败；3）当最大值出现在中间块时需要m初始化。相比C16V32基线，C8V32、C4V32和C4V16在现代硬件上实现近两倍加速，C4V16通过增强指数容量将提供六倍加速。

Conclusion: VFA和VSA有效缓解了在线softmax归约瓶颈而无需性能损失，通过硬件友好的方法减少了行最大值驱动的运行最大值更新，同时保留了在线softmax结构，完全避免了FA4.0中使用的条件重缩放操作。

Abstract: FlashAttention-style online softmax enables exact attention computation with linear memory by streaming score tiles through on-chip memory and maintaining a running maximum and normalizer. However, as attention kernels approach peak tensor-core/cube-core throughput on modern accelerators, non-matmul components of online softmax -- especially per-tile rowmax and rowsum reductions and rescale chains -- can become vector or SIMD limited and dominate latency. This paper revisits FlashAttention and proposes Vector Relieved Flash Attention (VFA), a hardware-friendly method that reduces rowmax-driven updates of the running maximum while retaining the online-softmax structure. VFA initializes the running maximum via a cheap approximation from key-block representations, reorders key-block traversal to prioritize high-impact sink and local blocks, and freezes the maximum for remaining blocks to avoid repeated reductions and rescaling. We further integrate VFA with block-sparse skipping methods such as BLASST to form Vector Relieved Sparse Attention (VSA), which reduces both block count and per-block overhead. Notably, VFA and VSA completely avoid the conditional rescale operation in the update stage used in FA4.0. Extensive evaluations on benchmarks including MMLU and MATH500, together with attention statistics, verify our design: (i) sink and local reordering stabilizes the running maximum early; (ii) simple Q and K block summaries fail due to intra-block heterogeneity; (iii) m-initialization is required when maxima appear in middle blocks. Overall, VFA and VSA efficiently alleviate online-softmax reduction bottlenecks without performance loss. Compared to the C16V32 baseline, C8V32, C4V32 and C4V16 achieve nearly two times speedup on modern hardware while hitting the vector bottleneck. With upcoming architecture improvements, C4V16 will deliver six times speedup by enhancing exponent capacity.

</details>


### [655] [CLAD: Efficient Log Anomaly Detection Directly on Compressed Representations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13024)
*Benzhao Tang,Shiyu Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: CLAD是首个直接在压缩字节流上进行日志异常检测的深度学习框架，无需解压和解析，通过检测压缩字节模式的异常来识别日志异常。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 系统日志爆炸式增长使得流式压缩变得必要，但现有日志异常检测方法需要完全解压和解析，产生严重的预处理开销。需要一种能够直接在压缩数据上工作的解决方案。

Method: 提出CLAD框架，基于关键洞察：正常日志压缩成规则的字节模式，而异常会系统性地破坏这些模式。采用专门构建的架构，包括扩张卷积字节编码器、混合Transformer-mLSTM和四路聚合池化。使用两阶段训练策略：掩码预训练和焦点对比微调来处理严重的类别不平衡。

Result: 在五个数据集上评估，CLAD实现了最先进的平均F1分数0.9909，比最佳基线高出2.72个百分点。在完全消除解压和解析开销的同时提供卓越的准确性。

Conclusion: CLAD提供了一个鲁棒的解决方案，能够直接对压缩字节流进行日志异常检测，显著减少预处理开销，并能够泛化到结构化流式压缩器。

Abstract: The explosive growth of system logs makes streaming compression essential, yet existing log anomaly detection (LAD) methods incur severe pre-processing overhead by requiring full decompression and parsing. We introduce CLAD, the first deep learning framework to perform LAD directly on compressed byte streams. CLAD bypasses these bottlenecks by exploiting a key insight: normal logs compress into regular byte patterns, while anomalies systematically disrupt them. To extract these multi-scale deviations from opaque bytes, we propose a purpose-built architecture integrating a dilated convolutional byte encoder, a hybrid Transformer--mLSTM, and four-way aggregation pooling. This is coupled with a two-stage training strategy of masked pre-training and focal-contrastive fine-tuning to effectively handle severe class imbalance. Evaluated across five datasets, CLAD achieves a state-of-the-art average F1-score of 0.9909 and outperforms the best baseline by 2.72 percentage points. It delivers superior accuracy while completely eliminating decompression and parsing overheads, offering a robust solution that generalizes to structured streaming compressors.

</details>


### [656] [OSC: Hardware Efficient W4A4 Quantization via Outlier Separation in Channel Dimension](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12782)
*Zhiyuan Zhang,Yanzhao Li,Zhiqiang Zou,Bai Du,Yupeng Sun,Hui Dong,Hui Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: OSC是一种硬件高效的异常值抑制框架，通过双路径计算（4位GEMM和16位分支GEMM）解决4位量化中激活异常值导致的精度下降问题，利用离线分组策略识别异常值通道并在线提取为紧凑张量，在保持高吞吐量的同时显著减少精度损失。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 4位量化对于大语言模型的高吞吐量部署至关重要，但激活异常值由于低比特格式的动态范围受限，经常导致显著的精度下降。需要一种既能保持硬件效率又能有效处理异常值的解决方案。

Method: 提出OSC框架：1）系统研究异常值的空间分布，发现token-persistent结构聚类效应；2）采用双路径计算：低精度4位GEMM路径和高精度16位分支GEMM路径；3）离线分组策略识别异常值通道，在线结构化子张量提取将分散的激活通道聚合成紧凑密集张量；4）对于W2输入中异常值聚类不明显的情况，集成FP8回退策略。

Result: 在Qwen3-8B和Qwen3-30B上评估，平均精度下降分别限制在2.19和1.12个百分点。硬件友好性突出，在现代AI加速器上相比W8A8 GEMM基线实现峰值1.78倍加速。

Conclusion: OSC通过利用异常值的结构聚类特性，实现了硬件高效的异常值抑制，在保持4位量化高吞吐量优势的同时显著减少了精度损失，为实际部署提供了有效的解决方案。

Abstract: While 4-bit quantization is essential for high-throughput deployment of Large Language Models, activation outliers often lead to significant accuracy degradation due to the restricted dynamic range of low-bit formats. In this paper, we systematically investigate the spatial distribution of outliers and demonstrate a token-persistent structural clustering effect, where high-magnitude outliers consistently occupy fixed channels across tokens. Building on this insight, we propose OSC, a hardware-efficient framework for outlier suppression. During inference, OSC executes a dual-path computation consisting of a low-precision 4-bit General Matrix Multiplication (GEMM) path and a high-precision 16-bit branch GEMM path. Specifically, OSC uses an offline group-wise strategy to identify the channels where outliers are located and then performs structured sub-tensor extraction to coalesce these scattered activation channels into a compact dense tensor online. This mechanism implements outlier protection through regularized and high-throughput GEMM operations, achieving a seamless fit with modern 4-bit micro-scaling hardware. Furthermore, for the inputs of W2 where outlier clustering is less pronounced, we integrate a fallback strategy to FP8. Evaluation on Qwen3-8B and Qwen3-30B restricts the average accuracy drop to 2.19 and 1.12 points, respectively. Notably, OSC is highly hardware-friendly, achieving a peak speedup of 1.78x over the W8A8 GEMM baseline on a modern AI accelerator.

</details>


### [657] [An Optimal Sauer Lemma Over $k$-ary Alphabets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12952)
*Steve Hanneke,Qinglin Meng,Shay Moran,Amirreza Shaeiri*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文建立了多类别和列表预测的尖锐Sauer不等式，用Daniely-Shalev-Shwartz维度替代Natarajan维度，获得了最优的多项式依赖关系，改进了样本复杂度上界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 对于k>2的多类别设置，基于Natarajan维度的Sauer型边界是次优的，需要建立更尖锐的边界来改进多类别和列表预测的理论基础。

Method: 使用多项式方法证明基于DS维度和列表-DS维度的尖锐Sauer不等式，这些组合参数刻画了多类别和列表PAC可学习性。

Result: 获得了对字母大小k、列表大小ℓ和维度值都紧致的边界，将Natarajan边界中的指数依赖ℓ改进为最优的多项式依赖，并改善了k的依赖关系。

Conclusion: 该工作为多类别和列表学习提供了更精确的组合边界，改进了列表PAC学习和列表预测器一致收敛的样本复杂度上界，为未来研究开辟了新方向。

Abstract: The Sauer-Shelah-Perles Lemma is a cornerstone of combinatorics and learning theory, bounding the size of a binary hypothesis class in terms of its Vapnik-Chervonenkis (VC) dimension. For classes of functions over a $k$-ary alphabet, namely the multiclass setting, the Natarajan dimension has long served as an analogue of VC dimension, yet the corresponding Sauer-type bounds are suboptimal for alphabet sizes $k>2$.
  In this work, we establish a sharp Sauer inequality for multiclass and list prediction. Our bound is expressed in terms of the Daniely--Shalev-Shwartz (DS) dimension, and more generally with its extension, the list-DS dimension -- the combinatorial parameters that characterize multiclass and list PAC learnability. Our bound is tight for every alphabet size $k$, list size $\ell$, and dimension value, replacing the exponential dependence on $\ell$ in the Natarajan-based bound by the optimal polynomial dependence, and improving the dependence on $k$ as well. Our proof uses the polynomial method. In contrast to the classical VC case, where several direct combinatorial proofs are known, we are not aware of any purely combinatorial proof in the DS setting. This motivates several directions for future research, which are discussed in the paper.
  As consequences, we obtain improved sample complexity upper bounds for list PAC learning and for uniform convergence of list predictors, sharpening the recent results of Charikar et al.~(STOC~2023), Hanneke et al.~(COLT~2024), and Brukhim et al.~(NeurIPS~2024).

</details>


### [658] [The Verification Tax: Fundamental Limits of AI Auditing in the Rare-Error Regime](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12951)
*Jason Z Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文证明深度学习中校准误差估计存在基本极限，即"验证税"：随着模型改进，验证其校准变得根本性更困难。研究揭示了四个违反标准评估实践的结果，包括自评估无法提供校准信息、相变点、主动查询的优势以及验证成本随管道深度指数增长。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 论文动机是揭示深度学习校准评估中的根本性问题。作者发现最常引用的校准结果（如Guo等人2017年在CIFAR-100上的后温度缩放ECE为0.012）实际上低于统计噪声地板。这促使他们研究校准误差估计的基本理论极限，并挑战当前的标准评估实践。

Method: 研究方法包括理论分析和实证验证。理论上，证明了校准误差估计的极小极大率，建立了四个违反标准实践的结果。实证上，在五个基准测试（MMLU、TruthfulQA、ARC-Challenge、HellaSwag、WinoGrande；约27,000个项目）上验证，使用6个LLM（来自5个家族，8B-405B参数），27个基准-模型对，采用基于对数概率的置信度，95%自助置信区间和置换检验。

Result: 主要结果包括：1）自评估在没有标签的情况下对校准提供零信息；2）在mε≈1处存在尖锐相变，低于此值无法检测到误校准；3）主动查询消除了Lipschitz常数，将估计简化为检测；4）验证成本以L^K的速率随管道深度指数增长。实证验证显示自评估不显著性在80%的模型对中成立，前沿模型中23%的成对比较与噪声无法区分。

Conclusion: 结论是校准验证存在基本极限（"验证税"），随着AI模型改进，验证其校准变得根本性更困难。可信的校准声明必须报告验证地板，并在收益接近基准分辨率时优先考虑主动查询。这挑战了当前深度学习校准评估的标准实践。

Abstract: The most cited calibration result in deep learning -- post-temperature-scaling ECE of 0.012 on CIFAR-100 (Guo et al., 2017) -- is below the statistical noise floor. We prove this is not a failure of the experiment but a law: the minimax rate for estimating calibration error with model error rate epsilon is Theta((Lepsilon/m)^{1/3}), and no estimator can beat it. This "verification tax" implies that as AI models improve, verifying their calibration becomes fundamentally harder -- with the same exponent in opposite directions. We establish four results that contradict standard evaluation practice: (1) self-evaluation without labels provides exactly zero information about calibration, bounded by a constant independent of compute; (2) a sharp phase transition at mepsilon approx 1 below which miscalibration is undetectable; (3) active querying eliminates the Lipschitz constant, collapsing estimation to detection; (4) verification cost grows exponentially with pipeline depth at rate L^K. We validate across five benchmarks (MMLU, TruthfulQA, ARC-Challenge, HellaSwag, WinoGrande; ~27,000 items) with 6 LLMs from 5 families (8B-405B parameters, 27 benchmark-model pairs with logprob-based confidence), 95% bootstrap CIs, and permutation tests. Self-evaluation non-significance holds in 80% of pairs. Across frontier models, 23% of pairwise comparisons are indistinguishable from noise, implying that credible calibration claims must report verification floors and prioritize active querying once gains approach benchmark resolution.

</details>


### [659] [Towards Multi-Source Domain Generalization for Sleep Staging with Noisy Labels](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10009)
*Kening Wang,Di Wen,Yufan Chen,Ruiping Liu,Junwei Zheng,Jiale Wei,Kailun Yang,Rainer Stiefelhagen,Kunyu Peng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出首个多源域泛化睡眠分期中的噪声标签基准(NL-DGSS)，并开发FF-TRUST框架，通过联合时频早期学习正则化(JTF-ELR)提升噪声监督下的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自动睡眠分期面临多模态生理信号(如EEG、EOG)的域偏移问题，同时实际数据常受噪声标注影响。现有噪声标签学习方法在域偏移和标签噪声共存时性能显著下降，而噪声鲁棒的多源域泛化研究不足。

Method: 提出FF-TRUST框架，采用联合时频早期学习正则化(JTF-ELR)，通过同时利用时域和频域一致性以及置信度多样性正则化，增强噪声监督下的鲁棒性。

Result: 在五个公开数据集上的实验表明，FF-TRUST在对称和非对称噪声设置下均取得一致的先进性能，显著优于现有方法。

Conclusion: 该研究填补了噪声标签鲁棒多源域泛化睡眠分期的空白，提出的FF-TRUST框架有效解决了域偏移和标签噪声共存时的挑战，为实际临床应用提供了可靠解决方案。

Abstract: Automatic sleep staging is a multimodal learning problem involving heterogeneous physiological signals such as EEG and EOG, which often suffer from domain shifts across institutions, devices, and populations. In practice, these data are also affected by noisy annotations, yet label-noise-robust multi-source domain generalization remains underexplored. We present the first benchmark for Noisy Labels in Multi-Source Domain-Generalized Sleep Staging (NL-DGSS) and show that existing noisy-label learning methods degrade substantially when domain shifts and label noise coexist. To address this challenge, we propose FF-TRUST, a domain-invariant multimodal sleep staging framework with Joint Time-Frequency Early Learning Regularization (JTF-ELR). By jointly exploiting temporal and spectral consistency together with confidence-diversity regularization, FF-TRUST improves robustness under noisy supervision. Experiments on five public datasets demonstrate consistent state-of-the-art performance under diverse symmetric and asymmetric noise settings. The benchmark and code will be made publicly available at https://github.com/KNWang970918/FF-TRUST.git.

</details>


### [660] [Parcae: Scaling Laws For Stable Looped Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12946)
*Hayden Prairie,Zachary Novack,Taylor Berg-Kirkpatrick,Daniel Y. Fu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Parcae是一种稳定的循环架构，通过约束注入参数的谱范数来解决传统循环架构的不稳定性问题，在固定参数和数据预算下比Transformer基线表现更好。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统固定深度架构通过增加参数化来扩展质量，但会导致更高的内存占用。循环架构通过循环使用层块来增加FLOPs，但现有训练方法存在不稳定问题，如残差爆炸和损失尖峰。

Method: 将循环重新表述为残差流上的非线性时变动力系统，通过线性近似发现不稳定性源于注入参数的大谱范数。提出Parcae架构，通过负对角参数化的离散化来约束注入参数的谱范数。

Result: Parcae比先前大规模循环模型验证困惑度降低6.3%；在1.3B参数规模下，比Transformer基线在CORE和Core-Extended上分别提升2.99和1.18点，达到两倍大小Transformer的87.5%相对质量；建立了可预测的缩放定律。

Conclusion: Parcae提供了一种稳定的循环架构，能够在固定参数和数据预算下有效扩展计算，为训练和测试时的计算缩放提供了可预测的模式，是传统固定深度架构的有力替代方案。

Abstract: Traditional fixed-depth architectures scale quality by increasing training FLOPs, typically through increased parameterization, at the expense of a higher memory footprint, or data. A potential alternative is looped architectures, which instead increase FLOPs by sending activations through a block of layers in a loop. While promising, existing recipes for training looped architectures can be unstable, suffering from residual explosion and loss spikes. We address these challenges by recasting looping as a nonlinear time-variant dynamical system over the residual stream. Via a linear approximation to this system, we find that instability occurs in existing looped architectures as a result of large spectral norms in their injection parameters. To address these instability issues, we propose Parcae, a novel stable, looped architecture that constrains the spectral norm of the injection parameters via discretization of a negative diagonal parameterization. As a result, Parcae achieves up to 6.3% lower validation perplexity over prior large-scale looped models. Using our stable looped architecture, we investigate the scaling properties of looping as a medium to improve quality by increasing FLOPs in training and test-time. For training, we derive predictable power laws to scale FLOPs while keeping parameter count fixed. Our initial scaling laws suggest that looping and data should be increased in tandem, given a fixed FLOP budget. At test-time, we find that Parcae can use looping to scale compute, following a predictable, saturating exponential decay. When scaled up to 1.3B parameters, we find that Parcae improves CORE and Core-Extended quality by 2.99 and 1.18 points when compared to strong Transformer baselines under a fixed parameter and data budget, achieving a relative quality of up to 87.5% a Transformer twice the size.

</details>


### [661] [BID-LoRA: A Parameter-Efficient Framework for Continual Learning and Unlearning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12686)
*Jagadeesh Rachapudi,Ritali Vatsi,Praful Hambarde,Amit Shukla*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出BID-LoRA框架，将持续学习与机器遗忘统一为CLU范式，通过双向低秩适配器和逃逸遗忘机制，在仅更新5%参数的情况下实现精确知识删除与高效新知识整合


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度学习需要既能持续学习新知识又能遗忘过时、敏感或隐私信息的系统。现有持续学习方法已较成熟，但机器遗忘技术仍处早期阶段，缺乏统一框架。简单组合现有方法会导致知识泄漏和基础知识的逐步退化。

Method: 提出双向低秩适配（BID-LoRA）框架，包含三个专用适配器路径（保留、新增、遗忘）应用于注意力层，结合逃逸遗忘机制将遗忘类嵌入推至与保留知识最远位置，仅更新5%参数。

Result: 在CIFAR-100上，BID-LoRA在多个适应周期中优于CLU基线方法。在CASIA-Face100人脸识别子集上的评估展示了在真实身份管理系统中的实际应用价值，能够有效注册新用户和移除已注销用户。

Conclusion: BID-LoRA框架成功实现了持续学习遗忘的统一范式，能够精确删除不需要的知识、高效整合新知识同时保留先前信息，并最小化跨周期的知识泄漏，为实际应用提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Recent advances in deep learning underscore the need for systems that can not only acquire new knowledge through Continual Learning (CL) but also remove outdated, sensitive, or private information through Machine Unlearning (MU). However, while CL methods are well-developed, MU techniques remain in early stages, creating a critical gap for unified frameworks that depend on both capabilities. We find that naively combining existing CL and MU approaches results in knowledge leakage a gradual degradation of foundational knowledge across repeated adaptation cycles. To address this, we formalize Continual Learning Unlearning (CLU) as a unified paradigm with three key goals: (i) precise deletion of unwanted knowledge, (ii) efficient integration of new knowledge while preserving prior information, and (iii) minimizing knowledge leakage across cycles. We propose Bi-Directional Low-Rank Adaptation (BID-LoRA), a novel framework featuring three dedicated adapter pathways-retain, new, and unlearn applied to attention layers, combined with escape unlearning that pushes forget-class embeddings to positions maximally distant from retained knowledge, updating only 5% of parameters. Experiments on CIFAR-100 show that BID-LoRA outperforms CLU baselines across multiple adaptation cycles. We further evaluate on CASIA-Face100, a curated face recognition subset, demonstrating practical applicability to real-world identity management systems where new users must be enrolled and withdrawn users removed.

</details>


### [662] [TCL: Enabling Fast and Efficient Cross-Hardware Tensor Program Optimization via Continual Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12891)
*Chaoyao Shen,Linfeng Jiang,Yixian Shen,Tao Xu,Guoqing Li,Anuj Pathania,Andy D. Pimentel,Meng Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: TCL是一个高效可迁移的深度学习编译器框架，通过RDU采样器、Mamba成本模型和连续知识蒸馏三个核心组件，大幅降低张量程序优化的数据收集成本，实现跨硬件平台快速优化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度学习编译器依赖大量离线数据集进行成本建模和自动调优，导致数据收集成本高且跨平台迁移性差，需要更高效、可迁移的编译器框架来解决这些问题。

Method: TCL框架包含三个核心组件：1) RDU采样器——通过联合优化代表性、多样性和不确定性的主动学习策略，仅需10%张量程序数据；2) Mamba成本模型——基于Mamba架构，高效捕捉长程调度依赖，平衡预测精度与计算成本；3) 连续知识蒸馏框架——渐进式跨平台知识迁移，避免传统多任务学习的参数爆炸和数据依赖问题。

Result: 在CPU和GPU平台上优化主流深度学习模型时，TCL相比Tenset-MLP平均分别实现16.8倍和12.48倍的调优时间加速，以及1.20倍和1.13倍的推理延迟降低。每个核心组件都经过实验验证有效。

Conclusion: TCL通过数据高效采样、轻量级成本建模和渐进式知识迁移，成功解决了深度学习编译器中的数据收集成本高和跨平台迁移性差的问题，为张量程序优化提供了高效可扩展的解决方案。

Abstract: Deep learning (DL) compilers rely on cost models and auto-tuning to optimize tensor programs for target hardware. However, existing approaches depend on large offline datasets, incurring high collection costs and offering suboptimal transferability across platforms. In this paper, we introduce TCL, a novel efficient and transferable compiler framework for fast tensor program optimization across diverse hardware platforms to address these challenges. Specifically, TCL is built on three core enablers: (1) the RDU Sampler, a data-efficient active learning strategy that selects only 10% of tensor programs by jointly optimizing Representativeness, Diversity, and Uncertainty, substantially reducing data collection costs while maintaining near-original model accuracy; (2) a new Mamba-based cost model that efficiently captures long-range schedule dependencies while achieving a favorable trade-off between prediction accuracy and computational cost through reduced parameterization and lightweight sequence modeling; and (3) a continuous knowledge distillation framework that effectively and progressively transfers knowledge across multiple hardware platforms while avoiding the parameter explosion and data dependency issues typically caused by traditional multi-task learning. Extensive experiments validate the effectiveness of each individual enabler and the holistic TCL framework. When optimizing a range of mainstream DL models on both CPU and GPU platforms, TCL achieves, on average, 16.8x and 12.48x faster tuning time, and 1.20x and 1.13x lower inference latency, respectively, compared to Tenset-MLP.

</details>


### [663] [Understanding and Improving Continuous Adversarial Training for LLMs via In-context Learning Theory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12817)
*Shaopeng Fu,Di Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文首次从理论角度分析了连续对抗训练在大型语言模型中的应用机制，基于上下文学习理论解释了为什么嵌入空间的对抗扰动能防御token空间的越狱攻击，并提出基于嵌入矩阵奇异值的正则化方法来改进CAT。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 连续对抗训练（CAT）在防御LLM越狱攻击方面取得了经验性成功，但其工作机制尚不明确——为什么嵌入空间的对抗扰动能帮助LLM防御token空间合成的越狱提示？需要从理论上解释CAT的有效性，并基于理论洞察改进CAT方法。

Method: 1. 基于上下文学习理论对线性transformer进行理论分析；2. 证明在上下文线性回归任务上，嵌入空间对抗训练的鲁棒泛化界与扰动半径负相关；3. 提出基于嵌入矩阵奇异值的正则化项，将其加入CAT目标函数以改进LLM鲁棒性。

Result: 理论分析表明：1. 鲁棒泛化界与嵌入空间扰动半径负相关，解释了CAT防御token空间越狱攻击的机制；2. 鲁棒性与嵌入矩阵奇异值密切相关。实验证明，提出的正则化方法能帮助真实LLM实现更好的越狱鲁棒性-实用性权衡。

Conclusion: 该研究首次从理论角度解释了CAT在LLM中的工作机制，揭示了嵌入空间对抗训练与token空间防御之间的联系，并基于理论洞察提出了改进CAT的正则化方法，为LLM对抗训练提供了理论指导和实用改进方案。

Abstract: Adversarial training (AT) is an effective defense for large language models (LLMs) against jailbreak attacks, but performing AT on LLMs is costly. To improve the efficiency of AT for LLMs, recent studies propose continuous AT (CAT) that searches for adversarial inputs within the continuous embedding space of LLMs during AT. While CAT has achieved empirical success, its underlying mechanism, i.e., why adversarial perturbations in the embedding space can help LLMs defend against jailbreak prompts synthesized in the input token space, remains unknown. This paper presents the first theoretical analysis of CAT on LLMs based on in-context learning (ICL) theory. For linear transformers trained with adversarial examples from the embedding space on in-context linear regression tasks, we prove a robust generalization bound that has a negative correlation with the perturbation radius in the embedding space. This clearly explains why CAT can defend against jailbreak prompts from the LLM's token space. Further, the robust bound shows that the robustness of an adversarially trained LLM is closely related to the singular values of its embedding matrix. Based on this, we propose to improve LLM CAT by introducing an additional regularization term, which depends on singular values of the LLM's embedding matrix, into the objective function of CAT. Experiments on real-world LLMs demonstrate that our method can help LLMs achieve a better jailbreak robustness-utility tradeoff. The code is available at https://github.com/fshp971/continuous-adv-icl.

</details>


### [664] [Rethinking the Personalized Relaxed Initialization in the Federated Learning: Consistency and Generalization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12768)
*Li Shen,Yan Sun,Dacheng Tao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: FedInit：一种通过个性化松弛初始化缓解联邦学习中客户端漂移问题的高效算法，无需额外训练或通信成本即可提升泛化性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 联邦学习(FL)存在"客户端漂移"问题，即本地客户端的最优解不一致导致性能下降。现有研究缺乏对这一局部不一致性影响的严格理论分析，需要探索其本质并缓解其负面影响。

Method: 提出FedInit算法，在每个本地训练阶段开始时采用个性化松弛初始化状态。具体方法是将本地状态从当前全局状态向最新本地状态的反方向移动进行初始化。同时引入超额风险分析，通过研究发散项来探究FL中的测试误差。

Result: 理论分析表明优化误差对局部不一致性不敏感，而主要影响泛化误差界。实验验证FedInit在无需额外训练或通信成本的情况下，能达到与多个先进基准方法相当的结果。阶段式个性化松弛初始化可融入现有先进算法，进一步提升FL范式中的泛化性能。

Conclusion: FedInit通过个性化松弛初始化有效缓解客户端漂移问题，揭示了局部不一致性主要通过影响泛化误差而非优化误差来影响FL性能。该方法具有高效性和兼容性，可提升现有FL算法的泛化能力。

Abstract: Federated learning (FL) is a distributed paradigm that coordinates massive local clients to collaboratively train a global model via stage-wise local training processes on the heterogeneous dataset. Previous works have implicitly studied that FL suffers from the ``client-drift'' problem, which is caused by the inconsistent optimum across local clients. However, till now it still lacks solid theoretical analysis to explain the impact of this local inconsistency. To alleviate the negative impact of ``client drift'' and explore its substance in FL, in this paper, we first propose an efficient FL algorithm FedInit, which allows employing the personalized relaxed initialization state at the beginning of each local training stage. Specifically, FedInit initializes the local state by moving away from the current global state towards the reverse direction of the latest local state. Moreover, to further understand how inconsistency disrupts performance in FL, we introduce the excess risk analysis and study the divergence term to investigate the test error in FL. Our studies show that optimization error is not sensitive to this local inconsistency, while it mainly affects the generalization error bound. Extensive experiments are conducted to validate its efficiency. The proposed FedInit method could achieve comparable results compared to several advanced benchmarks without any additional training or communication costs. Meanwhile, the stage-wise personalized relaxed initialization could also be incorporated into several current advanced algorithms to achieve higher generalization performance in the FL paradigm.

</details>


### [665] [SOAR: Self-Correction for Optimal Alignment and Refinement in Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12617)
*You Qin,Linqing Wang,Hao Fei,Roger Zimmermann,Liefeng Bo,Qinglin Lu,Chunyu Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SOAR是一种新的扩散模型后训练方法，通过自校正机制填补了监督微调(SFT)和强化学习(RL)之间的空白，无需奖励模型即可提供密集的逐时间步监督。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前扩散模型后训练流程存在SFT和RL之间的根本性差距。SFT仅在理想的前向加噪状态上进行优化，存在暴露偏差问题；RL虽然理论上能解决这个问题，但存在稀疏奖励信号、信用分配困难和奖励黑客风险。

Method: SOAR是一种偏差校正后训练方法：从真实样本开始，使用当前模型执行单次停止梯度展开，对得到的偏离轨迹状态重新加噪，然后监督模型使其回归到原始干净目标。该方法是在策略的、无需奖励的，并提供密集的逐时间步监督。

Result: 在SD3.5-Medium上，SOAR将GenEval从0.70提升到0.78，OCR从0.64提升到0.67，同时提高了所有基于模型的偏好分数。在受控的奖励特定实验中，SOAR在美学和图文对齐任务上都超越了Flow-GRPO，尽管没有访问奖励模型。

Conclusion: SOAR填补了SFT和RL之间的空白，其基础损失包含了标准SFT目标，可以直接替代SFT作为预训练后更强的第一阶段后训练方法，同时完全兼容后续的RL对齐。

Abstract: The post-training pipeline for diffusion models currently has two stages: supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on curated data and reinforcement learning (RL) with reward models. A fundamental gap separates them. SFT optimizes the denoiser only on ground-truth states sampled from the forward noising process; once inference deviates from these ideal states, subsequent denoising relies on out-of-distribution generalization rather than learned correction, exhibiting the same exposure bias that afflicts autoregressive models, but accumulated along the denoising trajectory instead of the token sequence. RL can in principle address this mismatch, yet its terminal reward signal is sparse, suffers from credit-assignment difficulty, and risks reward hacking. We propose SOAR (Self-Correction for Optimal Alignment and Refinement), a bias-correction post-training method that fills this gap. Starting from a real sample, SOAR performs a single stop-gradient rollout with the current model, re-noises the resulting off-trajectory state, and supervises the model to steer back toward the original clean target. The method is on-policy, reward-free, and provides dense per-timestep supervision with no credit-assignment problem. On SD3.5-Medium, SOAR improves GenEval from 0.70 to 0.78 and OCR from 0.64 to 0.67 over SFT, while simultaneously raising all model-based preference scores. In controlled reward-specific experiments, SOAR surpasses Flow-GRPO in final metric value on both aesthetic and text-image alignment tasks, despite having no access to a reward model. Since SOAR's base loss subsumes the standard SFT objective, it can directly replace SFT as a stronger first post-training stage after pretraining, while remaining fully compatible with subsequent RL alignment.

</details>


### [666] [Stress Detection Using Wearable Physiological and Sociometric Sensors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12746)
*Oscar Martinez Mozos,Virginia Sandulescu,Sally Andrews,David Ellis,Nicola Bellotto,Radu Dobrescu,Jose Manuel Ferrandez*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 基于生理和社交传感器融合的机器学习方法，用于社交情境下的压力自动检测


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 压力是现代社会中个体面临的重要社会问题，需要开发自动检测方法来帮助识别和管理压力状态

Method: 结合生理和社交响应两种传感器系统，使用支持向量机、AdaBoost和k近邻等分类器，在受控的Trier社交压力测试中进行实验

Result: 通过融合两种传感器系统的测量数据，能够准确区分压力情境和中性情境，并评估了各传感器模态的判别能力及其在实时压力检测中的适用性

Conclusion: 多模态传感器融合方法在社交压力检测中具有良好效果，同时识别了最具判别性的特征，为实时压力检测系统开发提供了基础

Abstract: Stress remains a significant social problem for individuals in modern societies. This paper presents a machine learning approach for the automatic detection of stress of people in a social situation by combining two sensor systems that capture physiological and social responses. We compare the performance using different classifiers including support vector machine, AdaBoost, and k-nearest neighbor. Our experimental results show that by combining the measurements from both sensor systems, we could accurately discriminate between stressful and neutral situations during a controlled Trier social stress test (TSST). Moreover, this paper assesses the discriminative ability of each sensor modality individually and considers their suitability for real-time stress detection. Finally, we present an study of the most discriminative features for stress detection.

</details>


### [667] [KumoRFM-2: Scaling Foundation Models for Relational Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12596)
*Valter Hudovernik,Federico López,Vid Kocijan,Akihiro Nitta,Jan Eric Lenssen,Jure Leskovec,Matthias Fey*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: KumoRFM-2是第二代关系数据预训练基础模型，支持上下文学习和微调，无需手动扁平化表格即可处理连接表，在41个基准测试中超越监督方法8%，并能扩展到十亿级数据集。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有表格基础模型需要手动扁平化关系数据，破坏了时间一致性，且KumoRFM-1仅限于小规模内存数据集。需要开发能原生处理关系数据、支持大规模数据集的基础模型。

Method: 模型在四个维度预训练：表级别的行和列维度，数据库级别的外键和跨样本维度。早期注入任务信息以选择相关列并提高噪声鲁棒性。无需手动扁平化即可同时处理多个连接表。

Result: 在41个挑战性基准测试中，KumoRFM-2超越监督和基础方法达8%，在冷启动和噪声数据极端设置下保持强性能。首次证明少样本基础模型在常见基准任务上超越监督方法，微调后性能进一步提升。

Conclusion: KumoRFM-2是首个能原生处理关系数据、扩展到十亿级数据集的基础模型，在少样本设置下超越监督方法，为关系数据预测任务提供了强大的预训练解决方案。

Abstract: We introduce KumoRFM-2, the next iteration of a pre-trained foundation model for relational data. KumoRFM-2 supports in-context learning as well as fine-tuning and is applicable to a wide range of predictive tasks. In contrast to tabular foundation models, KumoRFM-2 natively operates on relational data, processing one or more connected tables simultaneously without manual table flattening or target variable generation, all while preserving temporal consistency. KumoRFM-2 leverages a large corpus of synthetic and real-world data to pre-train across four axes: the row and column dimensions at the individual table level, and the foreign key and cross-sample dimensions at the database level. In contrast to its predecessor, KumoRFM-2 injects task information as early as possible, enabling sharper selection of task-relevant columns and improved robustness to noisy data. Through extensive experiments on 41 challenging benchmarks and analysis around expressivity and sensitivity, we demonstrate that KumoRFM-2 outperforms supervised and foundational approaches by up to 8%, while maintaining strong performance under extreme settings of cold start and noisy data. To our knowledge, this is the first time a few-shot foundation model has been shown to surpass supervised approaches on common benchmark tasks, with performance further improving upon fine-tuning. Finally, while KumoRFM-1 was limited to small-scale in-memory datasets, KumoRFM-2 scales to billion-scale relational datasets.

</details>


### [668] [Do VLMs Truly "Read" Candlesticks? A Multi-Scale Benchmark for Visual Stock Price Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12659)
*Kaiqi Hu,Linda Xiao,Shiyue Xu,Ziyi Tang,Mingwen Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文构建了多尺度K线图数据集和标准化评估框架，用于评估视觉语言模型在股票价格预测中理解多尺度视觉市场信号的能力，发现现有模型在常见市场场景中表现不佳且存在预测偏差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉语言模型在视觉股票价格预测中的应用评估不足：1) 未能隔离模型对视觉输入的真实理解能力；2) 现有数据集多为单周期或表格输入，而人类分析师依赖多尺度K线图；3) 缺乏系统评估模型整合短期和长期视觉市场动态能力的框架。

Method: 1) 构建多尺度K线图数据集；2) 建立标准化评估框架，结合基于混淆矩阵的诊断和信息系数时间序列指标；3) 引入XGBoost作为基于特征的时间基线模型；4) 对代表性视觉语言模型进行基准测试，分析其利用多尺度股票价格数据的能力。

Result: 实验结果显示：1) 大多数视觉语言模型仅在持续上涨或下跌趋势下表现良好；2) 在更常见的市场场景中预测能力较弱；3) 存在显著的预测偏差；4) 对提示中明确指定的预测时间范围敏感性有限，表明在精确时间推理方面存在固有局限性。

Conclusion: 该研究揭示了当前视觉语言模型在股票价格预测中的局限性，特别是在多尺度视觉市场信号理解和时间推理方面。提出的数据集和评估框架为未来研究提供了标准化基准，有助于推动视觉语言模型在金融预测领域的更有效应用。

Abstract: Vision-language models(VLMs) are increasingly applied to visual stock price forecasting, yet existing benchmarks inadequately evaluate their understanding of stock price in candlestick charts. First, prior studies fail to isolate VLMs' comprehension of visual inputs genuinely improves predictive performance and whether VLMs truly comprehend candlestick patterns. Further, most existing datasets and evaluation setups are designed around single-period or tabular inputs. However, human analysts strongly rely on multi-scale candlestick charts, where longer-term horizons capture trend direction and shorter-term horizons provide cues for inflection points, making it difficult to systematically assess VLMs' ability to integrate short-term and long-term visual market dynamics. To bridge this gap, we construct a multi-scale candlestick charts dataset and a standardized evaluation framework to assess VLMs' ability to utilize multi-scale visual market signals. Evaluation combines confusion-matrix-based diagnostics with information coefficient(IC) time series metrics and includes XGBoost as a feature-based temporal baseline. Using this dataset, we benchmark representative VLMs and analyze their ability to leverage multi-scale stock price data. Experimental results show that most VLMs perform well only under persistent uptrend or downtrend conditions, while exhibiting weak predictive capability in more common market scenarios. We also identify significant prediction biases and limited sensitivity to explicitly specified forecast horizons in prompts, indicating inherent limitations in precise temporal reasoning.

</details>


### [669] [Orthogonal Subspace Projection for Continual Machine Unlearning via SVD-Based LoRA](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12526)
*Yogachandran Rahulamathavan,Nasir Iqbal,Juncheng Hu,Sangarapillai Lambotharan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于SVD引导的正交子空间投影的静态方法，用于解决连续机器遗忘中LoRA模块参数冲突问题，通过在训练期间约束新的LoRA更新位于先前遗忘任务子空间的正交补中，实现任务隔离。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 连续机器遗忘需要在删除请求顺序到达时，移除不应保留的数据影响，同时保持模型在其他数据上的有效性。当使用LoRA进行高效更新时，顺序组合多个LoRA模块会导致参数冲突和任务间强烈干扰。

Method: 提出基于奇异值分解(SVD)引导的正交子空间投影方法。在训练期间约束每个新的LoRA更新，使其位于先前遗忘任务使用的子空间的正交补中。这种方法保持了任务隔离，无需在部署时进行动态路由。
